name: Virginians For Fair Elections
subject: Fair elections have never been harder to protect
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
body:
This is our path forward. We’re cutting through the noise and protecting voters.
# [](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/131?refcode=em20260124-66&t=1&akid=66%2E12592%2E4AcA54)
Hey, it’s Virginians for Fair Elections. We’re coming to you with urgency because we have a responsibility to meet this moment.
You see it everywhere: scrolling on your phone, watching the news, or reading an article — free and fair elections are under attack.
Donald Trump has openly declared that Republican-controlled states need to gerrymander their congressional maps to hell to lock in Republican control of Congress and allow him to pass his agenda unchecked.
Trump and MAGA-controlled legislatures are taking unprecedented steps to rig congressional maps. Rather than engage in tit-for-tat partisan politics, Virginians are stepping up to protect voters by restoring fairness — with transparency and voter approval.
**We refuse to let the GOP unfairly water down Virginians’ votes.****[Are you with us? Donate $3 or anything you can right now to support our work to pass a temporary voter-approved amendment to level the playing field for Virginians and protect American democracy for our kids and grandkids.](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_welcome_1.PUSnL_&amount=3&refcode=20260124-66&t=2&akid=66%2E12592%2E4AcA54) **
**[Donate $3 ››](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_welcome_1.PUSnL_&amount=3&refcode=20260124-66&t=21&akid=66%2E12592%2E4AcA54)**
This Virginia redistricting amendment will be an open and transparent process. Virginia voters — not politicians — will have the final say, and they will be able to review proposed congressional maps _before_ deciding how to vote on the amendment.
[**Stand with us. Ensure that Virginians have a voice. Donate anything you can to fuel this critical work.**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_welcome_1.PUSnL_&amount=3&refcode=20260124-66&t=22&akid=66%2E12592%2E4AcA54)
Thank you for your support,
Virginians for Fair Elections

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_vafe_footer?refcode=em-66&t=23&refcode2=66_12592_4AcA54&akid=66%2E12592%2E4AcA54)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/update-contact-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://vafe.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/)

Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
Contributions or gifts to Virginians for Fair Elections are not tax deductible.

We’re coming to you with urgency because we have a responsibility to meet this moment. You see it everywhere: scrolling on your phone, watching the news, or reading an article — free and fair elections are under attack. Donald Trump has openly declared that Republican-controlled states need to gerrymander their congressional maps to hell to lock in Republican control of Congress and allow him to pass his agenda unchecked. Trump and MAGA-controlled legislatures are taking unprecedented steps to rig congressional maps. Rather than engage in tit-for-tat partisan politics, Virginians are stepping up to protect voters by restoring fairness — with transparency and voter approval. We refuse to let the GOP unfairly water down Virginians’ votes. This Virginia redistricting amendment will be an open and transparent process. Virginia voters — not politicians — will have the final say, and they will be able to review proposed congressional maps before deciding how to vote on the amendment. Thank you for your support, Virginians for Fair Elections

name: Kyle Blomquist for Congress
subject: 10 bullets in an American citizen for filming ICE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blomquist for Congress
body:
| | | 10 bullets in an American citizen for filming ICE Peter, this morning in Minneapolis, federal agents assaulted and killed another American citizen for exercising his First Amendment rights. **What we know so far:** Alex Jeffrey Pretti, a 37-year-old American citizen and ICU nurse at the Minneapolis VA Healthcare System, was filming federal agents with his phone. Multiple videos shot from different angles appear to show the victim coming to the assistance of two other legal observers. At which point, federal agents deployed pepper spray and tackled the victim to the ground. The victim appears to be punched and pistol whipped multiple times before an agent opened fire with other agents still restraining the victim. As the agents cleared the victim’s body, two agents continued to fire at the victim, who at this point had stopped moving. The victim does not appear to have pulled his weapon at any point. He was a law-abiding American citizen with a license to carry and no criminal history. Just as they did after Renee Good’s murder, the administration is demanding that we reject the evidence of our eyes and ears, and federal officials are preventing local law enforcement from investigating the crime scene. There is no justification for emptying 10 bullets into a man already on the ground. This is what happens when you arm fragile egos with “absolute immunity.” This is power run amok. ICE must be torn down to the last brick, not given another $10B to murder us with. Abolish ICE. — Kyle
[Abolish ICE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt4QXGvzHaYCGWcBmOw8FOVokujjpISB5G2Ko48zbqsvYTEoQMStWwRVB7wbUHMAGluH7xbIBTSVKN3_0hRD95ypp4vpsYAC1b0PMkRRm0DLxLIxr1Xun6R5uwAP1mr-4JMgXiixJGJS4TXIejym6g2B7GF8oVjrU4EfgmQ4N9-GiJSaEjLTQAUo4irlJJJaTNhoNRYDQAv1Z4R10gdTktGcGoc3i0o2-8-lYScG1DCoFFNaijz1NsDF6Hh1EuoYJYkPV4JHt-r841K7p_cmGZ0Eywjv42DJ-OQOcrHAM0BRRfieTvgJudrYqM6Oq97W-iHVXFgX8yVsSf-ATkMyVdVfEgD2CX3YdzjjZdG655POjBxTs7eo-hrfyhkA6LcO2M/4nl/owawcG5BQiyhJvcz05hEzQ/h0/h001._dk0n_DAOWlNvNgZbY8xp_eKvlDqXCZWRW-0v7xR-Uw)

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Here’s how you can help Minneapolis today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=2044%2E791427%2EPq8KtC)
Friend, with so much violence, harassment, and intimidation put upon our Minneapolis community by ICE and the Trump administration, it’s more important than ever that we come together to support our neighbors.
Especially our neighbors who have been targeted by ICE and have lived in fear for months.
That’s why I’m reaching out today to ask you to donate to **[Minneapolis Families for Public Schools**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/4810?refcode=ilhan-omar-em&t=2&akid=2044%2E791427%2EPq8KtC), an organization in the area that is serving the community at this dangerous and uncertain moment.
Minneapolis Families for Public Schools is organizing parents to protect school drop off and pick up from ICE encounters to make sure our kids can get to school safely.
Every child deserves to get a good education without the fear of being separated from their family. School should be a safe place for every child, no matter their background. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll chip in.
Donate here via TakeAction Minnesota: **[https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/MFPS**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/4810?refcode=ilhan-omar-em&t=3&akid=2044%2E791427%2EPq8KtC)
Whatever you can afford helps. Even a contribution of $5 makes a difference for organizers on the ground.
All eyes are on Minneapolis right now, and we need support.
I know I can count on this team, as I always have.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=4&akid=2044%2E791427%2EPq8KtC)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=5&akid=2044%2E791427%2EPq8KtC)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=6&akid=2044%2E791427%2EPq8KtC)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=2044_791427_Pq8KtC&akid=2044%2E791427%2EPq8KtC)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

Folks - Michele Tafoya here!

My whole life led me to this moment.

I spent decades as a sideline reporter for professional football and basketball. I covered more Minnesota games than I can count. And I raised two children with my husband outside Minneapolis. I love Minnesota.

However, what's happening here hits a little too close to home.

**1.** I watched as Tim Walz sent my tax dollars to fraudulent daycares. **2.** I watched as career politicians handed out billions to illegal immigrants while our veterans slept on the streets. **3.** I watched as violent rioters burned down my city in 2020. **4.** I watched as protesters stormed a St. Paul church to intimidate Sunday worshippers.

**[I refuse to let Minnesota be destroyed at the hands of Tim Walz and the political class. That’s why I'm announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/SvW7LDZihOHE3exAGZB98dH0xfvaUYDl8kUBlRzBHEYW_S_HqLMC3i-T7xT-Cro4TnqpASwZwPycZkhTKVUjt6LyDrpLN1mHBhrCmw-_YMlJ9m0_5aZrNBBz3gmR-zqSoVau80k6GO_NE99AG29J5-Xh47RteZgVJULqjylW8stg7Q206ouyLTjUlRHrQ-qCjvv9-7nhwEtdir2Zrha8AiTaeR3w-9Q7NgAJ_Yr1fnKYlPbq3jc5Bf3ZDeHQ_vNK8a4eq1O4hYIwYZNsGVxSR-7YiqwhHW67IfJtW90Q9XMuk14JAAbaYTn_JI_XNRWW05kay5gDFnzuea7TffEFNF92EL6Rh7sc8uvbwjWwG-sWhJMMnBvM_Bv-DOoL1M7yhG3sWkfzoThKfQl0HV0WDauka0nk2sFx7HojqtK8F7udyFN6u0EXaJMgtEJib5M-W-KLR3B9fgbOfrHZX7NH3Skc-PZ1rHYavBRXPg6bDR0BR3zafYamECOqKCohQ8YTUrtZgnaWk4a4l7tkfqeHMCXpuYJnMfc6m7CWcY5TotL--KbLDz3EMr5bdP6nMu7OSsZnpbkL6LqmzKZA3Gl_b9gwSTizV8DgPadgS8NFZD-0_JGGFwviVmgF8KEDuDUXYEaQqvfMjcNNwp5KOvpDiMZw8HTGuNLAn3UuqKClsVkcXCoyw0PjpC61wb9j-c8tslw-6zu8UNAem_R6BVisRHdpzBo9Q7s-9nQTZPd6B1F8JgQEJK_ZWPAb53ABnUi8FC8Pm25SIWYbrYNSTlRrVwecPrdT7t_awtUJAI-3W0I4xm7IK9CUuAqrFL6dEWccrMqhPRWVRYMEsxQrdHdQjTEsDuS2wMXuSnEelUmxzS23F-OhDxB6mWm57lcT1hpzub4l8093zprku28kIwsYRMwRg-ynUkado0AvrHDkm8KASVyZIbgZWOm9NOy384XZi3FzP3ntvEJOWHRXqc95CZZdv4jqquWi5af-3Al1zQ7doU2h-VhG06qxT-GLHwMaJsJYJxgoW7g6JxnYaROY9eKVHuBj9x5x-_uAb7gfLhTxljDqklq3HPf0UVoYctgD7w/74bi5bcjeS9Pgs-qOGWENXBNLEFfcRhv/17)**

We have the opportunity of a LIFETIME to take back this state in the name of sanity. I know we can win, but only if I can fund a winning campaign.

_Will you help me get off the ground by becoming a founding donor today?_
[](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/tn0sm18y-pbMeDh3HHWzg6Jl2Fkk-JCKIVqL-Pmk2mlVKmulgLLqg84MEvF6q5Xe4KWJWS9r3rVdc5I8gm8-7acBuGDCR31eTy4P8uBQojZUK495oI-aJG9AHUKjAfEaM6lChI9paYvZeyA1gHilGgObfzhS3zE-la1RzyrI_8PpW_bp-k6jZeMebURw49QFPOMU-grrsimHKjk7PwdedLcLjshEc-Vbz_-oiUIPGz7eOiJQGJT6TEFxsqdKm5DwY-VIA8kJks3jkVFBZXZ4BZM4F0phtI_gprl32BHNhpTLjzTKsFfuqMc5jqh44A9N7oPn8alPSi1zoy8aE4P7LmBx3u4LbR-zDBTgYPk515jViHRbT4pbM9ERyQMMnB1WfgIzzIJGO3LbG5FYoLwI6YSo9krNsXPLhcFaUGqbrgDGk9hIV_NG17Ugz-6dT6WRA1uAm4p1RRf6Ay-nDck_v_XRfRTOByiBeeMgq26i59CbkZXEmHgGFAaLuGfLXbRDsZP-HL4pGC3w0zIqKjEzo4CWItFaNszbyCfshz8H2hRoSQd9NqOmpXMDxlLrJjOZ6SEg3KzbS6bornIVEMBBBVtGPSB0SHyt9n9tYjJJokOZ9vmKaVtGFm9_SUcZcyoMN_cKekrlux5JogLcNjazFaH0h1ZOSuSEYaTl-C4RLUqBJhlgmE18yAgmKu051mHyRn42X6xjVsYSlfsPOgaIU_QhQejOKhgLJzO9QmltWd6IzAUA_oj7lCLKdlCs7lyJtNOXd1CePIGaAylrUTxdPACXL31qvKN8h5GuQp3ReElDmwjVBsMkZlWQYNeWr4uvRcf9rUJJq6EEKKaaq-8_OnS0BpfS5gdI9MUDqNynPhv6JHyBZWZJqNKIUhwKndf8vRf_IMG8xNEUhE9InHvjtY9KxitEq3fPs8mGy7JEa0XbRomPKNpxC8QhtshH6k3dEBtOnvs3K_MGpRrX1GJnxQVMBwMjj9VwL9NKQI0A3SxUM_jsv7UHdtEpy1lCX5EgpjdfyTMIqNth-wZOTUs9MH09oST7QS5cnxCHM6alxomaAuojj0-Hxgtq2MF_JvLRPg/0zMdS0U6AEzCmP0drKmRfsdBhFr2zib4/17)

Listen - as a sideline reporter and as a mother, I've seen up close and personal what the far-Left has done to our country.

**[I saw the players kneeling during our national anthem.

clean_body: Folks - Michele Tafoya here! My whole life led me to this moment. I spent decades as a sideline reporter for professional football and basketball. I covered more Minnesota games than I can count. And I raised two children with my husband outside Minneapolis. I love Minnesota. However, what's happening here hits a little too close to home. 1. I watched as Tim Walz sent my tax dollars to fraudulent daycares. 2. I watched as career politicians handed out billions to illegal immigrants while our veterans slept on the streets. 3. I watched as violent rioters burned down my city in 2020. 4. I watched as protesters stormed a St. Paul church to intimidate Sunday worshippers. We have the opportunity of a LIFETIME to take back this state in the name of sanity. I know we can win, but only if I can fund a winning campaign. Will you help me get off the ground by becoming a founding donor today? ****************************************************************************************************** Listen - as a sideline reporter and as a mother, I've seen up close and personal what the far-Left has done to our country. This goes against everything I believe in. When I shock the world and win this race, this divisiveness and corruption will come to a SCREECHING HALT. Unfortunately, the far-Left has raised 100+ million dollars to destroy our momentum and end my campaign for good. That 's exactly what will happen if this email fails. Your support will mean the difference between victory and defeat in Minnesota. **************************************************************************************************** Let's make history together - God bless you! Be brave. Do good. - Michele ** Republican for Senate, Minnesota | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

name: Katie Porter
subject: I want you to hear this directly from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40751%2E3422442%2ElNT6Rt)
Dear Peter,
I want to tell you more about my story.
But first: **[I’m running for governor of California to lower costs and make life easier for all of us. If you’re with me, I hope you can pitch in $5 to my campaign today.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260124_2_ak.cKJQws&refcode=em20260124-40751&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40751%2E3422442%2ElNT6Rt)**
I grew up in rural Iowa, where my parents, two siblings, and I lived in a two-bedroom, one-bath house. My father was a farmer and my mother was a small business owner.
As I grew older, I saw neighbors and friends lose everything as Iowa’s economy collapsed during the farm crisis of the 1980s. That experience shaped how I see the economy, which is set up to bail out the rich and powerful while working Americans are left behind.
I got scholarships to attend good schools, but I was reminded that other students came from different backgrounds and didn’t have to work multiple jobs through college. **Ever since then, I’ve never forgotten my roots growing up.**
I decided to go to law school because I knew I wanted to pursue a career that would help people. While in school, I had the opportunity to study under then professor Elizabeth Warren. She helped me see **the power of strong consumer protections—and how clear rules give families a fair shot.**
I carried these lessons to California, where I was raising my three young children and teaching law when then Attorney General of California Kamala Harris asked me to serve as the California Monitor of the National Mortgage Settlement. **I held the Big Banks’ feet to the fire, delivering billions in relief for homeowners and helping thousands of families stay in their homes.**
**That fight prepared me for one of the most important points of my life: my decision to run for Congress.** In the middle of Trump’s first term, I saw firsthand how he was handing the keys to the economy over to his rich and powerful friends. Working families were getting left behind while he gave huge tax breaks to billionaires.
**I ran in a district that was a decades-long Republican stronghold and won—because voters knew I would fight for them, not special interests.** In Congress, I used my power to fight for the same values I had my entire career: making life easier for working families, women, and people that are far too often forgotten in Washington.
I know what it’s like for most Californians right now. Unlike many of my peers in Congress, I didn’t have to rely on talking points to tell me what ordinary people were going through. I’m a single mom raising three kids—I know the struggle. I stretch my grocery dollars with coupons, shop second-hand for dresses for the campaign trail, and worry about the high costs that add up when my 2010 minivan needs a repair. These are the same challenges so many Californians face, and that perspective matters—it’s why I fight the way I do.
**Now, I feel the same call to serve that I did in 2018.** Donald Trump is out of control, costs in California are crushing families, our housing crisis is decades in the making, and health insurance premiums are going up thanks to Trump’s chaos in Washington. I could go on, but the point is something has to change.
**As governor, I’ll fight to bring down costs, make housing more affordable, and hold corporations accountable when they cheat Californians.** I’ll make sure our state works for everyone—not just the wealthy and well connected.
**[But I won’t be able to do these things without you Peter. Can you pitch in $5 to help us win and make California work for everyone?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260124_2_ak.cKJQws&refcode=em20260124-40751&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40751%2E3422442%2ElNT6Rt)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260124_2_ak.cKJQws&refcode=em20260124-40751&t=23&akid=40751%2E3422442%2ElNT6Rt)
Thank you,
Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260124-40751&amounts=&t=24&refcode2=40751_3422442_lNT6Rt&akid=40751%2E3422442%2ElNT6Rt)**

clean_body: Dear Peter, I want to tell you more about my story. But first: I grew up in rural Iowa, where my parents, two siblings, and I lived in a two-bedroom, one-bath house. My father was a farmer and my mother was a small business owner. As I grew older, I saw neighbors and friends lose everything as Iowa’s economy collapsed during the farm crisis of the 1980s. That experience shaped how I see the economy, which is set up to bail out the rich and powerful while working Americans are left behind. I got scholarships to attend good schools, but I was reminded that other students came from different backgrounds and didn’t have to work multiple jobs through college. Ever since then, I’ve never forgotten my roots growing up. I decided to go to law school because I knew I wanted to pursue a career that would help people. While in school, I had the opportunity to study under then professor Elizabeth Warren. She helped me see the power of strong consumer protections—and how clear rules give families a fair shot. I carried these lessons to California, where I was raising my three young children and teaching law when then Attorney General of California Kamala Harris asked me to serve as the California Monitor of the National Mortgage Settlement. I held the Big Banks’ feet to the fire, delivering billions in relief for homeowners and helping thousands of families stay in their homes. That fight prepared me for one of the most important points of my life: my decision to run for Congress. In the middle of Trump’s first term, I saw firsthand how he was handing the keys to the economy over to his rich and powerful friends. Working families were getting left behind while he gave huge tax breaks to billionaires. I ran in a district that was a decades-long Republican stronghold and won—because voters knew I would fight for them, not special interests. In Congress, I used my power to fight for the same values I had my entire career: making life easier for working families, women, and people that are far too often forgotten in Washington. I know what it’s like for most Californians right now. Unlike many of my peers in Congress, I didn’t have to rely on talking points to tell me what ordinary people were going through. I’m a single mom raising three kids—I know the struggle. I stretch my grocery dollars with coupons, shop second-hand for dresses for the campaign trail, and worry about the high costs that add up when my 2010 minivan needs a repair. These are the same challenges so many Californians face, and that perspective matters—it’s why I fight the way I do. Now, I feel the same call to serve that I did in 2018. Donald Trump is out of control, costs in California are crushing families, our housing crisis is decades in the making, and health insurance premiums are going up thanks to Trump’s chaos in Washington. I could go on, but the point is something has to change. As governor, I’ll fight to bring down costs, make housing more affordable, and hold corporations accountable when they cheat Californians. I’ll make sure our state works for everyone—not just the wealthy and well connected. Thank you, Katie Porter Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change.

name: James Carville
subject: I’m fuming — and you should be too!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
If we don’t get off our butts and help Chris Pappas right now, we can kiss the Senate majority goodbye.
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99094?refcode=em20260124-9990&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9990%2E614464%2EpPgtFh)
Folks, it’s James Carville.
I’ve been around the block a few times and worked on a heck of a lot of campaigns. So believe me when I tell you: **This ain’t good.**
John Sununu — yeah, _those Sununus_ — just jumped into the U.S. Senate race in New Hampshire. And now the political eggheads have DOWNGRADED Democrats’ chances of winning there.
**[💥Before you read another word, split $10 or whatever you can between Chris Pappas and State Democrats Committee to help Chris fight back right now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99094?refcode=em20260124-9990&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9990%2E614464%2EpPgtFh)**
Let me tell you what this means: **If we don’t get off our butts and help Chris Pappas right now, we can kiss our chances of winning back the Senate majority goodbye.**
This isn’t some back-bench, no-name guy we’re up against. **Sununu’s won a Senate seat before.**
He’s got name ID, deep pockets, and Wall Street’s dark money machine ready to drown us in attack ads. This is the far-right’s big play, y’all — they know if they take New Hampshire, Democrats have _no viable path_ to flipping the Senate.
Chris Pappas is the real deal. I mean it. He’s won the toughest district in New Hampshire four damn times, and he knows how to bring folks together. But he cannot — **_cannot_** — do this alone.
So here’s what I need from you:
**[Split a contribution between Chris Pappas and State Democrats Committee today. $10, $25, whatever you can spare. Because if we let the GOP buy this seat for Sununu, we’re gonna be stuck with Republican control for years to come.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99094?refcode=em20260124-9990&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9990%2E614464%2EpPgtFh)**
**[Split a donation now »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99094?refcode=em20260124-9990&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9990%2E614464%2EpPgtFh)**
I’m mad as HELL that this race just shifted in the wrong direction — but that means it’s time to get serious. Chris is the only one who can hold this seat, but he needs a hell of a lot more firepower to fend off what’s coming.
Let’s show these Republican bigshots that we’re not scared — and we sure as hell ain’t backing down.
**[Give what you can right now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99094?refcode=em20260124-9990&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=9990%2E614464%2EpPgtFh)** Let’s win this damn thing and flip control of the Senate.
— James Carville

name: JamesTalarico.com
subject: James refused to be divided.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
There’s no doubt James won on the debate stage earlier! He proved why he’s Democrats’ best chance to take back Texas in November.
He refused to take part in the dirty politics that we all hate. Instead, he reminded folks that the biggest divide in this country is not left vs. right — it’s top vs. bottom, and that our number one goal must be taking back power from the billionaire mega-donors and their puppet politicians.
James offered a clear, positive vision for what’s possible if we take back Texas and take back power for working people. Our campaign is in the best position to win given James’ record and grassroots infrastructure — and when we do, it will transform what is possible in our state.
But billionaires and the corporate media will do anything to pit us against each other because it allows them to profit off the status quo. That’s why they’re flooding millions of dollars into this race.
Our opponents will spend ridiculous sums of money to smear James and defeat our movement. It’s going to take lots and lots of donations from people like you to make sure we don’t get drowned out.

name: GOTV PAC
subject: CALL YOUR SENATOR: NO on DHS funding!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=Email1022026 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=Email1022026]
Peter ,
We don’t even know how to put into words our devastation in reaction to today’s horrific news out of Minneapolis.
Another person has been murdered after an encounter with ICE – and the cruelty was followed, predictably, by the Trump Administration once again lying about what happened and telling us not to believe our own eyes.
A 37-year-old nurse was shot by federal agents, and the videos and eyewitness accounts show something that looks less like law enforcement and more like an execution.
For so many of us, this event feels overwhelming – like no one has the power to hold ICE and Donald Trump accountable.
But there is something we can do, and we need your help:
Right now, Senate Democrats have the leverage to stop a DHS funding bill that would allow Kristi Noem to expand ICE’s reach. 60 votes are required, meaning Republicans cannot pass it without Democratic support. This is one of the few moments right now where Democrats have the power to hold the Trump Administration accountable.
Here’s what you can do right now: Call your U.S. Senators – especially if they are Democrats – and tell them:
* Vote NO on any DHS funding bill without real restrictions on ICE
* Do NOT give Kristi Noem more money
Please make a call to the Senate switchboard to be connected with your senator: 202-224-3121
With you,
GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=Email1022026 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=Email1022026]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]
PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
GOTV PAC
712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-UFTIeK5E0CCzhE2NytL8Q2?unsubscribedata=wNYyQn0WAfoE%2FRMeEOu%2B3RqnDCZIZ%2BwgQK5BWoOBIM7XEk1%2Fi2Heu7aWX9IaEg0Yao7rqDT%2FJgseQUouDIVHYrBaHltg0eXRymy896J5ST4F%2BD5aSu8uW33kzPDRy1iHCxlH5OM%2FYVcLbefpjSdoBZ4zgCKgZc2pzCxkX3pTBljbj%2B5uV8AamhFJs5x8CYfzwLeXwqGj4npa6h4fd86BKNrYSLTKX04KlN0QBf0p4bQFsZ5KgBVf7FriUJFtR9eUN%2FRUb33aA%2BIGmk8h5Rb%2BhmeceOOT0lF6r69gqSNiRQFOjZJe%2FZFGbwiAMgZ8Wn4wNLkS1qbK3ldLIcplT2UGQRfPqioPo9IpSwPrhUxmNj%2BHnf94JiOGl5aFCoZePB78%2BE3FplIjwWOs3anoopZZGElLl%2Bxxop9liLdA2OkNO70%3D .

THE IMPEACHMENT MACHINE IS BACK._** _
They don 't want debate._ _
They don 't want oversight._ _
They want**TOTAL** control._

[This is Michele Tafoya – I’ve got a quick story to share if you’ll indulge me for a few moments.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/0T51YdPChDgXbw2Fa5PpvG2ioQ59wncBEI68R37PauszPR3ZHNxRylm1oZpwmNMqauO3BGTR_AVysZkVqjlgA67oEC16rbBqhxTYU6fhQ0gdM6R-MGOq-vYr9YOG0P1dxlOQYIm10JAtSjYWfv-XSy1DgPHMb4CEoS_yr2OIeUIRm3DLJfugYaTCwLXMgCf2tMTGN6vQMQ71Df-Z8okskbXBzfFLap5xUMg1B26ny7-GfaXzJkG4_rn6bRhP3A0nSvwlJjLvPbx0SIqF650N0PsIwM3CAUO0WJaFGb-i1k8ztro0_sUVzYE8J3IXczLeMmeyggX4CmagtxFvGX2fOSSpsh3qXjY64rMnZU03pkFza-0-Y7NRKy4fFx5JL81oKx5T4DCj94cIHC7N7ubkmJX9tPTzDtrVc8utMgDUQgrzgchrJ7WojY4IilwPoL3Tka0N_j9HBTnBeWeblEqjhrja2naLlqwgzEEF5HT5aRWJaZIW4W5rQhTIr8XBDlqiwo7aUSZ1fM_kfMqxq47pEnm7VpEsIznMAFOOBnJcusR3BJ1r2c_FFhO-I3lnlqLuc06C2BE44J-RYT4ZkpHVyADtMe_yJRgcdNB3WFyOrNm-elDLtNMe900FfBmqfs3ZuFT7mjkhFEZ_Zhvt1DQ05E3Wi4kZC5mthu3i3lllXTlYFT2sxtlr6PC9-bvsZA7MC-8V8GrigzhMmjDv59bpxzhPiuli7BZbTNiKCYUQCcaevDZgNN8dQIWAmfT5l-5lBl6L8B_ggu0ZNriSW_0wY50Y9FLpbaVfzSuJJRJkQb52Mk0cpih7hkEBzBAE4oRCvw/VE1IoJp3NRdyaTA7sz6PHxM4yN2YIBG5/17)
Folks might've killed to have my job.
I was a sideline reporter for pro football and basketball. I covered some of the most exciting games in history. I watched sports for a living. And I loved every minute, every touchdown, and every Hail Mary.
I reached the pinnacle of my career... but there was one problem:
I had to watch what I said. I was a public-facing representative for a world-class sports network. I couldn't share everything I believed, and no one really knew I was a Conservative.
So I hung up my press badge and quit my dream job so I could speak my mind. clean_body: there, I hope you are well! Folks might've killed to have my job. I was a sideline reporter for pro football and basketball. I covered some of the most exciting games in history. I watched sports for a living. And I loved every minute, every touchdown, and every Hail Mary. I reached the pinnacle of my career... but there was one problem: I had to watch what I said. I was a public-facing representative for a world-class sports network. I couldn't share everything I believed, and no one really knew I was a Conservative. So I hung up my press badge and quit my dream job so I could speak my mind. was the hardest decision I've ever made. I was scared, excited, and liberated - all at the same time. People said I was OUT OF MY MIND. But I knew God was leading me in a certain direction, and that 's no time for half-measures. I knew he had a plan for my life. So I took a leap of faith and never looked back. I believe God put me here for a reason. I believe Minnesota is the land of 10,000 problems right now. And I believe a no-BS, sane person who 's ALL-IN can win this seat. But I 'd be lying if I said fundraising doesn't make a difference in a race like this. The far-Left is readying a FORTUNE to drown out our message and take this seat out of play. Our path to victory solely depends on raising enough to keep up. My finance team tells me we 'll need to bring in 10,000 founding donors ASAP so we can: 1) Hire staff, 2) Recruit volunteers in every corner of the state, 3) Print yard signs, 4) Launch our first advertising blitz, and 5) Start contacting on-the-fence voters. I 'm afraid that'll make the difference between a winning campaign and a losing one. put my career on hold to speak out for what I know to be true. I 'm committing my blood, sweat, and tears to take this seat back from the political class. I 'd be honored if you'd be willing to stand alongside me. Donations in these early days make the biggest impact on our path to victory. I hope you 'll join us, but either way, God bless you! Be brave. | | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/andrewyang/p/alex-pretti?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Alex Pretti, a 37-year-old American citizen, was shot and killed by ICE agents in Minneapolis on Saturday. Alex was an Intensive Care Unit nurse who worked with military veterans in the VA. He was wrestled to the ground by multiple agents and was shot multiple times after trying to assist someone. Alex was apparently legally carrying a registered firearm at the time of the encounter.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/864c0b38-934b-48d5-a2f5-0a1fc08ab358?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
When one of these shootings occurs, you might think, "Oh no. Is there a video and do I want to see it?" Here, I'm glad that there was a video because it appears to show Alex on the ground and disarmed by agents shortly before he was shot. The video suggests that one of the agents said the word "gun" and then another agent responded by shooting Alex multiple times even though, in my view, Alex was prone, surrounded, already disarmed, and was not threatening anyone.
The immediate and reflexive administration response that Alex "was violently resisting arrest and agents acted in self-defense" is belied by the video as well as common sense. Alex was an ICU nurse with no criminal record who was initially brandishing a cell phone, not a weapon. At what point will ICE acknowledge that one of their agents made a lethal error in judgment? Such errors should be seen as inevitable when one inserts a large armed force into hundreds of emotionally charged interactions with everyday Americans.
Conservatives ordinarily trumpet the necessity of allowing citizens to legally carry a firearm. What happens when doing just that becomes an excuse for an immediate death sentence carried out by poorly trained ICE agents? If you change a couple facts, Alex might be regarded as a hero by the right.
ICE should leave Minneapolis immediately and an investigation should be held to determine responsibility for his killing. American citizens are being shot on our own streets by federal officers. These are incredibly dark times. A change of course is desperately needed.
What I feel most of all is sadness for Alex's friends and family. He's going to be a hard person to demonize, though some will try. "Alex was a kindhearted soul who cared deeply for his family and friends and also the American veterans whom he cared for as an ICU nurse at the Minneapolis VA hospital," said his parents. "Alex wanted to make a difference in this world. Unfortunately, he will not be with us to see his impact." Let his death not be in vain.
To turn down the temperature in our country, check out [Forward](https://substack.com/redirect/27b041d7-6d75-4d3e-af56-6884deba6929?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which is trying to reduce polarization. To reduce your screen time, which can contribute to polarization in our own lives, check out [Noble Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/6c07b0f7-e930-442b-bf97-d74d0603dcd3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Remember the good in the world and appreciate those around you.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bb70e284-91d9-413c-9850-eb81c1ab6d2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

| | | _**Peter, anti-American racial discrimination programs are a cancer that have metastasized nationwide.**_
From Kindergarten through College, millions upon millions of students are being subjected to a cruel social experiment that prioritizes RACE above individual merit.
Students are being deprived of or awarded opportunities __solely__ based on their race – _a direct and appalling affront to the sacred principles of equality upon which our nation was founded._
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/vQ0FyPdlA58xDzdFSmYQaHRERHDcM7mvoJpXtoYdwncPU-NVDYeSjcIWDFOSD1ZwnMx6wQp1SjDVctAJRxYsTPdRtEHO1gqlqlp_AX_foaL6-bRDzLSSMVfaNg6O5i2qUC_DCW8nJVH17bkDorH9gAFRkq-hrlm0VTqMUsufTE0ITWDDC24c5sgj_k1GPq53h7lkPUrt_r7mjr2Jst4dUloFMCzOI-n_Ppebj2EpEjFbbcKe0Ie8o7GpFFkUdqxX0EmmguR1g-IfWIRjpjrJ1-HHlTKLAX2k6MgU6Fu0TYOH1VtIzSrcbreTr705Rujmk6c0cYjiWyDf-bCq72hAa3fy0E_GMWR51PDQO8EiaLmKXhcIpdatsrn3E2lTI5hsaxB52tZ3tkmzTTsW4D5nv8v3IxGqdMmKsdkCJoqXIA_hPBYQ9AlgIOlWQwj3XKnZDrRdBJuWd3bSWcLhcU8LudRBFs2eit2DI5dy46-m2203F2KYV-SmbAJtkBFCK9sd2OATjO6uWKNgAtz_upYn5ym_uTUAYpMk5WqUJkur1P5fcNj08x7pWEVyARfkw5j-YfUMwRZoTqDl0_wvmwEDgrDQLvUeyR3beymem4mDAuM8qFFjqeczqrIgw_y8J9f9yINoHOZ7nmCWl1Izs9KgLj8gKhaabMxnaqI6Nd15EikcNLRmtFAI8Wx-a4YmAtRWL3LWtgS0-3oSnrwYWCxdwFCuBiZJgRu_zPmPxf81IiUU5r0PNYFyOhoJSUNADsh7bSxQHPoGM87lfBuI2g/F-Xjiw6dHTVGiYzJWHzEg8GGNMANE03w/17)
_**And the 1776 Project Foundation just filed a lawsuit that could strike a major blow against a discriminatory program in the second LARGEST school district in AMERICA.**_
**_Peter, if you’re reading this, we’re humbly requesting your help in advancing what could be one of the most significant Anti-discrimination lawsuits of the 21st Century._**
_But before you make the decision to delete this email, please give us a couple of minutes to explain how we got here._
_In 2025, the 1776 Project Foundation was made aware of an allegedly discriminatory initiative called the “Predominantly Hispanic, Black, Asian, or other Non-Anglo (PHBAO) Program.”_
This program, designed by the Los Angeles Unified School District, was built to award schools with a 70% _“Predominantly Hispanic, Black, Asian, or other Non-Anglo”_ student population special awards.
If your school’s racial demographics are too White or Middle Eastern, your school would be disqualified from receiving benefits like _**REDUCED CLASSROOM SIZE and MORE FUNDING for teachers.**_
Put simply, LAUSD has implemented a system that benefits or penalizes students based on race... **we believe this is Unconstitutional and ILLEGAL.**
**... And the 1776 Project Foundation is taking immediate action in suing the Los Angeles Unified School District in an effort to shut down this program.**
_But this case won’t just impact Los Angeles._
_It won’t just impact California._
**This case could send a resounding shockwave through America’s schools NATIONWIDE!**

name: Dr. Kristin Hook
subject: Honoring Nurse Alex Pretti
body:
| | | | | [|
---](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=0aefa97807&e=395a33a3d2)
| | | | | |
# I’m heartbroken and outraged.
---
| |

Alex Jeffrey Pretti was an ICU nurse at a VA hospital who served our heroes, and his life was violently ended today by ICE agents who shot him on the streets of Minneapolis.
---
[|
---](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=c90e9a0536&e=395a33a3d2)
| |

He was trying to help a woman that ICE pushed to the ground because that’s what nurses and real men do. As a nurse, Alex chose a career that involved caring for others. Today, in his final act of service for his community, he was shot in cold blood by our federal government. His parents released this statement today about him:
---
|
---
| |

An administration that has nothing to hide doesn’t [wear masks](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=bcf0cd2b85&e=395a33a3d2), [deny access to its facilities](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=f989b3e20b&e=395a33a3d2), or [lie about the victims they have killed](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=8c02e00b4f&e=395a33a3d2) on our streets or [in their custody](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=132f3de508&e=395a33a3d2). Federal [officials claim Nurse Alex had a gun, but videos analyzed by the New York Times show he only had a cell phone](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=f34be9fe9b&e=395a33a3d2) in his hand.
[A](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=219d5f25ab&e=395a33a3d2)s a scientist, I’m reminded of the Stanford Prison Experiment. In that study, students given power as “guards” with little oversight quickly abused it – forcing the study to end early. Not because they were evil, but because **absolute power corrupts absolutely**.
Just a few days ago, I addressed San Antonio’s City Council to [speak out against SAPD cooperation with ICE](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=5a4d687095&e=395a33a3d2). At the hearing I was surrounded by other concerned community members and reminded that [the majority of Americans do not want this](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=6f76596e9e&e=395a33a3d2) terror in our streets.
Below is my public statement on today’s tragedy. RIP to Nurse Alex. Thank you for being a helper. We must continue fighting for justice.

name: Dave McCormick
subject: How an early morning church service strengthened my faith
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick
body:
This is a deeply personal story

| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn3839l065ii7nurt50172a10ucjqsfkqp9h0v18_rp22sh2s8i6eor4spj61o72cdh2bs)
---
| | I want to take a moment today to share a personal story with you, Friend
It’s a story about how an early morning church service and a sermon referencing Psalm 121 left an imprint on my soul and strengthened my faith.
When I arrived at West Point as a new cadet, I had no idea how much it would transform my life.
During my first plebe summer, I attended an early morning church service. The sermon referenced Psalm 121:
**“I lift my eyes to the mountains- where does my help come from? My help comes from the Lord, the maker of heaven and earth.” Psalm 121**
**That psalm and my time at West Point have been a touchstone ever since, sustaining me during difficult moments in my life.**
When I decided to run for U.S. Senate, I made a promise to come to Washington and work with fellow political outsiders like President Trump to shake up business as usual. Now I’m working to fulfill that promise every single day.
We need leaders in DC with the strength, the will, and the moral clarity to meet the challenges we face. **So, if you’re looking to continue the status quo, I’m not your guy.**
But if you want to help me continue my fight to change the way things are done in DC, I need your support. Our average online donation is $21.38, and **_[I would be so grateful if you would generously give that amount today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbp3o5dnerrtu652g0fab085ff9lo5cefpgk7ssg_rp22sh2s8i6eor4spj61o72cdh2bs)_**
I’m no stranger to fighting for what is right, and ****if we don’t continue pushing every single day to clean up the mess the career politicians made, we will lose America as we know it!****
There are too many pressing issues we must solve to hold back now. Whether it’s illegal immigration and the fentanyl crisis or inflation and the cost of living, we cannot afford to lose ground.
Here’s where I need your help, Friend I hate asking for money — I’m not a career politician, and it’s not in my nature — but I have no choice but to ask if we’re going to continue fighting to advance our cause to change how things are done.
Democrats from all over the country are panicking and pulling out all the stops to attack Republicans who are shaking up Washington. That’s why I’m hoping you can spare **_[$25, $50, or even $100 to help me fight back.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8f8adm65rl872uv63qj43rf3o3prdk98salnb18_rp22sh2s8i6eor4spj61o72cdh2bs)_**
---
[DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5khq03jhb8knv2a1ddo3bnor8c172v3i2lpm6do_rp22sh2s8i6eor4spj61o72cdh2bs)
| | Please, join me today to fix our broken government and save what makes America worth fighting for.
Thank you,Senator Dave McCormickArmy Veteran, USMA'87
---
[DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znd6lmoqu0093ugncfhl6kctad9omn9fdcnbpbv8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4spj61o72cdh2bs)
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4p7dgkscvv3sud1h0guucva70e6c855e0p35l0g_rp22sh2s8i6eor4spj61o72cdh2bs)
---
| | I'm Dave McCormick. I'm a West Point grad, combat veteran who served in the 82nd Airborne, a 7th-generation Pennsylvanian, **and last November I defeated an entrenched career politician in the #1 swing state of the 2024 election.**
I’ve seen firsthand what great leadership looks like. I’ve seen that even on our worst days, you have to put the needs of others first.
That’s why I made a promise to come to the Senate and work with fellow political outsiders like President Trump to shake up Washington, and I’m working to do that every single day.
Whether it’s securing the border, reducing crime in our cities, ending the fentanyl epidemic, or bringing down the cost of living–**I’m committed to delivering concrete solutions to the biggest issues we face.**
But in order to get the job done, it’s going to take all hands on deck. I need every freedom-loving American to help me shake up Washington. I promise I won't let you down.
_Senator Dave McCormick_
---
| | [DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcdqdudl9hduqf82st5m9ofkcb6duianfel90c3g_rp22sh2s8i6eor4spj61o72cdh2bs)

name: ICYMI News
subject: Thomas Sowell Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc32jlli45clltors8gju3nre8ddnopau9m8g8oo_rp22sh2s8i6eor4spj69pr1chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people--and you may be among them--I'm thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: _[**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztl14vntgv59h349lakg644kf9fbaah5bv028pdg_rp22sh2s8i6eor4spj69pr1chh2bs)_
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlpu77b0r6nipvg26jfp38qjj421s5jf8h4rdqk8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4spj69pr1chh2bs)
---
| | "Tax cuts for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z501dkktftqvabnbg45kq0sk1uhqurg93d9tavg0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4spj69pr1chh2bs) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge.[**Click here to get your free copy of**** _ "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" _****now.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zflhhrqd4haod19oebms340j0q6f2ia4lf51amn8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4spj69pr1chh2bs) Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | _Online Development_ Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

name: Steve Scalise
subject: I'm sorry. Truly, I am
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don’t donate.

I am genuinely sorry, Friend.
Really, I am.
I am sorry some folks threaten to remove you from the GOP if you don't donate.
I am sorry some folks masquerade as President Trump to try and fool you.
I am sorry some folks don't even thank you for donating.
It is enough to drive you nuts. And I completely understand how you feel because I get the same messages. I'll get bombarded with texts and emails asking me for money but it's hard to tell who sends them all.
And if I do pitch in a few bucks, I'd probably get pestered even more - without any acknowledgement of my contribution.
It's wrong, and I'm doing things differently.
This is Steve Scalise. First of all, I want to personally thank you for everything you've done to help elect President Trump and Republicans thus far. [You are the lifeblood of the MAGA movement - and we only won with your hard work and support.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlptvlb7a1km84clphcc12mte5imiaokhjqafiu8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4spj69pr1chh2bs)
Thank you for having the grit and determination to stand up to the Democrat Machine at the height of its power.
Unfortunately, the Democrats have regrouped faster than anyone thought possible.
They're ALREADY unloading 50 million dollars into enough battleground districts to flip the House. They're ALREADY dragging President Trump into court.
[In other words, we really need some more support right now to keep fighting.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlnnfk4269ibcjmjcdroa4i07011bg82th00vqio_rp22sh2s8i6eor4spj69pr1chh2bs)
If you can't afford to pitch right now, that's okay. I won't hold it against you. Take care of your family first. I won't question your Party loyalty or shame you for not donating.
BUT if you can contribute - even if it's just a few bucks - it would go a long way. Especially right now.
We have no choice but to hit our end-of-month goal. Because if we fail, the Democrat Machine will crush us in every battleground district, barge back into power, and effectively BLOCKADE President Trump's entire legislative agenda.
[So I am sorry I even have to ask you this, but can you please pitch in before our first 2026 deadline?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z60saf6mr8gapf5kpspdne0ssl93bftmhqk7u8no_rp22sh2s8i6eor4spj69pr1chh2bs)
It would mean a great deal to me personally if you'd be willing to help.[IF YOU CAN, PLEASE PITCH IN HERE
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkea13dtgi16p1f1ns3elk3r8f959s6fg8m39rk8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4spj69pr1chh2bs)Either way, thanks for all you do. I mean that from the bottom of my heart.
God bless you, - Steve
STEVE SCALISEHouse Majority Leader
* * *
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd7gtke9kgfimdeae27se8j7aloromhbf6eco2s0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4spj69pr1chh2bs)We have spent weeks vetting and verifying the most committed MAGA Patriots from every corner of America.
The MAGA Roster is nearly full, don't miss your chance to have your name on it![CLAIM YOUR SPOT
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z02hm2s02gv7b60cbca02nk9rq1jg3farqpfq7l8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4spj69pr1chh2bs)In just 30 minutes, this portal will be locked and shared with President Trump's team.
This roster is reserved for the fiercest defenders of the MAGA movement. Those who are ready to help President Trump and Republicans ring in the Golden Age of America.| | |
---
| | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.
---

# **[How To Get Married: Charlie and Erika's Joint Q&A;](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/2XVvUREH-PgDtj8FfcGTuA)**
---
Do men ever have truly platonic female friends? Is it worth dating people with political and religious differences? What are the real ways for a woman to attract a man, and vice versa? subject: Take your National Quiz on the Constitution Today
body:
Far too many Americans do not know the meaning and purpose of the U.S. Constitution.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7ontauhvr28o5pft3sg2sqc1hch8gjvfq4i5sa8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4spgmcpj2clh2bs)

| | Dear Friend,

Far too many Americans do not know the meaning and purpose of the U.S. Constitution.

To help address this problem, Hillsdale College created the **[National Quiz on the U.S. Constitution](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu11nmp79jimp5bmb17l31d6ahmdo2t8its6f6v8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4spgmcpj2clh2bs).**

It's short, enjoyable, and revealing.

**Take your quiz here:**

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/constitution-quiz](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpj5qh74tmspef7hbe2rcj1qjbhh37og5dea5v5g_rp22sh2s8i6eor4spgmcpj2clh2bs)

Good luck with your quiz!

Bill Gray, '01

Hillsdale College

# IN YOUR WEEKLY BULLETIN:
---
|
---
| |

When government priorities drift out of alignment with reality, the consequences show up everywhere — at the gas pump, in classrooms, and in public trust itself. This week’s _Sunday Bulletin_ examines what happens when high taxes fail to deliver results, political money reshapes state power, and institutions struggle to keep pace with the consequences of their own decisions.
**INVESTIGATIVE:** Pennsylvania drivers are paying some of the highest gas taxes in the nation — yet roads and bridges continue to rank among the worst. Our reporting breaks down where the money goes, why infrastructure outcomes lag despite billions in revenue, and what structural choices may be driving inefficiency rather than improvement.
**POLITICS:** EMILYs List has named Pennsylvania a top target in its $15 million 2026 State Power Plan, aiming to lock in Democratic control by recruiting and backing female candidates up and down the ballot. The announcement signals how national organizations are increasingly shaping state-level power — and raises questions about how outside money will influence local governance.
**REGIONAL NEWS:** From a second reported sexual assault in Upper Dublin to a sudden death that shook the North Penn EMS community, this week’s regional coverage reflects the gravity and unpredictability of events confronting communities across southeastern Pennsylvania.
**FROM THE EDITORS:** Following Supreme Court arguments on Title IX, the Great Valley School District now faces a federal civil rights investigation. The case highlights the growing tension between national legal battles and local school policies — and the consequences districts face when those conflicts reach Washington.
**OPINION & ANALYSIS:** Our columnists weigh in on Pennsylvania’s fractured local government structure and why rising costs and institutional complexity continue to frustrate voters looking for practical solutions.
---

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1924, the [first Winter Olympics](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2uGyEURlfDdFhwgbEpKNJM57QpRxgunhvxYwGy491Hfm8Jr_6k7-icP9f96ilTvf_2Bd1Mba_4GhnnxL4XPwY98UV1Yh-z9VKoVhxtBwErF5KD2aOn_N71El1CBFQLOnlerVIWlFoOF3W4WeGNAAkotb4po1eD3q-3S5LRLOQ-b0KCkVKcpTypgPFiLSYV5GogMS0w0mz99LdRnQem_G5P7KfQypLdMedjMPWLwcZgm1TwMzDYtLXKADDYEvUx-bcHb_ldHhQGlxY0D4cvrdI_nrqvARlsS3fx8aKcaaxnpsW9eMpfrPmjQE8H_wMAAP__kf15wA) took place in Chamonix, France, lasting 11 days. Sixteen countries participated in 16 events, including figure skating, speed skating, hockey, curling, and bobsledding. The CB radio, once the realm of truckers swapping highway intel, moved into the mainstream in the 1970s, allowing everyday folks to take part in the romance of the road. The fascination faded after a few years, as shown in today's _[Whatever Happened To...](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwyAUQOGnwVssuAS7DAxtJU9N146ImItzW34iQLby9lX6Ch3P8g3n62IvjiLl7dMlND0Um_FoEXvHapNrjXY8KHesrZeaEuWMrVjgMJ24OIGy3lF82PPgTUAElAMaMU9aSg1SDjejrrPSyPU6eZRKrwpV0EJz5dwVOeiBzFPjApQQfBZilCv6F60xyFVMCgI7c_TUSx2_C-V-wxAfZcc6riUN0dx6vzcmXxksDBbM40E_dEdPbix1Y7A8m8HyQa3bEuz7m23R5W2oxt8PipHaNLMz35Kj-Gf2f43YDfwGAAD__3mhcxk)_ segment. ## Massive Winter Storm Surges Across U.S.
A massive winter storm [continued its trek across the U.S.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL9ugzAQxp8GNiL7fIYweOiSLV07oot9DtcaHGErNG9fkVfo-OmTvj-_r-t0JUmy3j9pYVdjnlbeS-JaeZsWKkWevMtaeSs1b8si68olT6Cg75TuwE6BJL0mbIOLzMCmZaeHfjRmBGPa2Q1-JB9ZnZF8vN2MwYhnQASFChH6VtyRpjRYrdWg9cl4Dudx5Gi87i3EBhUHqXk7fWdZ68wxvfKTt5PPS5vcXOujNOajgUsDF3ocBw7rEFsVn7iBy3t9V_mXSpd_Es15oU48d2XNe0cj-jFoa3ttjTFkFesBCcMQLEav282Fxy4pSemHBtV9IUnv-vovZk8HfwEAAP__vjB_gA) on Saturday, threatening to knock out power and cause catastrophic ice accumulations. The storm[ is expected to keep dangerously cold air](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1utDAQxvHTQDfIH8C-FC7ehiLSpk2JJnjMOjKele3F4fbRbo6QCzx6fv-P63JFH3zc3nEnUxwvkWoOVAqlZcec_UHVx0IpF0777mOkzIsSagQhQQ2LRR_OpW-tcUSKdEtGXsZJ60lp3d6MtbIfBkQ1oBMkiazundBOaiH6T9m33jzXhFSDlOIiZadXsv-miZxe5Tgo1_SCrC-cui_2sdzIhZMPSt3KexvMrZR7bvT_Rs2NmmutXWTEbuOjUfNT06jZYtwo8SPDG8YHphNegl8ZvGhA3yXRTrBysMARKp7gOEHAtBHcORXPEdjBI7fJ2Hv1Ifg8XppebDv68LpT_tTwMOonAAD__60uiN4) over more than half the U.S. through the weekend, with snow, ice, and frigid temperatures raising risks of power outages and lingering icy roads. Areas [at the center of the storm](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O6yAQBeCnwR0WDDaOC4rbuMttt7SwPcSs-IlgFJS3Xzn7CNuNNNI5-s7Xfb1bH3x6_LcRDbm8Jmw1IBGWNdpa_QubT4SlUi4x-pSw5hUEaC4kh3E9rA_vdegO4xABVYdGTnpWagalutNILY4RlRzm0W3TuIl9s9pZ1AJuA6LuvLnShIRRSjFJ2asdj9s8o1O71CM4Ngg8POXSf2ef6EQX3vmFpd9z7II5iZ6VqX8MFgZLa63ft3oprj-D5ToZLDXlxj8I7nLB3Vbi0T4r_-XxhpZOLAyWrpjj2XwIvuqJDeIRrQ-fMvrTQi8DPwEAAP__m8V86A), including parts of Kentucky and Virginia, could see as much as two feet of snow between Saturday and Monday. Major cities, including New York City, Boston, and Oklahoma City, could see between 12 and 18 inches of snow. Airlines [canceled nearly 13,000 flights](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAQRp_GdCB7DCYULrahy7ZbIseMw6z8E9mjoLz9FXmF2410pDM637_7dncUKT__uoSWQ9kyni0iM9YtudbojSdlxtq41JQoZ2xlAwmml6qHadsdxc82drsNiIC6Q6tms2i9gNbdYY3zDkcwswQZ5ARKSTUZHPFm3EOrW0f2skkFk1JyVmrQHvfbsmDQXpkJghgl7sSlDv8LZT4wxE95Yx18SV20B_OrCf1HwCpgPc9z8PnhLyhgvdQCVqmuW1_8G9N_a_qANfch0vPg3rvsMUbHVHIbDk6xq3Z_nRQjNTOLUT6To_h9yr9a6m3hJwAA__9Lq3yn) this weekend due to snow, ice, high winds, and bitter cold, prompting carriers to waive change and cancellation fees nationwide.
## Iran Cautions U.S. After Warship Buildup
The commander of Iran’s paramilitary Revolutionary Guard on Saturday warned that his force is [“more ready than ever, finger on the trigger,”](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHO4yAQhJ_G7hzBYkwoKK5Jl2uvtAgsyZ4wWLBxlLc_-V7hL0cjjeb7_tzXu6dM5fnbb-g41bXgp2dkxrZuvnc68EOFsXWubduoFOx1BQHLJOQEeo2e8nedx-gSIqAa0UmzWKUsKDW-XDRaw2OOmBRGlRIoOVsBaE2UFh9mJHeuCQlaSmGkvKiA8WotJhXkoiENs8BIXNvlb6XCL0z5Ww9sl1C3MbsX894H9WuA2wA3v58AZ3WGxhQyDnCj5su0t8rYuU_c3ts-NTxqfjPV4tt3er59i5PQ9uG1flxRLjZqk6y5pqCChhCi0H5sLu4fypn6YoZZPDdP-f8R_pG9w8G_AAAA__8dCIUV) as U.S. warships head toward the Middle East. Tension remains high between Iran and the U.S. in the wake of a bloody crackdown on protests that began on Dec. 28, triggered by the collapse of Iran’s currency, and swept the country for about two weeks. President Trump has said [an American “armada” is heading toward the Middle East](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u5CAQhE-DMyxo_PMcEGzi7G26odXPNHaP-BkBM9bcfuW9woZVKlWVvj_f2zdy4HT8xki2-bwlumqg1qhsEWvlN12cGpXacomRU6KaN1AwSaUljJtDDp9t6Jz1RECmI6vnaTFmAWO602oHGsDrWc1m0Gb68V4Nu_saBzVM44_p2N5tSsOotZq17s1O7mtZyJtdTyN4MShy3HLpH5lTO8mHT35T6fccu2DP1p5VmF8CVgHrdV19O-l4YXGM6c7cbi7BCVjvJQHrA9MtjIC1lVd8yoqfKl9VYonoUJ6EjtMhIzsXSBLWJrlgko6wnbLlELpi3fPiELhOsxjUEZHDv0ftvzC-LfwNAAD__zoPh1M) and that the U.S. is monitoring Iran closely. Weeks of anti-government protests in Iran have resulted in more than 3,300 deaths following clashes with Iran’s security forces.

But how much do we know about the man this day is named after? The story of how a Christian priest named Valentinus inspired this holiday begins with soldiering, marriage, and a cold-hearted emperor. During the third century, the Roman emperor Claudius II (also called “Claudius the Cruel”) struggled to recruit soldiers as they were required to fight for at least 25 years. Many young men were unwilling to leave their loved ones, so Claudius banned all marriages and engagements. In response, couples went underground with the help of Valentinus, who secretly married soldiers to their betrothed. Eventually, Valentinus was caught and condemned for treason. He was beaten with clubs and killed on February 14 around the year 269. More than 200 years later, Pope Gelasius established the holiday on February 14 to honor the courageous faith of Valentinus. **Special Offer:** Share this inspiring story with your children. **Whatever happened to CB radio?** In the mid-’70s, citizens band radio (CB) felt like the internet you could hold in your hand. For the price of a rig and an antenna, anyone could join the chatter—no operator, no long distance, no permission. It started for practical reasons: truckers swapping road intel, weather warnings, and bear reports in real time. Then America discovered the romance—handles, call signs, and a rolling fraternity stitched together by Channel 19. Pop culture poured gasoline on it. Movies like _Convoy_ helped [fuel a trucker-song boom](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFq8zAUBeCnkbcYS7Ita9DwQ8jw0xTaDoEuQrau41skK0g3Nnn7ko5du34HzoFzOduzw4Dr9dVFMDQnu8JeAhBBttGVghvsuBLkQinHiOsKJVnRiP7Q8IPorHcYHratvJkBBMgKDFe9llILKavFuLkZlFRKj-3Yq3Fw49SCBzcO2mvQfYXm2dZw0XHeKM5rOYEftIZZTrzvxMzaBjxSyvVXwpUWmMMjbZDrKcUqmIXoVpj8x8SJidO-7_Uj3ek-wjN_iqNpYfK0MXn88N3ny__LWyyFiT5gISaP77-4kMtks_OYmDzyKht_2zEELL1ibXONDsPPNv3psM2I7wAAAP__NiSAAA), and endless “breaker breaker” and “10-4” catchphrases turned CB into a national inside joke—part rebellion, part neighborliness, part performance. For a few years, the airwaves were crowded with good-natured chaos and [CB slang terms](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwyAUQOGnwVssuAS7DAxtJU9N146ImItzW34iQLby9lX6Ch3P8g3n62IvjiLl7dMlND0Um_FoEXvHapNrjXY8KHesrZeaEuWMrVjgMJ24OIGy3lF82PPgTUAElAMaMU9aSg1SDjejrrPSyPU6eZRKrwpV0EJz5dwVOeiBzFPjApQQfBZilCv6F60xyFVMCgI7c_TUSx2_C-V-wxAfZcc6riUN0dx6vzcmXxksDBbM40E_dEdPbix1Y7A8m8HyQa3bEuz7m23R5W2oxt8PipHaNLMz35Kj-Gf2f43YDfwGAAD__3mhcxk): late-night laughs, flirtation, tall tales, and the small thrill of being heard by strangers you’d never meet. It made loneliness feel temporary. And then it thinned out. The novelty wore off, interference and noise piled up, and newer, clearer tools arrived—cell phones for direct calls, later the internet for wireless communities that didn’t fade at the county line. CB didn’t die so much as shrink back to its roots. Truckers still use it, off-roaders still rely on it, and hobbyists still chase that warm hiss and sudden voice from nowhere. Today, the craze lives mostly as nostalgia: chrome microphones, whip antennas, and a slang dictionary that instantly time-travels you to a dashboard at dusk. Key up, listen, and for a second, the 1970s answer back. _Have you used a CB radio while driving down the highway? Let us know your experience by replying to this email._

But how much do we know about the man this day is named after? The story of how a Christian priest named Valentinus inspired this holiday begins with soldiering, marriage, and a cold-hearted emperor. During the third century, the Roman emperor Claudius II (also called “Claudius the Cruel”) struggled to recruit soldiers as they were required to fight for at least 25 years. Many young men were unwilling to leave their loved ones, so Claudius banned all marriages and engagements. In response, couples went underground with the help of Valentinus, who secretly married soldiers to their betrothed. Eventually, Valentinus was caught and condemned for treason. () | Whatever happened to CB radio? In the mid-’70s, citizens band radio (CB) felt like the internet you could hold in your hand. For the price of a rig and an antenna, anyone could join the chatter—no operator, no long distance, no permission. It started for practical reasons: truckers swapping road intel, weather warnings, and bear reports in real time. Then America discovered the romance—handles, call signs, and a rolling fraternity stitched together by Channel 19. Pop culture poured gasoline on it. Movies like Convoy helped , and endless “breaker breaker” and “10-4” catchphrases turned CB into a national inside joke—part rebellion, part neighborliness, part performance. For a few years, the airwaves were crowded with good-natured chaos and : late-night laughs, flirtation, tall tales, and the small thrill of being heard by strangers you’d never meet. It made loneliness feel temporary. And then it thinned out. The novelty wore off, interference and noise piled up, and newer, clearer tools arrived—cell phones for direct calls, later the internet for wireless communities that didn’t fade at the county line. CB didn’t die so much as shrink back to its roots. Truckers still use it, off-roaders still rely on it, and hobbyists still chase that warm hiss and sudden voice from nowhere. Today, the craze lives mostly as nostalgia: chrome microphones, whip antennas, and a slang dictionary that instantly time-travels you to a dashboard at dusk. Key up, listen, and for a second, the 1970s answer back. Have you used a CB radio while driving down the highway? name: High Alert:
subject: Important Notice: Meat Warning
body:
Massive food hoarding warning
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1142564/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvVkh2cXh1RzVnbg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjU/LbmNsYmdCU2FuMw/qP2hpZHM9bmM0WkxTNzlNaFlXOGFscw/gaXX87Q/s8j51b9554b)

**HIGH ALERT: Shocking Meat Shortages Are Coming – Prepare Now** [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1142564/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazIwLmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjU/LbmNsYmdCU2FuMw/qP3RydmlkPTE0NjY0JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVNTS0xODMwLTIwMjYwMTI1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1VTU0tMTgzMC0yMDI2MDEyNQ/gaXX87Q/sen360bcafe) **The USDA predicts meat production shortages for the first time since 2014, and the U.N. warns of "an unprecedented global hunger crisis".** Which means 2 dangerous things for you: 1\. Higher prices at the grocery store
2\. Less meat available That's why meat must be a vital part of your survival food stockpile. But there is a catch. Not all protein is created equal. And this is so critical to understand, especially in a crisis. See, your protein needs to meet 4 critical requirements: It needs to:
* Last a while
* Taste great
* Store without refrigeration
* Can't break the bank

**Spoiler alert: most protein options fall short!** Take peanut butter. Sure, most people see it as a survival food protein staple. But did you know most cans are full of added sugars? Plus, they don't last more than a few months. A year tops. Grocery store meat doesn't work either. First, it's expensive. If you've been to the grocery store recently, you know what I'm talking about. Meat prices are up big time over the past year. But it also needs to be refrigerated. So if a blackout hits and cuts power to your home, you might as well use it as a paperweight. But don't worry friend. **There is a protein option that checks all four boxes:**
* This option is guaranteed to last at least 5 years.
* It doesn't need to be refrigerated.
* And it come with an easy payment plan so it won't break the bank.
* And most importantly, it tastes delicious!

**Introducing for the first time ever...** [**The BRAND NEW Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit!**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1142564/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazIwLmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjU/LbmNsYmdCU2FuMw/qP3RydmlkPTE0NjY0JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVNTS0xODMwLTIwMjYwMTI1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1VTU0tMTgzMC0yMDI2MDEyNQ/gaXX87Q/sen360bcafe) [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1142564/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazIwLmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjU/LbmNsYmdCU2FuMw/qP3RydmlkPTE0NjY0JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVNTS0xODMwLTIwMjYwMTI1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1VTU0tMTgzMC0yMDI2MDEyNQ/gaXX87Q/sen360bcafe) **YES! ORDER TODAY AND GET 9 FREE GIFTS WORTH $137.86 WITH THIS EXCLUSIVE BONUS PACKAGE!!**
* **FREE Gift #1:** NEW & Improved 72-Hour Survival Food Kit ($29.00 Value)
* **FREE Gift #2:** NEW & Improved 72-Hour Survival Food Kit ($29.00 Value)
* **FREE Gift #3:** Ultimate Meat Medley Cookbook ($9.95 Value)
* **FREE Gift #4:** FREE Report: Top 10 Items Sold Out After a Crisis ($4.99 Value)
* **FREE Gift #5:** FREE Report: The Survival Garden Guide ($4.99 Value)
* **FREE Gift #6:** FREE Report: How to Cut Your Grocery Bills in Half ($4.99 Value)
* **FREE Gift #7:** FREE Report: The Water Survival Guide ($4.99 Value)
* **FREE Gift #8:** $25.00 OFF Your Next Purchase ($25.00 Value)
* **FREE Gift #9:** Shipping & Handling ($24.95 Value)
* **Total Savings & Bonus Package Value: $137.86!**
* **_And YES! There's also an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!_**

[**ACT FAST: $177 TODAY,
SHIPS TOMORROW!**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1142564/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazIwLmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjU/LbmNsYmdCU2FuMw/qP3RydmlkPTE0NjY0JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVNTS0xODMwLTIwMjYwMTI1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1VTU0tMTgzMC0yMDI2MDEyNQ/gaXX87Q/sen360bcafe) Now, there is one thing you should know. Every time we've offered meat in the past, we've SOLD OUT. So when people find out about this brand-NEW Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit, we could see a huge rush. I don't want to alarm you, but there are no IOUs or rain checks on this meat kit. It's first-come, first-served. So if you're going to reserve your kit, **[you need to act fast](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1142564/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazIwLmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjU/LbmNsYmdCU2FuMw/qP3RydmlkPTE0NjY0JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVNTS0xODMwLTIwMjYwMTI1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1VTU0tMTgzMC0yMDI2MDEyNQ/gaXX87Q/sen360bcafe)**. For starters, you get 5 meat options. Chicken, beef, pork, turkey and ground beef. So you aren't stuck with 1 or 2 types of protein. And the variety means you can use it in a ton of recipes. Chicken salad, burgers, tacos, you name it. **You're in control, not the stock boy at the grocery store.** Plus, you can actually pronounce the ingredients that we use. That's because there are only 2. Meat, of course, and salt for preservation. That's it! No funky chemicals. No artificial gunk. The only things in your food are food. [**ACT FAST: $177 TODAY,
SHIPS TOMORROW!**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1142564/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazIwLmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjU/LbmNsYmdCU2FuMw/qP3RydmlkPTE0NjY0JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVNTS0xODMwLTIwMjYwMTI1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1VTU0tMTgzMC0yMDI2MDEyNQ/gaXX87Q/sen360bcafe) Now, you may be wondering how we guarantee such a long shelf life for canned foods. It comes from our special, old-fashioned retort canning process. **We use small-batch retorts to cook your meat right inside the can.** That means 2 important things. First, your meat is slow cooked, so it retains all its natural juices and flavor. And it's ready to go right out of the can. And second, it kills off any germs in the can that might harm the shelf life. Sometimes, the old-fashioned way is the right way. And guess what? This is all done right here in the US of A. Our survival meats are home raised here in the states. So you know exactly where your food comes from. **And as a family-owned, American business, we take a lot of pride in that.** [**ACT FAST: $177 TODAY,
SHIPS TOMORROW!**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1142564/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazIwLmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjU/LbmNsYmdCU2FuMw/qP3RydmlkPTE0NjY0JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVNTS0xODMwLTIwMjYwMTI1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1VTU0tMTgzMC0yMDI2MDEyNQ/gaXX87Q/sen360bcafe) Look friend, there's no better time to claim your Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit than now. Meat is one of the first things to go in a crisis. Wildfires, hurricanes, cyberattacks or something else. And the last thing I want for you is to miss out. Or worse, leave you and your family stuck with a subpar protein option. Here at 4Patriots, our mission is to champion freedom and self-reliance for all Americans. **And with everything going on in the world, it's clear that survival food is no longer a luxury. It's a necessity.** Ask anyone who's lived through a crisis. There's no warning. You won't see a big billboard that says "emergency coming in 5 days! Stock up before then." Disasters come out of nowhere. And if you aren't prepared when it hits, it's too late. I mean, just imagine standing in line at your local supermarket. Shelves picked bare. And the people who didn't prepare scrambling and hoarding what little food they can find. All while you pray there's a sliver of meat left for you and your family. **This doesn't have to be you, friend. You can choose a different path.** When storms come knocking at your door, you can stay safely inside with your loved ones. You'll feel great knowing you and your family have delicious shelf-stable meat ready to go. And trust me, the peace of mind that comes with that, feels incredible. [**ACT FAST: $177 TODAY,
SHIPS TOMORROW!**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1142564/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazIwLmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjU/LbmNsYmdCU2FuMw/qP3RydmlkPTE0NjY0JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVNTS0xODMwLTIwMjYwMTI1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1VTU0tMTgzMC0yMDI2MDEyNQ/gaXX87Q/sen360bcafe) [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1142564/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazIwLmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjU/LbmNsYmdCU2FuMw/qP3RydmlkPTE0NjY0JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVNTS0xODMwLTIwMjYwMTI1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1VTU0tMTgzMC0yMDI2MDEyNQ/gaXX87Q/sen360bcafe) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we are able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. Meat Survival Food Kits!** [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1142564/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazIwLmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjU/LbmNsYmdCU2FuMw/qP3RydmlkPTE0NjY0JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVNTS0xODMwLTIwMjYwMTI1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1VTU0tMTgzMC0yMDI2MDEyNQ/gaXX87Q/sen360bcafe) **_Joseph L._**_
"I buy a lot of stuff at Wal-mart, but this is gonna out-do the stuff on Wal-mart shelves, which contains all kinds of preservatives. I did a taste test even though I've never found a bad product from 4Patriots. Hamburger Helper can kiss my butt – this stuff here is good! (Maybe not as good as my wife's cooking.) This is a good buy."_ _**Danielle M.
4Patriots Employee**
"I was surprised at how good everything in the Ultimate Meat Medley really was. As an avid cook, I have high standards; I worried it might be salty or dried out. What I discovered was moist chicken and turkey that shreds easily for the fastest chicken salad ever or super fast BBQ turkey sammies. name: Troy Downing
subject: I hate to say it, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I thought there were more Patriots like you out there who'd be willing to take a stand with me.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-g)Peter,

I hate to say it, but we missed our critical 2025 fundraising goal.

I thought there were more Patriots like you out there who'd be willing to take a stand with me. But the response has been deafening silence.
My name is Troy Downing, and I'm a combat veteran, a Christian, a husband, and a proud dad. I'm also a GOP freshman on a mission to put America First.
As you know, Democrats will stop at nothing to stand in the way of President Trump’s agenda – including shutting down the government.
They’re also throwing millions into battleground races nationwide to flip our razor-thin House Majority and take control.
I have to face the facts: If we don't defend every single seat in 2026, our conservative Majority will be lost, and President Trump's agenda will be over.
I'm not looking for a handout or a huge donation. I just need a small contribution from Patriots like you to keep my campaign afloat.
If I can defend this critical House seat, it'll be a crushing defeat for the radical Left. But I need your help to make it happen.
[Will you stand with me and chip in a few bucks to help a combat vet take down the Democrat machine?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-g7-UONqkbiGThw)[YES – I’M IN!
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Your support would be a godsend.

Sincerely,
Troy DowningConservative Veteran| |
