| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | A law Congress passed is starting to make its presence felt... | And that’s VERY bad news for retirees. Even the Wall Street Journal had to admit that the law... “Upends 20 Years of Retirement Planning and STICKS It to the Middle Class.” What does that mean for you? It’s time to find out... ## Power Outages around the State
Thousands of North Texas [residents woke up without power](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGO5CAQRL_GznoEmDE4cHDJZHvphVYbmjE6bCzoXXb-_uRJ7gM2K-lJT6qqPx_LB8YUj-dv3Gnm75CXg1pNxExl4S1_Vjx8PXOjkqhWV7L7S7wooUYQEtR98RjTa9G9n1fhJ9nTLM04DVppO_Tb7HEUwRg_CS30SGoNxq4OrTFuCjbYPs6XTEh1l0pIpW5Oaj1p5ycrjEQ5dFqQj5zLjTdi-sYa0it_Ubm5vPdp3pjP2g2_OvXo1KO1dmsB8YKdemDh6BJdgJA3Kv8TxP1Ex516eEwJK7zdEHJhaLnwBvlwuUD-ZHxShfcIsOMJhSrnghzzAR53fF5-ZQ3o4O9hsAirkXfQZp0AkSx4qYIfw2qDG_sy-7PFlGIdTafFc8eY3lX4Zwd8zepfAAAA___Gn5vy) on Saturday as a winter storm moved through the region. More than 14,000 North Texas homes lost power during the storm, prompting Oncor to deploy about 10,000 personnel and contractors to address weather-related outages. Nearly 36,000 lost power in East Texas. See which counties were the most impacted by the storm [here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAQhZ8Gd1gwDP4pKLZxd7fd0sIwidGSEMFcO3n7VdLsA9z2HOnofN-fr_XLp5zu19_-Ro6fl7Le6WyZmKmuvJfv5u-xPcpJNVNroZbwl3gFBYNUWoJdo0_5tWIX3abirDtyehxmg4CT6XZnjZ1wuthJK2WMITJ-M1sYR9qihdF0yb3HlAarQWmAPmjEGUOcJzVqr41ARTFxqT3vxPT07ZJf5aDah3LrstuZH02YXwIWAct5nn3Ymp57PgQsvnIKmd4Fed6pClgaHVRJ_g8-eLJ8s79SE7BYpaXBgKgRpLcDSgzGyMkOSk5qVtGD17Olrrr4OFPOqQ2jQHW9-ZQ_r_hnLg8H_wIAAP__WViExw). The Electric Reliability Council of Texas also offers a real-time look at power usage [here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO6yAQgOHT4C4WDMSOC4rXuMtrt7QwM8Qo2EQwG5Lbr7JX2PqXvuL_ui5XF1M8bv_dTpZfIS8HtZqImcrCW_6u7sD6yI1Kolp9yf5OvICE4STVCc4Lupjei-nQrhIn1ZFV4zBpA-aiu82OQ8AgndYyoKH1gnolUjicHRkzouyi_WBSwVmBVAC9V8ZMxuN0kaNySgsjCSPn0vNGTC9XQ3rnJ5Xe571LdmN-VKH_CZgFzK21norP_KkC5luJuN85HiELmNHVbc2uYO2KxUeLKcU6jMLI2-5i-hX5bx-eFn4CAAD__7Wkc4w). Much of the state will be experiencing freezing temperatures and precipitation through the weekend and into Monday.
## Rep. Cuellar's Brother Indicted
Webb County Sheriff Martin Cuellar Jr., brother of Democrat Rep. Henry Cuellar, [was indicted](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OgzAQBOCngc7IXsxf4eIaulx7JTL2ElYxGNmbkLz9iXuFq0cazTc_t-lmKdB-_7YbGn4vcdrxzAGZMU28xme2u89HPDEFzNml6B7IE0hohVQCmslbCp9Jl97M0g-qRKO6dqg16L4uV-MQbedV0zeq72TT2A6WudWoaiXn2vmSzFUmFTQKpAKonNJ60M4PveyUVXWhJXrimCpekfFt8xI-8YWpcnErg1mZj1zUXwWMBYzneVZLfF-KKy9gPGIgJpcLGDk9tyOLwyYfd3HpUHjchHtiCDaJ2bqHoF3kI3Kg-8piTpFXTGKxDrOg3ZPjDXcuk_HHSSFQbrtCy_tmKfwN4v_d-DLwGwAA___OjYsC) for allegedly using public funds, staff, and resources to support a disinfecting business during COVID-19. According to the indictment, Cuellar Jr. and his assistant Alejandro Gutierrez started Disinfect Pro Master in April 2020 and secured several contracts, though they had no employees or supplies. The company secured a [$500,000 contract](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuOnjAUhJ_GdEb2wdwKF2noNm1K5Mvhx4qxf9mHZXn7iJXyBNuNNJ9mRvPnY_0wIYb0-m0O1PS15TXhVSMSYVlpz2c1ydd3vrBErNWV7P4irSBg4EJy6FdvQrxX1XhthZ9lg1qOw9wpUFPX7NqLzRs7SgtqEHaDyfjZzbaf0Ku-6-cm6CdMSOglCAnQOqnUrJyfJzFKIzumBPpAubS0I-GXqVu88yeW1uWjiXonelfW_WKwMFiu62q_ISrBngnbXF4MlqeDwSLko-Hh0Fru8pno5nXHEraNH6ZQSNydGKMpPCQfHKHn0RT0me-Yyv3fZbA0Rfv3FWIMdRiZEq_DhPg9in525aeGfwEAAP__kn6JuA) to clean Laredo-area schools, but used department staff and resources to complete the work. Cuellar faces up to 10 years in prison for charges related to conspiracy and theft of federal funds, and 10 more for money laundering. The indictment comes [two months](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ8GOiPbGAiFi7-hy99eiRzvOljnYLReQvL2J6J7gytHmvk0M1_X-epiiuv9v3ug5VfI84pHSciMNPOS9-JWKFs-kBKW4in7b-RZS90LqYTuZnAxvWdTg71JGFWNVg392BptLm292KE3g0bX-Xb0PrQQjOyMCnDx0HVjH-poT5hUulNaKq0br4wZjYfxIgflVFsZiRA5U8MLMr5cCemdn0iNz4862YV5K1X7r9JTpafjOJri_E6EK5-OSk_npEpPn6z4FbsognATC670Fn7HlBwVcaPMC5KIK0TPCCKvIiAguSQCuR2EXxzd8UTUZGE7Ykqx9ENl5P3hYvqU4r9d-bT6JwAA__-fEYtk) after U.S. Rep. Henry Cuellar and his wife received a presidential pardon for their federal bribery charges.
## Astros FanFest 2026
The Houston Astros [officially kicked off](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO6yAQheGnwV0sGAg2BcVt3OW2W1oTM47RYhPBbEjefpXVvsFWpzjSV_wfl_mCMcXj9h938vxc83xQq4mYqcy85a-KR6j33KgkqnUpefkknkGCPUl1gvMcMKbXbLrgrzI41ZFXg3XagBl1t_khrJbCaAOa8xi0G7Uz6KxW18VYNGsX_RuTCs4KpALoF2WMM0twoxwUKi2MpBA5l543YnpiXdMrP6j0S9675DfmexX6n4BJwNRa6_d0fX8CJqxcchUwrXj8zkqVu-LDvcWUYrWDMPK2Y0w_HP8twsPDdwAAAP__fehxFg) the 2026 season with FanFest on Saturday, despite the threat of poor weather. Fans met current and retired players, got autographs, and had the chance to see the World Series and American League Championship Series trophies. Other activities included walking the bases, taking swings in a batting cage, and throwing in the bullpen. Many [current Astros](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2uozAQBeCnMZ2RPTj8FC62obvbbokmeLhYMRh5JiG8_Sq7j3DrI3065_z5mr4wprh__8aNvLyXPO10ciIRKpOs-cm4Bz7ySSUR81zy_CCZwECrjdVwmwLGdE2uCv5uwmAr8rZrh8aB65tq9WBN298aXAJYCqaFbllM59oQmq5HC1X0H8xYuFkwFqCerXODm8PQm86ibZQzFKLkUstKQm_kJV35RaWe81Ylv4ocrJpfCkYF43meNcdPpGDc0l3BiCwls4Ix7xwVjJ-FCsZ5LZEl4q5PTA8qOjLirA8sFIj1drFQifnJ6dJ4Z9pF_5f0grteiKUqPhxnTCly2ylnvjeM6V8r-dmXLw9_AwAA__9SF4t0) were present, including second baseman Jose Altuve, outfielder Yordan Alvarez, and third baseman Carlos Correa. Some players, like Isaac Paredes and Christian Walker, weren't at FanFest, as both players are likely to be traded to other teams. The [Texas Rangers](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOszAQBOCnMR3IXgyYwsXf0OVvr0QbewnWGRzZe3Hy9qfkFa4e6dPMfF3WC4YYztt_PMjyc0vrSbVEYqa88p5-Cp6-3FOlHKkUl5P7Jl5BwthK1cKwegzxterG26v0s2rIqmmcew3a9M1ucTYGQPejHnqFk5EIZsBhUlczOKldE-wbkwoGBVIBdE5pPWvnZyMnhaoXWpIPnHLHOzE9sWzxlR6UO5eOJtqd-V5E_0_AImCptXZHvL4zAct7jIAl43mjXFqHp6PYftpveLYbFW6y9fcaYgxlnISWtwND_ND8t0MeFn4DAAD__6UYc70) also scheduled their FanFest for Saturday, but cancelled the event due to the weather.

On this day in 1834, the first in Texas met at Daniel Parker's home in present-day Anderson County. Find out in today's Et Cetera section how state and local leaders and Kingsville native as he celebrated his 100th birthday. There are just seven days left for you to become an investor in The Flyover. Don't worry--it's simple! . Today's sponsor is , an attorney-powered team that helps timeshare owners cancel their contracts and eliminate costly, unwanted fees so they can finally move on financially. Abilene ❄️ 24/4° | Amarillo ❄️ 19/8° | Austin ❄️ 35/22° | Brownsville 🌧️ 56/44° | Corpus Christi 🌧️ 49/25° | DFW ❄️ 26/15° | El Paso 🌤️ 44/21° | Houston 🌧️ 46/28° | Laredo ☁️ 52/28° | Lubbock ☁️ 25/11° | Midland ☁️ 28/15° | San Antonio ❄️ 40/20° | Tyler ❄️ 29/18° | Waco ❄️ 30/19° Take The Flyover with you. Busy day? Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog--your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Power Outages around the State Thousands of North Texas on Saturday as a winter storm moved through the region. More than 14,000 North Texas homes lost power during the storm, prompting Oncor to deploy about 10,000 personnel and contractors to address weather-related outages. Nearly 36,000 lost power in East Texas. See which counties were the most impacted by the storm . The Electric Reliability Council of Texas also offers a real-time look at power usage . Much of the state will be experiencing freezing temperatures and precipitation through the weekend and into Monday. Rep. Cuellar's Brother Indicted Webb County Sheriff Martin Cuellar Jr., brother of Democrat Rep. Henry Cuellar, for allegedly using public funds, staff, and resources to support a disinfecting business during COVID-19. According to the indictment, Cuellar Jr. and his assistant Alejandro Gutierrez started Disinfect Pro Master in April 2020 and secured several contracts, though they had no employees or supplies. The company secured a to clean Laredo-area schools, but used department staff and resources to complete the work. Cuellar faces up to 10 years in prison for charges related to conspiracy and theft of federal funds, and 10 more for money laundering. The indictment comes after U.S. Rep. Henry Cuellar and his wife received a presidential pardon for their federal bribery charges. Astros FanFest 2026 The Houston Astros the 2026 season with FanFest on Saturday, despite the threat of poor weather. Fans met current and retired players, got autographs, and had the chance to see the World Series and American League Championship Series trophies. Other activities included walking the bases, taking swings in a batting cage, and throwing in the bullpen. Many were present, including second baseman Jose Altuve, outfielder Yordan Alvarez, and third baseman Carlos Correa. Some players, like Isaac Paredes and Christian Walker, weren't at FanFest, as both players are likely to be traded to other teams. The also scheduled their FanFest for Saturday, but cancelled the event due to the weather. | A Different Message for Texas Readers Time is short. This isn’t a typical Flyover announcement. This one is about Texas. We didn’t launch state editions everywhere. We launched Texas first — on purpose. Because Texas is different. Texans are independent, proud, and practical. We don’t want to be talked down to or spoon-fed an agenda from legacy, big-city media. We want facts, context, and common sense — and news media that actually understands this state, from Galveston to Amarillo, El Paso to Marble Falls, Midland to San Marcos, Round Rock to Fort Worth. That’s why we built The Texas Flyover. Built by Texans. For Texans. Our founder, Guy Short, isn’t just building media in Texas — he lives here, in Llano County. Texas isn’t a market. It’s home. And because Texas matters, we’ve invested heavily here. Since opening our investment round and inviting readers to become owners: The Texas Flyover has grown to 415,000+ readers It’s now our largest and most impactful state edition Texas readers are a major driver of The Flyover’s profitability and growth A Personal Ask — Texan to Texan We’re in the final days of this investment round. Before it closes, we’re asking Texas readers first: Will you help us take The Texas Flyover to the next level? Will you help deepen coverage, expand reach, and keep Texas news independent? Will you stand with fellow Texans to build the largest statewide source of unbiased, common-sense Texas news in the country? No corporate spin. No legacy media bias. No celebrity journalists chasing clicks. Just Texas news — written by Texans, for Texans. If you open The Texas Flyover each morning... If you believe Texas deserves news built here, not dictated from elsewhere... If you want to help take 415,000+ Texas readers to 1 million — or more — in 2026... Become an owner. This round closes soon. Once it’s closed, that’s it. | Flying together with our sponsor Most timeshares don’t appreciate — they depreciate. In fact, many are listed for $1 or less on resale sites. Owners who contact The Stonegate Firm are often stunned to learn their so-called “investment” has no real market value. Higher prices at the grocery store
2\. Less meat available That's why meat must be a vital part of your survival food stockpile. But there is a catch. Not all protein is created equal. And this is so critical to understand, especially in a crisis. See, your protein needs to meet 4 critical requirements: It needs to:
* Last a while
* Taste great
* Store without refrigeration
* Can't break the bank

**Spoiler alert: most protein options fall short!** Take peanut butter. Sure, most people see it as a survival food protein staple. But did you know most cans are full of added sugars? Plus, they don't last more than a few months. A year tops. Grocery store meat doesn't work either. First, it's expensive. If you've been to the grocery store recently, you know what I'm talking about. Meat prices are up big time over the past year. But it also needs to be refrigerated. So if a blackout hits and cuts power to your home, you might as well use it as a paperweight. But don't worry friend. **There is a protein option that checks all four boxes:**
* This option is guaranteed to last at least 5 years.
* It doesn't need to be refrigerated.
* And it come with an easy payment plan so it won't break the bank.
* And most importantly, it tastes delicious!

Every time we've offered meat in the past, we've SOLD OUT. So when people find out about this brand-NEW Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit, we could see a huge rush. I don't want to alarm you, but there are no IOUs or rain checks on this meat kit. It's first-come, first-served. So if you're going to reserve your kit, **[you need to act fast](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e143269/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazIyLmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNjAxMjU/LbmNsUnZhdTZwVw/qP3RydmlkPTEzNzU4JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVNTS0yMDE4LTIwMjYwMTI1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1VTU0tMjAxOC0yMDI2MDEyNQ/gaXYZHg/s9k9c31af3f)**. For starters, you get 5 meat options. Chicken, beef, pork, turkey and ground beef. So you aren't stuck with 1 or 2 types of protein. And the variety means you can use it in a ton of recipes. Chicken salad, burgers, tacos, you name it. **You're in control, not the stock boy at the grocery store.** Plus, you can actually pronounce the ingredients that we use. That's because there are only 2. Meat, of course, and salt for preservation. That's it! No funky chemicals. No artificial gunk. The only things in your food are food. [**ACT FAST: $177 TODAY,
SHIPS TOMORROW!**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e143269/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazIyLmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNjAxMjU/LbmNsUnZhdTZwVw/qP3RydmlkPTEzNzU4JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVNTS0yMDE4LTIwMjYwMTI1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1VTU0tMjAxOC0yMDI2MDEyNQ/gaXYZHg/s9k9c31af3f) Now, you may be wondering how we guarantee such a long shelf life for canned foods. It comes from our special, old-fashioned retort canning process. **We use small-batch retorts to cook your meat right inside the can.** That means 2 important things. First, your meat is slow cooked, so it retains all its natural juices and flavor. And it's ready to go right out of the can. And second, it kills off any germs in the can that might harm the shelf life. Sometimes, the old-fashioned way is the right way. And guess what? This is all done right here in the US of A. Our survival meats are home raised here in the states. So you know exactly where your food comes from. **And as a family-owned, American business, we take a lot of pride in that.** [**ACT FAST: $177 TODAY,
SHIPS TOMORROW!**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e143269/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazIyLmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNjAxMjU/LbmNsUnZhdTZwVw/qP3RydmlkPTEzNzU4JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVNTS0yMDE4LTIwMjYwMTI1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1VTU0tMjAxOC0yMDI2MDEyNQ/gaXYZHg/s9k9c31af3f) Look friend, there's no better time to claim your Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit than now. Meat is one of the first things to go in a crisis. Wildfires, hurricanes, cyberattacks or something else. And the last thing I want for you is to miss out. Or worse, leave you and your family stuck with a subpar protein option. Here at 4Patriots, our mission is to champion freedom and self-reliance for all Americans. **And with everything going on in the world, it's clear that survival food is no longer a luxury. It's a necessity.** Ask anyone who's lived through a crisis. There's no warning. You won't see a big billboard that says "emergency coming in 5 days! Stock up before then." Disasters come out of nowhere. And if you aren't prepared when it hits, it's too late. I mean, just imagine standing in line at your local supermarket. Shelves picked bare. And the people who didn't prepare scrambling and hoarding what little food they can find. All while you pray there's a sliver of meat left for you and your family. **This doesn't have to be you, friend. You can choose a different path.** When storms come knocking at your door, you can stay safely inside with your loved ones. You'll feel great knowing you and your family have delicious shelf-stable meat ready to go. And trust me, the peace of mind that comes with that, feels incredible. [**ACT FAST: $177 TODAY,
SHIPS TOMORROW!**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e143269/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazIyLmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNjAxMjU/LbmNsUnZhdTZwVw/qP3RydmlkPTEzNzU4JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVNTS0yMDE4LTIwMjYwMTI1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1VTU0tMjAxOC0yMDI2MDEyNQ/gaXYZHg/s9k9c31af3f) [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e143269/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazIyLmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNjAxMjU/LbmNsUnZhdTZwVw/qP3RydmlkPTEzNzU4JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVNTS0yMDE4LTIwMjYwMTI1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1VTU0tMjAxOC0yMDI2MDEyNQ/gaXYZHg/s9k9c31af3f) To your survival,

Frank Bates

You'll feel great knowing you and your family have delicious shelf-stable meat ready to go. And trust me, the peace of mind that comes with that, feels incredible. To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we are able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. Customers Love Their Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kits! Joseph L. "I buy a lot of stuff at Wal-mart, but this is gonna out-do the stuff on Wal-mart shelves, which contains all kinds of preservatives. I did a taste test even though I've never found a bad product from 4Patriots. Hamburger Helper can kiss my butt – this stuff here is good! (Maybe not as good as my wife's cooking.) This is a good buy." Danielle M. 4Patriots Employee "I was surprised at how good everything in the Ultimate Meat Medley really was. As an avid cook, I have high standards; I worried it might be salty or dried out. What I discovered was moist chicken and turkey that shreds easily for the fastest chicken salad ever or super fast BBQ turkey sammies. The pork and beef are in perfect chucks for adding to stews or burritos. Even the ground beef, which I could not envision being delicious, tasted just like the ground beef I typically brown and drain, but in zero time! This box is definitely going to become my "oh shoot, I forgot to thaw a meat" solution for everyday and I'll have to grab more to store." Michael M. "My family won't be asking, "where's the meat when disaster comes." I bought the Meat Medley so we have beef, pork, chicken, turkey and ground beef to supplement our food stock. I was very pleasantly surprised at the amount of meat at the price I paid. My order arrived quickly and now I know I'll have the right answer when my family ask "where's the meat"." Ernest K. "It's a must have item for your food prep. inventory. Great as a companion item for some of the other items for added protein." / / DISCLOSURE OF BUSINESS TIES: The sender of this email likely has an affiliate or material connection with the entities mentioned and may earn commissions from purchases made through associated websites. subject: Folks might’ve killed to have my job…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tafoya for Senate
body:
It was the hardest decision I’ve ever made.
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=934cfefc65e84570ab50f78b148f7cd2&_e=F-OL0DI5jzeBjrT6n7YcNjrNuIwVRs5O1NQf8S9Y_DRiwCZw6y-P1VRC5U2aDrN9oXNcpeJGnU9GoOPpcMJkBybSH8cZ6xxQi3pTtstYRKI5J4rtQreJvD0tAfyYOFWz99WflfumZZjfR9xeTxyD0zOSkH_SyjBJw44jYWp4nGbvb8KoDaoVVIolkj5zLiL0vekNuhhW9I-E7SyR7xe0GjoaWKeBdFVlWJItvsP0udJrg-F2gkqovpwcU1aFS0t0V2OhJaSBO1eTLeFyNvwrieSK16SJNgpecHTRNDBoT9LzUJE3m08yiueKgYPqUdNj7hXvz4joAD1lq7UEkqQgiPHlshpSXQH-ZBQjVp_v4losCJfZYSfIn49hUO1zvEcI8gjmU9celgtcSqmo-ACD2W-rAyEYQ6J9FbSxPha1PiJx5QktdbR_Bt7xr67FX2DGElxyjxrcIw3jACADNoBpVVeQeCPkrFlFzlIHPixmViS0fsHCbR7IjjG9c6Jm6hxkPnH2WXeQ1L_eNkawVrF4O7fL4Hp39kJBWhKX5albkpEKKCH6zDIROJTj_J_-ivUF0uKeusohzIHOdpCaPOG0levpsFtUomOPcnK__zTmEFzZQQay4JlB1Ag06GukUitDpm3jHAbHlDvyHKmF2M2tND7EROfh62837WmOfRghgsO-bu9DJrPfC6nRsjiXfwDyUPEwpXIiUUmKwkucHakHaQuWVc8EjXuxIHPLpRx4QmsS4JF7TK_ZymhJPQdKQuj8mu8_AeBQUKHpAvaf5ejjeE8DHPLqKOsuGmfNMtWlkOup1zmCNrIaLDV8WdoFUFXWWkJ3fwn0O2ylvKCtQT8bXA%3D%3D)Hi there, I hope you are well!
[This is Michele Tafoya – I’ve got a quick story to share if you’ll indulge me for a few moments.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=934cfefc65e84570ab50f78b148f7cd2&_e=F-OL0DI5jzeBjrT6n7YcNjrNuIwVRs5O1NQf8S9Y_DRiwCZw6y-P1VRC5U2aDrN9oXNcpeJGnU9GoOPpcMJkBybSH8cZ6xxQi3pTtstYRKI5J4rtQreJvD0tAfyYOFWz99WflfumZZjfR9xeTxyD0zOSkH_SyjBJw44jYWp4nGbvb8KoDaoVVIolkj5zLiL0vekNuhhW9I-E7SyR7xe0GjoaWKeBdFVlWJItvsP0udJrg-F2gkqovpwcU1aFS0t0V2OhJaSBO1eTLeFyNvwrieSK16SJNgpecHTRNDBoT9LzUJE3m08yiueKgYPqUdNjeYiB0QymlZU2PtNC1pZ24B5B-yTd5zc4W16P7hU5vFZRATO0s3AMuVXERfS7NQcIpqAjLLV6GLFZSI2_TRk4U1p6xEq_ogHrVDoq-NVF1v2iXTD8mZTUTUcBFZnmIV6xPwJxjI-g4GpqMmYfpE8k733khMdyv-7ajHqlESzXv_ClXV5lQQZfhHVrTdANu779AlmoPRkurzC1mEF-xYC2aEGD-aOSxaAI9J3ai0Fr_bICzcbHYjQvEKTZWRNJsuASC9QNr9UYeKHR8mZnxD3JJU72wytxBkvb4HJJu1v4pXWxUA7w9BUp12vxPpXUFrpELRAXWCzuoymByBYsKmGstrbUh9EibKYzXdH-Rj8MMP9JxLes2llaMU-GACahntl4Eud-QS0ARBL87KAcKuramPPJChogemPnbx-eJ0WOrHrRcB4a9yfGcWpc0v1CQkJeLKqWHjrNseUsNEBzV6rBUS32Nq57vHLIMcrfhiBOJ4CQaHPk-uRyOGTd-g-wrouheYcbgYq1PBdwG7wafEMMAA%3D%3D)
Folks might've killed to have my job.
I was a sideline reporter for pro football and basketball. I covered some of the most exciting games in history. I watched sports for a living. And I loved every minute, every touchdown, and every Hail Mary.
I reached the pinnacle of my career... but there was one problem:
I had to watch what I said. I was a public-facing representative for a world-class sports network. I couldn't share everything I believed, and no one really knew I was a Conservative.
So I hung up my press badge and quit my dream job so I could speak my mind. [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=934cfefc65e84570ab50f78b148f7cd2&_e=F-OL0DI5jzeBjrT6n7YcNjrNuIwVRs5O1NQf8S9Y_DRiwCZw6y-P1VRC5U2aDrN9oXNcpeJGnU9GoOPpcMJkBybSH8cZ6xxQi3pTtstYRKI5J4rtQreJvD0tAfyYOFWz99WflfumZZjfR9xeTxyD0zOSkH_SyjBJw44jYWp4nGbvb8KoDaoVVIolkj5zLiL0vekNuhhW9I-E7SyR7xe0GjoaWKeBdFVlWJItvsP0udJrg-F2gkqovpwcU1aFS0t0V2OhJaSBO1eTLeFyNvwrieSK16SJNgpecHTRNDBoT9LzUJE3m08yiueKgYPqUdNjp-hRDJc76G-brqZldd1EchFTTJLYSMVS1tNLGE_1eG1hiuJ4gHOrRUIEOo0qCBT5aisAK46P3nikdqoxN9ouTE8LAy0JboLmxU27FCbszjPlwiRqmwGWFGp8oXjTvsC2cOfMUpVj3NmCpsx9ZjjOBM-De4D8kbG1AMZiIlhsTQ41WqNLegXw6AjycR8IU1vMqBCbQsYBAxYp7Sx56Tti5J3qQFBMhub5lTLmmBhxlQQvwxLnlCShjsKN3sTjnoVCkF2W8iwcPB0IY3gebwEOgquqSQBJRpE2m-pI4rwVR87-zfxF-sea84JzxpjJlPreU7-Ix7fPDmndVRGnC-vvHbdX0sTXHaN7Z0BUyuz5Hhw9m5RAZdHflBXnYOFeVFrO35HWZRBeZr1DlpF5aDRK2RFWM7graLOLWUthx0nknJV5CfrKlVPH-tEx1tRYTPFx0PydAI9cqVsNrsR1_703eMoH5wR5rLhYvYhtTdpP4MgiKpLrxIJp1mDLTWWx9HODaiKso1D09px2lg4ZyicdAw%3D%3D)It was the hardest decision I've ever made. I was scared, excited, and liberated - all at the same time. **
**People said I was OUT OF MY MIND. **
**But I knew God was leading me in a certain direction, and that 's no time for half-measures. I knew he had a plan for my life. So I took a leap of faith and never looked back.**

clean_body: It was the hardest decision I’ve ever made. there, I hope you are well! Folks might've killed to have my job. I was a sideline reporter for pro football and basketball. I covered some of the most exciting games in history. I watched sports for a living. And I loved every minute, every touchdown, and every Hail Mary. I reached the pinnacle of my career... but there was one problem: I had to watch what I said. I was a public-facing representative for a world-class sports network. I couldn't share everything I believed, and no one really knew I was a Conservative. So I hung up my press badge and quit my dream job so I could speak my mind. was the hardest decision I've ever made. I was scared, excited, and liberated - all at the same time. People said I was OUT OF MY MIND. But I knew God was leading me in a certain direction, and that 's no time for half-measures. I knew he had a plan for my life. So I took a leap of faith and never looked back. I believe God put me here for a reason. I believe Minnesota is the land of 10,000 problems right now. And I believe a no-BS, sane person who 's ALL-IN can win this seat. But I'd be lying if I said fundraising doesn't make a difference in a race like this. The far-Left is readying a FORTUNE to drown out our message and take this seat out of play. Our path to victory solely depends on raising enough to keep up. My finance team tells me we 'll need to bring in 10,000 founding donors ASAP so we can: 1) Hire staff, 2) Recruit volunteers in every corner of the state, 3) Print yard signs, 4) Launch our first advertising blitz, and 5) Start contacting on-the-fence voters. I 'm afraid that'll make the difference between a winning campaign and a losing one. put my career on hold to speak out for what I know to be true. I 'm committing my blood, sweat, and tears to take this seat back from the political class. I 'd be honored if you'd be willing to stand alongside me. Donations in these early days make the biggest impact on our path to victory. I hope you 'll join us, but either way, God bless you! Be brave. Do good. - Michele Michele TafoyaRepublican for Senate, Minnesota official - Michele Tafoya is running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota! name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: [Official Petition] Drop all charges
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust
body:
The Left thinks they’ve finally got me...
The Left thinks they’ve finally got me...
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e8746756/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvNnF4YTRheFFrNw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjU/LbmNsN3laUzYxNg/qP2hpZHM9bmN6MUJ0V0tXaDV5dlBscw/gaXYnHw/s8j14ae4a42)

| Dear Patriot,
---
This is the most personal letter I’ve ever written.
---
I’m writing to you not as America’s Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney, but as an 81-year-old man – a grandfather and a patriot – staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed was right.
---
I’ve taken on mobsters. I’ve faced terrorists. I’ve battled corruption. I’ve been through it all.
---
_Or so I thought..._
---
**...But now, a Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
They think they’ve finally got me! Left me with no escape, no lifeline – especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!
---
_No pardon.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill. _
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me: _**the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like _YOU_.**_
---
My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — [**“THE PEOPLE’S PARDON”**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)— calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES.
---
[**Please help me reach this life-saving _(truly!)_ goal today by immediately adding your name to “THE PEOPLE’S PARDON” as citizens unite to call for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES against me.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
__
---

[ADD YOUR NAME](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

Thank you and God Bless you,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Defense Trust
---

---
Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e8746756/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjU/LbmNsN3laUzYxNg/qP2hpZHM9bmN6MUJ0V0tXaDV5dlBscw/gaXYnHw/scg9f9b7be4)

clean_body: I just stepped out of the Oval Office to send you this | | | | Forget the middle man. I wanted you to hear this DIRECTLY from me! Thanks to YOU , a year ago I was inaugurated as the 47th President of the United States. We’ve done SO much, and it’s truly been aHELL OF A RIDE. Our border is SHUT , gas prices have hit a FIVE-YEAR LOW , inflation is UNDER CONTROL , the economy is BOOMING , and the USA is finally RESPECTED again. The Democrats CAN’T STAND that the American people are winning again, and they’ll USE EVERY DIRTY TACTIC possible to destroy our progress. And make no mistake, Patriot: when they come after me, they’re really coming after YOU! I’m just standing in their way. We’ve been through HELL together, andNOTHING has torn our bond apart. Unlike the Democrats, I UNDERSTAND how much you love our country and how hard you work every day to live the American dream. And I NEVER forget who I’m fighting for: YOU, John! Together, we will finish what we started. Together, we will keep MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. — President Donald J. clean_body: | | | Peter, this is Michael with Team Collins, and A leaked memo is circulating in Washington, confirming what many of us feared. Democrats are quietly laying the groundwork for the NEXT impeachment hoax. Not just against President Trump. Not just against one official. But against the entire America First national security team, including Marco Rubio and Pete Hegseth. They didn't stop with Trump. They didn't stop after Russiagate. They didn't stop after two SHAM impeachments. They didn't stop after losing the White House. And now, even after a successful mission to capture narco-terrorist Nicolas Maduro, without a single American casualty, the Left is crying FOUL. Why? Because decisive action scares them. Because strong leadership exposes their weakness. So now the playbook is back on the table: Smear > Investigate > Impeach > Paralyze This isn't oversight. This isn't accountability. This is political warfare, plain and simple. And here's the part no one in the media wants to say out loud: That's exactly why Mike Collins is stepping up to run for the United States Senate. The Radical Left knows the truth: They want endless hearings. Permanent investigations. A Senate turned into a weapon. Mike Collins is running because If we hold it, impeachment schemes die in committee. If we lose it, Trump's second term becomes nonstop defense instead of decisive leadership. Mike isn't running to play footsie with the Swamp. He's running to: But this only works if patriots move now. The clock is already ticking. Because if we don't stop this now, they won't stop at Rubio. They won't stop at Hegseth. And they won't stop at Trump. \- Michael | ---|--- | | | | | | PAID FOR BY MIKE COLLINS FOR SENATE | | PO BOX 6491 ATHENS, GA 30604 Hey, if you're still reading this, don't forget to follow Mike Collins for Senate on and and TEXT MIKE TO 70622****

name: Roy Cooper
subject: This wasn’t in my plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
None of this would have been possible without you.
Good morning, Peter —
I didn’t plan on running for federal office. I wanted to serve North Carolina from right here at home. But when I look at what’s happening in this country today, I know I can’t leave things as they are for my daughters, or for their children, or for yours.
**[With the help and support of countless folks across our nation, I’m working hard to win the most competitive U.S. Senate race of 2026 so I can take to Washington the fight for our fundamental rights and freedoms. Could you help us out by splitting a contribution of any amount today between our campaign and Heartland Patriots?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100028?refcode=em20260125-9981&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9981%2E614464%2EyJr8MB)**
Americans risked — and even lost — their lives for the rights that extreme Republicans now want to rip away. The right to vote. To live free of discrimination. To access an abortion. To get a quality public education.
The schemes pushed by the far right won’t give us a country where all of us are equally free and equally worthy of dignity and respect. But the values I stand for will, and I’m ready to fight for them.
**[If you’re in the fight with me, I’m asking you to split a donation today between our campaign and Heartland Patriots. Even a small amount will help — our grassroots average gift is around $35 this month, but no donation is too small. Click here to give what you can to help me defeat my MAGA opponent and fix what’s broken in Washington.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100028?refcode=em20260125-9981&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9981%2E614464%2EyJr8MB)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100028?refcode=em20260125-9981&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9981%2E614464%2EyJr8MB)**
Thank you,
Roy Cooper

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124001891/597250819/-2026962184?amount=25&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.25_Shivering_B1_F1_S1_C1_90CL-365DON_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWFjM2E4Ny1mZWY5LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0JJAIVIZiTYWBmJV3nbnTXcxH9uYMyfPuialDMC_Avg=) I’m shivering, Peter... and not just because it’s freezing in Chicago right now. _I just learned that we’re still $11,527 short of our Early Vote goal._ **Here’s why I’m so concerned, Peter:** We have just 11 days left until early voting begins in my race. If we can’t hit this goal, we may have to scale back on our ads, doorknocking, and voter outreach — _at the worst possible time._ [**_That’s why I’m coming to you directly: Peter, will you chip in $10 or $25 right away to help me catch up to my goal and mobilize voters in this final stretch?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124001892/597250826/-2026962184?amount=25&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.25_Shivering_B1_F1_S1_C1_90CL-365DON_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWFjM2E4Ny1mZWY5LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0JJAIVIZiTYWBmJV3nbnTXcxH9uYMyfPuialDMC_Avg=) | | [ RUSH A DONATION → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124001893/597250836/-2026962184?amount=25&amounts=250,100,50,25,10,5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.25_Shivering_B1_F1_S1_C1_90CL-365DON_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWFjM2E4Ny1mZWY5LWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0JJAIVIZiTYWBmJV3nbnTXcxH9uYMyfPuialDMC_Avg=)
---
**Here’s what we’re up against:**
❄️ This Senate seat is wide open — and we have a huge opportunity to elect a real fighter for working families, immigrant communities, and our democracy.
❄️ But a dark money Super PAC has reserved nearly $500,000 in ads to defeat us. They’ve already been caught engaging in shady tactics – and we have _no idea_ who is behind this.
❄️ If we fail to fight back and mobilize voters in these final weeks, everything we’re fighting for will be at risk.
**With just 11 days left until early voting begins and a flood of dark money coming into our race,_I simply can’t afford to fall short of my goal._**

Fellow Conservative,

We’re one year into the Trump Administration, and I think that, like me, you can feel that _**America is BACK.**_

**We’ve started a fire, but it’s at risk of being snuffed out.** Out of their pure hatred for everything Trump, Democrats have started their own fire.

They know that their precious liberal wishlists of policies won’t get anywhere so long as President Trump is in office with a substantial Republican majority backing his priorities in both houses of Congress.

**_That’s why they’re pulling out all of the stops in their playbook to defeat us in less than 290 days._**

_**Need more proof?**_

**Just this month, Chuck Schumer recruited a popular Alaska Democrat into that state’s Senate race. In just 24 hours, the candidate raised more than $1.5 million.**

This was a race that wasn’t on anyone’s radar and should be a safe Republican hold. Yet, Democrats' hatred of Trump is so intense that they’ll send money to any candidate who steps up to run against a Republican.

I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

clean_body: I’m Michele Tafoya – I was a pro football sideline reporter and I’ve got a BIG announcement to share with you. Peter, this is Michele Tafoya! It's official - I'm stepping off the sidelines and getting into the game. I wanted you to hear it directly from me: brave. Do good.- Michele TafoyaRepublican for Senate, Minnesota official - Michele Tafoya is running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota! Endorse her here:**| | Paid for by Tafoya for Senate 3500 Vicksburg LN N, STE 267, Plymouth, MN 55447 If you would like to opt-out of important updates like this,

name: Michele Tafoya
subject: Why I quit my dream job –

body:
It was the hardest decision I’ve ever made.
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=918be50482eb47e8886407d9ad522933&_e=RadsbhNFIoQHNZTiGGjUdDq8KIORXMM8ZCVHpTXweTayQDrDrSyGh0RkhGfGqNP3SjNnf5RBJB_vZGQYtBFAPlTAMKukOZK_I6nc4wTZU4T0W6RWsP6NFjFD0hjuhE5xvQHufSHy51T3iatznpBly4v_iZX8nNiPjgtO-G-6bFneZegT9J2p-EbebyKRkdXZKpAs-2vXqIZdeHBYaym191aJLw6NStT2qUsyYhRa5D1NDgQUSxBAr-j4MNCOPxDhEHofEaA0GOTVI3OZ8t9z2v9owsITHJNcXxz_AXeynvqu3a4sHhUn016S_Y0wTmXs7f1XysxAcAUGdRbsKg3i1q3keW7pVtsl8hGns2tkQ5nRTYL0THc4Hc2c_dOO5jXlu6X-98vxklaWDmj8Slpp7P716-z-Xbh8FWYWukq0aQrlmiM0INEM0Nx6_fZcXA6UODFjSuE-D3_3rgzTURiqMc6nvlc_BUSVP8kukaEeu-7rMVxezl4YTb4O5nkhUS_ZUIQzqmteAknredv_T8Kc0QnqwEtEnjRYY3hLTmL8Iv0FBVAVws3tWg9WSGd6L2iu81PPgA1MToMkWdgd-nkTlmqmvvdjTmx2_Uua6hkjtqO7sI5sbxql77c40xsbWbrtLvPqWz3CujyXg5LYssVMZfvSgkQeu7HgUJSPxhOMTiPx3cPvEAjhmBvvfFUEKhUvag7XX458CTcKlwq696bqwQadbTq4UdzvlKZOF_AM7kyqo0m1eKx74_CseUHPpHgSpyeh_TebQQb4BddntblJj5I8CzlkXS8_H1tKBIKSZk0NR3A2gIkbRlWvpRByMK2H)Hi there, I hope you are well!
[This is Michele Tafoya – I’ve got a quick story to share if you’ll indulge me for a few moments.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=918be50482eb47e8886407d9ad522933&_e=RadsbhNFIoQHNZTiGGjUdDq8KIORXMM8ZCVHpTXweTayQDrDrSyGh0RkhGfGqNP3SjNnf5RBJB_vZGQYtBFAPlTAMKukOZK_I6nc4wTZU4T0W6RWsP6NFjFD0hjuhE5xvQHufSHy51T3iatznpBly4v_iZX8nNiPjgtO-G-6bFneZegT9J2p-EbebyKRkdXZKpAs-2vXqIZdeHBYaym191aJLw6NStT2qUsyYhRa5D1NDgQUSxBAr-j4MNCOPxDhEHofEaA0GOTVI3OZ8t9z2v9owsITHJNcXxz_AXeynvrwaPgkYWvMoEZ2zb2kKUOk6awwvigW9Eii1qWYdqaVtMEp6Imb79kH2Lp__nvTim_XGvpUKQFmqPgPM7LXyWzMEEsIXHyHStBXrjX9nAvRFXR4JJr-aIsDURqMWOwz_DlCNEmlwXWIUxVRdGLDHT3ZPoISB6p2viUwkqVSfsWILusoTs5EY5hUU9AmitX9B1xNUiVQtDTrOENG4zk2aSLRF5JHpJGSuCrOk5PYpeerHskVyzzBAg748tmjgAwrJ-56DP9QaQq3GGFQE3-vn0Ixls6jvDpogWUosXGlXwVKgdmuiuRT7HOXLx_8EopunVnt97im0v_rZHeBiKAx2REprnZoLz6RpDWKQtZMz3Rf2CFcodYiwxLMmnzAV9akSklcSHtIVsUqzjv2oFbFvO-yThm65cwhXWNqZkwLxe0FW_V3J71Mr6nFw7V8ECZbBLtO1r9rW0AAvluOef-8dw45YrcYAhWdyop2OPa8k5VdT0yLwv8LqMPrlwWdJA2JZdgpOOcSLbaJbTiMPGOfveRp)
Folks might've killed to have my job.
I was a sideline reporter for pro football and basketball. I covered some of the most exciting games in history. I watched sports for a living. And I loved every minute, every touchdown, and every Hail Mary.
I reached the pinnacle of my career... but there was one problem:
I had to watch what I said. I was a public-facing representative for a world-class sports network. I couldn't share everything I believed, and no one really knew I was a Conservative.
So I hung up my press badge and quit my dream job so I could speak my mind. [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=918be50482eb47e8886407d9ad522933&_e=RadsbhNFIoQHNZTiGGjUdDq8KIORXMM8ZCVHpTXweTayQDrDrSyGh0RkhGfGqNP3SjNnf5RBJB_vZGQYtBFAPlTAMKukOZK_I6nc4wTZU4T0W6RWsP6NFjFD0hjuhE5xvQHufSHy51T3iatznpBly4v_iZX8nNiPjgtO-G-6bFneZegT9J2p-EbebyKRkdXZKpAs-2vXqIZdeHBYaym191aJLw6NStT2qUsyYhRa5D1NDgQUSxBAr-j4MNCOPxDhEHofEaA0GOTVI3OZ8t9z2v9owsITHJNcXxz_AXeynvr2BWQcQcGtk4MLbD1XhP2ehAzBHV4i2fwJBvxaDXaPvmpF6yoSt-dGiGk4A5PIu_NkIub9xYpIKnYm5KwhnelwYEg4WyoPUr6o4KnpYpPOhx9wwKWGuALlCu4vY-Fw7bkhek69Cf-bpKO2ayugiureJOWIEojUCxOLq8sqeUiw5OEQlV3SZNuNcNCGziLUWH-tRBmYbaOzLCu1nBh99FBDaPp2wJpAyFnBKhWKxt-ioVf2kU-BqxEqHJHpwTtkcFLeGhLxW5Dp-notNcsa_pi2OQa-M5ME_fzaWUgCU-xBVi4YtvHAKHb7XDAkwqO4Q08JGbwlrqkWsSVHgm1RTjeiV4nuxxD6KailrEzeHv_YNhoVvBYTcFFPNEAhd6VVXLZ-HwPc8HqlBGCYFQJkVs5yzSiWt6NIz7OlHP68Rb5uiay0Bs4j2ti_NfpXNlEgC-lzaLKAKqMXaMXE6umC1OCHp10e4hUromT0Pr39c9enk9_98ARK9sF89px7otuV8s9GiSU0GWBv9MyeYqXFBvlE)It was the hardest decision I've ever made. I was scared, excited, and liberated - all at the same time. **
**People said I was OUT OF MY MIND. **
**But I knew God was leading me in a certain direction, and that 's no time for half-measures. I knew he had a plan for my life. So I took a leap of faith and never looked back.**
**[Now, a few years later, I’ve started a growing podcast, campaigned for commonsense in Minnesota, and now launched a campaign for U.S. Senate!](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=918be50482eb47e8886407d9ad522933&_e=RadsbhNFIoQHNZTiGGjUdDq8KIORXMM8ZCVHpTXweTayQDrDrSyGh0RkhGfGqNP3SjNnf5RBJB_vZGQYtBFAPlTAMKukOZK_I6nc4wTZU4T0W6RWsP6NFjFD0hjuhE5xvQHufSHy51T3iatznpBly4v_iZX8nNiPjgtO-G-6bFneZegT9J2p-EbebyKRkdXZKpAs-2vXqIZdeHBYaym191aJLw6NStT2qUsyYhRa5D1NDgQUSxBAr-j4MNCOPxDhEHofEaA0GOTVI3OZ8t9z2v9owsITHJNcXxz_AXeynvreNSuEFOf-mMhZHKn3vm5MzjeM78sGXaf-ppAn_MvQyw-oX6RUeYoNRzqPOdcAKPvfMY2DHhitJOiBaD8BXCbRs_y0NmBR2HJtwClMaVo_mKnopXRo_A-Ak5sH3mNpTpznwk3ij2gzT0hw2CqFg9YZmsLjnRSYFX_F82c2zdEPF4As54HzUkbn-3YXunBUFjpln2V2pM1vow1f5gK2ceY3MZMvCKvmcLaVef5I-93s_N6Z8BzZS-q4N3MYTGXaMZVzTLq5hDVxSwq1PHW1S7LPwpyorv6kMLg3X6ur5eh4VpWx4nSQB4XNvHnQYNFtf2xytfLbCrtM-io3FrLLFybDuOSnq7dhUB6diHsCylAJwnQRy831qWRGbVFEQuwDqpV_0sRY8LqyEZFryDDaVrtl32rpUWsmR6Kb3Kfju6tedahhoaKwVsA7aWWBstIgNMB_6_XvJ7Y3PSRNAM8-yv6jBVTi6NJ6wIwut8UMqyyLywgWO_xohjEHl9im7k4o0X8XhuERajZgMXmBzvEiJSoA)**
**I believe God put me here for a reason. **
**I believe Minnesota is the land of 10,000 problems right now. **
**And I believe a no-BS, sane person who 's ALL-IN can win this seat. **
** But I'd be lying if I said fundraising doesn't make a difference in a race like this. The far-Left is readying a FORTUNE to drown out our message and take this seat out of play. **
**Our path to victory solely depends on raising enough to keep up. **
**My finance team tells me we 'll need to bring in 10,000 founding donors ASAP so we can: 1) Hire staff, 2) Recruit volunteers in every corner of the state, 3) Print yard signs, 4) Launch our first advertising blitz, and 5) Start contacting on-the-fence voters. **
**I 'm afraid that'll make the difference between a winning campaign and a losing one.
[With that said, would you consider becoming one of the 10,000 founding donors now that I have launched my Senate campaign?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=918be50482eb47e8886407d9ad522933&_e=RadsbhNFIoQHNZTiGGjUdDq8KIORXMM8ZCVHpTXweTayQDrDrSyGh0RkhGfGqNP3SjNnf5RBJB_vZGQYtBFAPlTAMKukOZK_I6nc4wTZU4T0W6RWsP6NFjFD0hjuhE5xvQHufSHy51T3iatznpBly4v_iZX8nNiPjgtO-G-6bFneZegT9J2p-EbebyKRkdXZKpAs-2vXqIZdeHBYaym191aJLw6NStT2qUsyYhRa5D1NDgQUSxBAr-j4MNCOPxDhEHofEaA0GOTVI3OZ8t9z2v9owsITHJNcXxz_AXeynvqiRgjksXd91r6F7_wU7w7VirCz7MJm0zvFqcUjZvOZiTjIFHR6pIpJ5_TYGPv0dHsjezMwxEKCkNe9Zo4ZPHPAe-8WkorMzeqwENhyTH343MmACZYGD1-lja8ew9toDsjT-jETi8__2hWLbTPhBwgTrJtn8tuc_57J5X-DjaJ6ZBjMuiDRyTPAiTRsGXJINo5PZ15QBp_yKS6oWainuIJRWFQS5BcBYy888AVVhSRfsTpNPdxuyxgX058YzhGZzdFqn90rqJMrnyNSbtoj9OAFrbUR6FmjmzPLaDISvKoVEC2lxWAxAZGdo7TshEUw0A-Mv6f7PnPNpAPP8jayhSbHzKijEByiO-dZAPAdud7qY88fAnjjRbynvbl0LKai1ERz2htperZN7_bSeN80kpvLzN0lGA5z2nzhALO0GADj1XMThRN2XslLnjwSuEIgjNq4muSNYYWNlrqc1V2TgExfPwwSeP4VoDq38Xkb-bWUfmk0Dg64Pf7O0GsB4yVuf_K4n95NU5RX0tqr9IqupqiN)[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR

**I 'm committing my blood, sweat, and tears to take this seat back from the political class. **
**I 'd be honored if you'd be willing to stand alongside me. Donations in these early days make the biggest impact on our path to victory. **
**I hope you 'll join us, but either way, God bless you! **
**Be brave. clean_body: It was the hardest decision I’ve ever made. there, I hope you are well! Folks might've killed to have my job. I was a sideline reporter for pro football and basketball. I covered some of the most exciting games in history. I watched sports for a living. And I loved every minute, every touchdown, and every Hail Mary. I reached the pinnacle of my career... but there was one problem: I had to watch what I said. I was a public-facing representative for a world-class sports network. I couldn't share everything I believed, and no one really knew I was a Conservative. So I hung up my press badge and quit my dream job so I could speak my mind. was the hardest decision I've ever made. I was scared, excited, and liberated - all at the same time. People said I was OUT OF MY MIND. But I knew God was leading me in a certain direction, and that 's no time for half-measures. I knew he had a plan for my life. So I took a leap of faith and never looked back. I believe God put me here for a reason. I believe Minnesota is the land of 10,000 problems right now. And I believe a no-BS, sane person who 's ALL-IN can win this seat. But I'd be lying if I said fundraising doesn't make a difference in a race like this. The far-Left is readying a FORTUNE to drown out our message and take this seat out of play. Our path to victory solely depends on raising enough to keep up. My finance team tells me we 'll need to bring in 10,000 founding donors ASAP so we can: 1) Hire staff, 2) Recruit volunteers in every corner of the state, 3) Print yard signs, 4) Launch our first advertising blitz, and 5) Start contacting on-the-fence voters. I 'm afraid that'll make the difference between a winning campaign and a losing one. put my career on hold to speak out for what I know to be true. I 'm committing my blood, sweat, and tears to take this seat back from the political class. I 'd be honored if you'd be willing to stand alongside me. Donations in these early days make the biggest impact on our path to victory. I hope you 'll join us, but either way, God bless you! Be brave. Do good. - Michele Michele TafoyaRepublican for Senate, Minnesota official - Michele Tafoya is running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota! Endorse her here:**| | Paid for by Tafoya for Senate 3500 Vicksburg LN N, STE 267, Plymouth, MN 55447

name: Stop ICE via Our Revolution
subject: Breaking: Trump's now openly preparing to unleash the military into our communities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34942?t=1011&refcode=email-20260125_v&akid=10118%2E5885482%2EJIfrKp ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

BREAKING: First Trump threatened martial law to crush protests and
escalate ICE raids – turning federal agents into an occupying force – and
now the Pentagon has ordered 1,500 active-duty soldiers to prepare for a
possible deployment to Minnesota.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34942?source=email-20260125&t=1061&akid=10118%2E5885482%2EJIfrKp ]Headline: Pentagon readies 1,500 soldiers to possibly deploy to
Minnesota, officials say

This is Trump turning our communities into battlegrounds plain and simple.
And we need to show a MASSIVE force of resistance to stop him and get ICE
out – NOW. Our Revolution organizers and activists are on the ground in
Minnesota as we speak organizing protests, community protection efforts,
and rapid response coordination alongside local immigrant rights groups to
make it happen.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34942?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20260125nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10118%2E5885482%2EJIfrKp ]We urgently need grassroots supporters like you to power our rapid
response: Donate $10, $25, or whatever you can to stop the occupation and
help get ICE OUT of our communities right now.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34942?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20260125nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10118%2E5885482%2EJIfrKp ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34942?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20260125nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10118%2E5885482%2EJIfrKp ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34942?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20260125nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10118%2E5885482%2EJIfrKp ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34942?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20260125nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10118%2E5885482%2EJIfrKp ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34942?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20260125nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10118%2E5885482%2EJIfrKp ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34942?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20260125nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10118%2E5885482%2EJIfrKp ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

ICE already acts as a near-paramilitary force, empowered by a shocking $28
BILLION annual budget of our tax dollars and by corporations profiting
from detention and deportation. It’s now the highest-funded law
enforcement body in the United States, with virtually unlimited resources
and aggressive directions to terrorize our communities.

Every new contract, every mile logged by ICE’s private transporters, and
every surveillance van in our neighborhoods fills the pockets of those who
treat human lives as collateral.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34942?source=email-20260125&t=1060&akid=10118%2E5885482%2EJIfrKp ]Headline: ICE's violence is 'by design' under Trump

And now Trump is looking to escalate further, responding to our movement’s
protests with shocking force, while preparing to send in active duty
soldiers. Minneapolis Mayor Jacob Frey said it clearly: "I never thought
in a million years that we would be invaded by our own federal
government." And it’s going to take ALL of us showing up, coming together
like never before to stop it.

Our Revolution is on the ground every day – organizing marches with
thousands demanding justice for Renee Good and all those terrorized by
ICE, joining neighbors to form rapid response teams, and standing
alongside immigrant families facing the trauma of raids and detentions.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34942?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20260125nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10118%2E5885482%2EJIfrKp ]But we need your help today to meet this moment. Will you chip in $10,
$25, or whatever you can right now to get ICE out – so our families and
communities can stop living in fear as the violence escalates?

Together we’re turning the outrage in Minnesota into a mass movement
across the country to force ICE out for good. Let’s get ICE out of our
communities – together.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=10118%2E5885482%2EJIfrKp ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=10118%2E5885482%2EJIfrKp ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=10118%2E5885482%2EJIfrKp ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=10118%2E5885482%2EJIfrKp ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=10118%2E5885482%2EJIfrKp ]Website |

establishment by committing to be a 2026 Movement Builder

name: Adam Schwarze
subject: ALERT: Should we deport them all?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
The first step in this journey has been accomplished: Tim Walz is out of the governor’s race. This happened on his watch, and he did absolutely nothing to stop it. | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=67a9cb6751b449a59e49712b0c56e87b&_e=bNmYC-jP7e0BaDSHqiX1P_jtVbC9kAFpipl3tAeuFUd0Rm6pDJLxV7WMbzt0ssS9fxPbM2x3RTsOja3BD4MEd4GpP3vbUTRFymEI2nAbRrKicPbnbdk7OEPJUTw9KIDYyruf7zgEJXCR6MvImupTYIBEPLHE4u3-5vZIgeYKIRp4VAAVCwdaOJqT396nNFd6oIaiO_HQcYEYE5krUXGGISl9EqRrZDfZQWPe09Sx9cZCoL7-YqQFlk0GYvwrnqi_nBLBMrWuDGW7bgcvEu9g-YBS6ejVI2nxXEZeIBr2qOluo2Yd62N1b-foAa4xWLZL5KMRMQQurtFZx0BLX41uY7T22M096ishff35m_rBetvfxrYwrszrX1B6SlykQJclgNeetH8jnCgdSAs-SyPppwiUy11XDtfof5AWOhH1qLyhfvmemsj6aRRjwC9STiUNyVoAF-jFezvmSKYmj9mhsm9X-qxGiSewtfbc0NlIAbfLP4fmS2kFTbnxHKYOUGIVtLXcoOSbYVcjPlD8dor8hj6pfcONn4qjoZt7D8B810WvCdutd0rbu9BXOj_8xCEM7UjwYA-HXYPQytXJJLm-H1d67NLky-YJFENaraqBYDirE0CkX2JXzSC-HcZvQqb0_qXM82DvSqQE7Ubt2GyjPFIEG-2F9xHQjJjcOQNVUCiwx-0UvP3Wgy_50EEUzfLO89wp6KovgE52OS_kNgxMSTLa1STa0prveUpMBXmyKdkXy4b6Wn8Tm_12Rc0nQVZJ)

---
Fellow Conservative,

When hardworking Minnesotans like you pay taxes to feed hungry children, the last thing we expect is for those funds to be used to buy luxury cars, overseas properties, and lavish lifestyles for scammers.

But that's precisely what happened right here in Minnesota with the Feeding Our Future scandal – over $250 million in federal child nutrition dollars stolen through fake claims, phony sites, and outright fraud.

As a retired Navy SEAL who's spent my life fighting for America and holding the line on accountability, I believe anyone who betrays our trust like this – especially if they're naturalized citizens – should face severe consequences, and illegal aliens need to be deported!

**If you don’t have time to finish this entire email, please do me a quick favor and answer the question below:**

_**Should we deport any naturalized citizen who steals from the American taxpayer?**_

[**TAKE THE QUICK SURVEY

clean_body: The first step in this journey has been accomplished: Tim Walz is out of the governor’s race. This happened on his watch, and he did absolutely nothing to stop it. | Fellow Conservative, When hardworking Minnesotans like you pay taxes to feed hungry children, the last thing we expect is for those funds to be used to buy luxury cars, overseas properties, and lavish lifestyles for scammers. But that's precisely what happened right here in Minnesota with the Feeding Our Future scandal – over $250 million in federal child nutrition dollars stolen through fake claims, phony sites, and outright fraud. As a retired Navy SEAL who's spent my life fighting for America and holding the line on accountability, I believe anyone who betrays our trust like this – especially if they're naturalized citizens – should face severe consequences, and illegal aliens need to be deported! If you don’t have time to finish this entire email, please do me a quick favor and answer the question below: Should we deport any naturalized citizen who steals from the American taxpayer? Prosecutors have already secured dozens of convictions, with assets including Porsches and millions of dollars in cash being seized. But we need stronger laws to ensure this never happens again and to send a clear message: Fraud against American taxpayers will not be tolerated. The first step in this journey has been accomplished: Tim Walz is out of the governor’s race. This happened on his watch, and he did absolutely nothing to stop it. Now, we need to turn our eyes to the open United States Senate seat, where I’m a Republican candidate. I support the introduction of bold new measures in Congress to crack down on these schemes. I need to hear from you – - We've seen enough excuses and weak oversight. It's time for leadership that puts America – and Minnesotans – first. For love of country, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. name: Ruben Gallego

body:
This week, I will be voting NO on giving whatever ICE has become more taxpayer money.
#

This week, I will be voting NO on giving whatever ICE has become more taxpayer money.
This is no longer a serious immigration enforcement agency. These are federal agents actively sowing fear in communities instead of protecting the public. Fear has become the mission.
At the same time, while Americans are losing food stamps and health care costs skyrocketed, Kristi Noem is lying to the American people at photo ops and enriching herself and her cronies on the backs of hardworking taxpayers. It's pure corruption, plain and simple.
But it goes deeper than that.
Pam Bondi, Donald Trump's Attorney General, sent a letter to Minnesota officials saying they had a choice: hand over your voter rolls or ICE won't back off.
It's a shakedown -- and an attempt to takeover competitive elections in states that are either swing states or states they've lost in previous elections.
We can't let this stand.
First, we fight back in the Senate this week -- and then we have to continue the fight to take back the House and Senate in this election, and the White House in the next.
I'll be campaigning for Democrats across the country this year, and I'll need your help to get it done. So I am asking:
[**Can you please make a contribution to my campaign today? I will put your support to work electing Democrats across the country who will stand up to the corruption of the Trump administration.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dec25.cqctgP&refcode=em260125-1-160-tf&t=1&akid=4066%2E734936%2EC8DdUv)

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: A two-tiered justice system
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley for Wake**
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124005066/597260231/-343666687?refcode=AU_GWN_OT_GEN_NOA_AC_20260125_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzA2MTJiOC0wMmZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tb3tcuNxwgGIVwbnbARA8MdEZ2ducwZOSFK9o8Vb7Z0=&emci=5d7d1899-d1f7-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=fc0612b8-02fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=28008880)
---
The stakes for our community have never been higher, Peter. Donald Trump’s Department of Justice has introduced a two-tiered justice system — **one for his friends and allies, and one for everyone else.** They’ve refused to prosecute his allies, even when they were caught breaking the law, and filed false charges against his opponents for purely political reasons. We can no longer count on the Department of Justice to defend our rights, which is why we need a Wake County District Attorney who has the experience and the vision to stand up for what’s right and ensure our justice system works fairly for all. I’ve spent my entire career doing just that. Working for President Barack Obama, I learned that real leaders fight for the change they want to see in the world. That’s why, after leaving the White House, I opened my own law practice here in Wake County — representing people who needed someone in their corner and fighting every day to make sure my clients were treated fairly and compassionately by the North Carolina justice system. That work shaped my belief that justice must be fair, consistent, and rooted in facts — not fear, not your background, and not your zip code. I then served two terms in the North Carolina state Senate before serving in the U.S. Congress from 2023-2025, where I led efforts to protect abortion access in North Carolina, lower prescription drug costs, and end partisan gerrymandering. clean_body: | The stakes for our community have never been higher, Peter. Donald Trump’s Department of Justice has introduced a two-tiered justice system — one for his friends and allies, and one for everyone else. They’ve refused to prosecute his allies, even when they were caught breaking the law, and filed false charges against his opponents for purely political reasons. We can no longer count on the Department of Justice to defend our rights, which is why we need a Wake County District Attorney who has the experience and the vision to stand up for what’s right and ensure our justice system works fairly for all. I’ve spent my entire career doing just that. Working for President Barack Obama, I learned that real leaders fight for the change they want to see in the world. That’s why, after leaving the White House, I opened my own law practice here in Wake County — representing people who needed someone in their corner and fighting every day to make sure my clients were treated fairly and compassionately by the North Carolina justice system. That work shaped my belief that justice must be fair, consistent, and rooted in facts — not fear, not your background, and not your zip code. I then served two terms in the North Carolina state Senate before serving in the U.S. Congress from 2023-2025, where I led efforts to protect abortion access in North Carolina, lower prescription drug costs, and end partisan gerrymandering. With Trump working to rip away our rights and run all over the Constitution, Wake County needs a proven fighter as District Attorney to keep our communities safe and safeguard our freedoms. | Thank you for being on this journey with me, Wiley Wiley for Wake PO Box 563 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States | mailto:info@wileynickel.com | Paid for by Wiley for Wake

Hello,
**My name is Eileen Laubacher, and I am the Democrat and retired U.S. Navy Rear Admiral running against Lauren Boebert here in Colorado.**
I was 17-years-old the first time I raised my right hand and took an oath to support and defend the Constitution against all enemies, foreign and domestic.
I took those words, and that responsibility, seriously every day for the next 4 decades. When I was an intelligence officer. When I was deployed to Afghanistan. When I became an Admiral. And as a member of the president’s National Security Council.
But in all those years, I have never felt as much of a threat to our country, our Constitution, and our very democracy as I do right now. I said I would never run for office. But in this moment, I feel an obligation to step up, serve my community, and defend our country once again.
**I am running for Congress to defeat Lauren Boebert because when she was sworn into office, Lauren took a similar oath to defend our Constitution – and she has betrayed it almost every single day since then.**
Adam Frisch only lost to Lauren Boebert by 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. With the right Democrat, we can finally put an end to Lauren Boebert’s embarrassing political career – but I need your help now to do it.
Our campaign has set a goal to raise another $75,000 to defeat Lauren Boebert and take back the House for Democrats, but right now, we’re still very short. **If I am going to send Lauren Boebert packing and flip this seat blue, I need grassroots donors like you to chip in right now to my campaign:**

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124005228/597260572/1532703457?amount=3&refcode3=partner_loc_gc_em_hassan&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.25_George-Conway-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGE2ZGE5Mi0wMmZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0F1glXHb6DsEo9nueyREavu0nMGN74UsxrG96dseEPk=) Folks,

I’m running for Congress in New York’s 12th District because I’ve seen firsthand how dangerous MAGA really is, and I _refuse_ to accept Trump’s corruption and lawlessness as the new normal in our government.

**If that’s all you need to hear:[**_Will you split $3 right now between my campaign and Maggie Hassan to help me beat MAGA and flip the House?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124005229/597260575/1532703457?amount=3&refcode3=partner_loc_gc_em_hassan&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.25_George-Conway-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGE2ZGE5Mi0wMmZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0F1glXHb6DsEo9nueyREavu0nMGN74UsxrG96dseEPk=)** | | **[ DONATE $3 >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124005230/597260576/1532703457?amount=3&refcode3=partner_loc_gc_em_hassan&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.25_George-Conway-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGE2ZGE5Mi0wMmZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0F1glXHb6DsEo9nueyREavu0nMGN74UsxrG96dseEPk=)**
---
| **[ DONATE MORE >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124005231/597260577/1532703457?amount=25&refcode3=partner_loc_gc_em_hassan&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.25_George-Conway-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGE2ZGE5Mi0wMmZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0F1glXHb6DsEo9nueyREavu0nMGN74UsxrG96dseEPk=)**
---
Here are three reasons your $3 will make a real impact:
1. **We need to protect our democracy.** Right now, Trump is destroying our democracy from the inside out. Accountability doesn’t enforce itself. It only exists if people are willing to fight for it.
2. **We need to beat Trump and put an end to the MAGA agenda.** I’ve spent years calling out corruption and abuse of power from the outside. I know what makes these people tick, and it’s time we put Democrats in Congress who can stand up to them and win.
3. **We need to flip the House.** Without a Democratic majority, there is no real check on abuse of power. No oversight. No consequences.

name: Brown, Sherrod
subject: I never planned this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
I need you with me, Derek.

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124005265/597260588/430579753?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_SherrodSplit_260125_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjA2MTJiOC0wMmZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m6w0n2DXf18aySCDJzzt71flipdOuQ41glifDKiaRUU=) Derek,

I never planned on running for office again.

But I see what’s happening in Washington – and I can’t stay on the sidelines.

**I’m jumping in this fight: I’m running for Senate in 2026.**

_Why?_ Because Ohioans are working harder than ever, and they’re still falling behind.

_Why?_ Because wages are flat.

_Why?_ Because costs are rising.

_Why?_ Because too many people in power are not fighting for the people who put them there.

No one is fighting for Ohio workers and families in the Senate. But with your support, we can change that.

We can build a country where workers share in the wealth they create, where hard work pays off, and where everyone who works hard can afford a decent life.

This won’t be easy – and with Ohio being one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, we know there are many fights ahead. But if we stand together, we will win.

[_**I need you with me, Derek: Will you chip in $10 split with Mark Warner right now to help me flip Ohio’s Senate seat and stand up for workers across the country?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124005266/597260596/430579753?amount=10&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_SherrodSplit_260125_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjA2MTJiOC0wMmZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m6w0n2DXf18aySCDJzzt71flipdOuQ41glifDKiaRUU=) ******[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124005267/597260604/430579753?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_SherrodSplit_260125_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjA2MTJiOC0wMmZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m6w0n2DXf18aySCDJzzt71flipdOuQ41glifDKiaRUU=)****** In solidarity,

Sherrod ******[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124005268/597260615/430579753?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_SherrodSplit_260125_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjA2MTJiOC0wMmZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m6w0n2DXf18aySCDJzzt71flipdOuQ41glifDKiaRUU=)******

name: Michele Tafoya
subject: Minnesota deserves better – so I’m running for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tafoya for Senate
body:
[](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/T35krEg0PsU7C47CYoQkX7eF0owL5ox6rVsbLaawLhl8v2Wk8bEHlnnHNzhzrCFqEhUSnqupYuouqIw7PigGCIztVHUDvaG5J9u32rk0lX8Zc52oxObnbtCMwwe2lfo2ZwKgLX94FpthriCI5yNS5ueblozY9g4isInqpjerPLVjEGHJQ7cGqCtczNUBEbQSZ-DLJSD4HInJfD0dUUrr50N_CoYUMJx0IZX0nZJYNwWYwdhbm3SaFz8kknubZbOwKrOS_vPHyjFtg3ghrs4Q7ctKS6hsp__pPendyB8I8I0TzGg8jRU2300eNbbiFyBK5RJOZY5hfmEoMzJUSHSbmHcf_mgF6ZhE7tZoY0Pks-8inPieMWNQww0K0J-Xtz-CuVQipj9PBgOUtW7CqSnuPxxGm1DGpLPG-jOiOANyzzPJT0r9Jk9A8x-CSre4T8bu1b-RPR2uWoszGP_vFFM1D9DX1JBe47fCDH6oeiX6s4qlyYQCg_mHrb3h339Jkw2i98EbvizeW2rUyWhk7oIAKRy7ZHJaLQn5K7tJAKW7jON0Cb5AnSTx-9eYYRDbLjdukLsiuguWTV7yMj-JH7EsbXJCosN0Ve_68SdUu26C_pJ6EgTF_MnAk-I9G1FdFSa5ih0hl6xd70vB9DoT26Y5N8PvLvdr5ncW4g_arrl5rm2OcdK9uKOzoAhfNRZeVtXTe2yRRz1UbHGuew31jHE-z2kW_AGi_pGI54AJii5PEAP5qi1fJRxLQPSHomlrFEswQaPdKEvlXGWaCpH2xbE0YLUBdIVXLOtfteDeNUTMSEBu0yQZ3JUKuGYpNcqAzuyfLg/uAu8GS9XhLYiO-Zh5oUfVBBtQdyU-z-i/17)Folks - Michele Tafoya here!**
**I never really considered running for office. Ever. I was too focused on raising my family, and being the best football sideline reporter I could be.**
**But even in the last few weeks, Minnesota has become the embodiment of everything wrong with politics today. Tim Walz, his inner circle, and the corrupt political class are too busy:**
**
* Wasting billions of our tax dollars on fraudulent daycares
* Failing to condemn the activists storming churches
* Raising prices on hardworking families
* Sabotaging anything the President wants to do
* Forcing men into women's spaces
* Pitting Americans against each other

**
