name: Katie Porter
subject: Reclaiming YOUR time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40752%2E3422442%2ES6vOwr)
Peter,
If you’ve ever watched a Congressional Hearing, you know I often had to "reclaim my time" as witnesses try to avoid answering questions about how they’ve taken advantage of taxpayer money, shortchanged employees, or misled Americans.
I get a lot of fundraising emails from different candidates, and I know they don’t always answer a fundamental question: Why should I give you my hard earned money?
So in the interest of reclaiming YOUR time, here are just a few reasons why your support is so critical in this race:
**1) Extreme Republicans are leading in the polls.** Two different MAGA candidates have polled in first place, seriously threatening to keep any Democrats from advancing to the general election.
**2) My billionaire opponent has already given his campaign $28 million.** $17 million has already been spent on TV ads, and more spending is likely to come. We can’t let him buy this election.
**3) I’m the only candidate running who has the experience and grit to bring down costs and fight for everyday Californians.** The other candidates might talk a big game, but they are either out-of-touch or just don’t care about us.
**[I hope I was able to help you “reclaim” some time with this email. And if you found it informative about my race, I hope you’ll donate $5 to my campaign today.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260125_1_ak.sah95Y&refcode=em20260125-40752&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40752%2E3422442%2ES6vOwr)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260125_1_ak.sah95Y&refcode=em20260125-40752&t=22&akid=40752%2E3422442%2ES6vOwr)
Thank you,
Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260125-40752&amounts=&t=23&refcode2=40752_3422442_S6vOwr&akid=40752%2E3422442%2ES6vOwr)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=40752&t=24&akid=40752%2E3422442%2ES6vOwr)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=40752)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=40752&t=25&akid=40752%2E3422442%2ES6vOwr)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597

subject: Will we be ready for the fight ahead?

body:
I was sent to Congress to hold Trump accountable and fight for an economy that puts working people and vulnerable communities first. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWzNciDBE7u9R0pmNj-8imCRYIqPc-ZBrNTpxIFxB1q_HnqEH8NZaFIkQ_W4_QaO52amHI-_QHiKp6vh2WHVA1qw7OOerIaR_XR_oeGqcwKOn-KNQdRUKcE0z8O6B1S_irFYwQy4XgzF5nMHoDmFjPRJWs1jaQl3XoDAhjKtf9BXc/4nl/aDvUB0oURT23q8qqXiTkrg/h0/h001.OCcG9oWqqe0rlEDGF5KAaS2SEu3phOulv5qDxoJQAEE)

Friend, This weekend, we launched our re-election campaign for Congress amidst Trump and ICE’s ongoing violence against our communities. I need your support, not just to power our movement to stand up to Trump, but to prepare for our Democratic primary election. We recently learned that two candidates have filed to run against us and we’ve seen outside groups polling residents in order to gauge whether they should get involved in the race. We saw what happened in the 2024 election when right-wing AIPAC millionaires flooded Democratic primaries, defeating two of our progressive allies. That’s why we’re preparing now for our re-election, because we need voices in Congress who are willing to take on the billionaire bullies, corporate greed, and the pro-genocide lobby. [**Click here to watch our campaign launch video, then donate $5 or more to power our re-election campaign and continue our fight for justice, accountability, and an affordable economy for all.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu9Yfu_EsjM14YJHGp1KebT7R2u9fqYjjMS1bFDk05PEtqRRuVweYemtnLykCQce-o0SlCd9z8J9nGH4WBOVtrzwKIPuQFznBTkUBP6Qsz_it4rBzda-zacK-4-4WzWxfa-bTeqi7AEN633QEOjEv4p8ABjlq22KEZqP0QNghHgBqx6SExejiqJ9WL4A0S4dgK7hcbhPmmPDSf79pKlgvYgHr6RTIJgFoFvaRtAbk1-ssggPEL99yG5QPoJlwiylWs-vLJ-_pTDx_LzMv6nwBh_do02PXwwV6fB1C6lVpbXkDbHygFz9lI2MbHh8Fex37tLhHwPh9M9IvS_UFEnVNxM/4nl/aDvUB0oURT23q8qqXiTkrg/h1/h001.lxMy2u6ku0nKBvAPdDj_AaGZfyI8evROaxmynxI29v8) [****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu9Yfu_EsjM14YJHGp1KebT7R2u9fqYjjMS1bFDk05PErpvUywreDat_DBui9CZjLmHrMklqgaRF8zHijcv13dNusccVvVmoNGcZ8EXyUsLlMTR3cgm0neq6Rt3d43NF-grzHjzlU81-6rv893xuE31LMRe2muCdunK4bMxa4dFr4kBQe6sWtZmguHVtF_R1V8oPJD2R4v3VGyN-SbmGDiD40_OC0H8vM_JU6WsUcH7GEgn3btKhGAopRuBpvupCuxK0KmYgnNDhpeVJy01kU0o2N60sTRL7c1nr2GQHEH9AnZCcHv-U7KivUMt1j10tTotvJZrmKeUROi_UyuDSmlP/4nl/aDvUB0oURT23q8qqXiTkrg/h2/h001.Oj7-Ei1MK-B9fvi1JA6uwjCKzKTee-9VpylJAYL9QKk) | [WATCH & DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu9Yfu_EsjM14YJHGp1KebT7R2u9fqYjjMS1bFDk05PEo00K2PFpMfKLhqxJtBUqIe_Ex89UYorVw7AkGhOJe9-KzqNxz1_s8TQdHsMJS2jPGfyngkLBEFMKK1pVszxaN_RaX7PyXs6xHebrcURdqCDYg4AbzWekWBNTMPSDhX80JBXNb4gUFW07aJd7GxPQ-Vs0XlS0DUCo-mSNkrDC7iGG_L4da2JKgRyWIWguhRhteNS1ur0MFuUOitNL819Cu1jJHOVQlUvN-lUey-91epfECuU52eTt-IH5KoH0ejQ8D8thPardx4NwYXbtOAWkP1-65fx900zYREvX99zuB2t/4nl/aDvUB0oURT23q8qqXiTkrg/h3/h001.h9Y3T7rWZe0V_LS4mvLp4-2zNF4kkhy1_iItCB-uvkc)
---
I was sent to Congress to hold Trump accountable and fight for an economy that puts working people and vulnerable communities first. During his first term in office, we impeached Trump not once, but twice.
In my time in Congress, I’ve introduced and passed legislation that invests in clean water, stopped water shutoffs, and invests directly in our communities, including in senior and community centers. In my district alone, we’ve invested $52 million:
✔ $23.6 Million for Community Spaces _(parks, schools, health centers, green spaces, and more)_
✔ $12.3 Million for Water Projects _(lead pipe replacement, water lines/systems, pumps)_
✔ $6.6 Million for Housing _(affordable, home repairs, shelters)_
✔ $5.5 Million for Economic Development _(training, workforce, broadband, and more)_
✔ $2 Million for Roads
✔ $1.5 Million for Public Services _(fire department and equipment)_
**I am running for re-election because our work together in Congress is far from done.**
We’re demanding justice from Detroit to Gaza. We’re demanding ICE out of our communities and an end to forced family separation. We’re demanding an economy that puts everyday people first, not billionaires and greedy corporations. And, instead of more blank checks for war and military aggression, we’re demanding investments in our communities here at home.
[**Donate today to power our re-election campaign and fight for a future that includes all of us, not just the wealthy few.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu9Yfu_EsjM14YJHGp1KebT7R2u9fqYjjMS1bFDk05PEhYySfLm7HLA6qXEhaoluN0EBDrEDqb9_kNCKsuG3YcwzwkLVnCyGc334wqrkPxPp9tiVWY5JCp0LyKlM4bTD50jtAApENGRkcvPMskdHNKYRhigGLKZDZBmAhlpfMIECLrFmFwb-a6msKJ6d6DT9lnrrmPsplvvAP2_t8fND5eQCM2gdKC1-o5ueA18wlO52a_HKloJvdK_-098Ahr0LN03HJXnAWYCU1Zyw_Gr8po1AqbSu2MOFP6IWX9qNtLqwKOQFFRl1ajjlVWuXLoc34vxas-8jQ8y0I_PpD6ncrBA/4nl/aDvUB0oURT23q8qqXiTkrg/h4/h001.q9DkkOXpzho7gJLqkD7IPE7J3IoTdDHeRnC3E7E9HTY)

clean_body: I was sent to Congress to hold Trump accountable and fight for an economy that puts working people and vulnerable communities first. | | | Friend, This weekend, we launched our re-election campaign for Congress amidst Trump and ICE’s ongoing violence against our communities. I need your support, not just to power our movement to stand up to Trump, but to prepare for our Democratic primary election. We recently learned that two candidates have filed to run against us and we’ve seen outside groups polling residents in order to gauge whether they should get involved in the race. We saw what happened in the 2024 election when right-wing AIPAC millionaires flooded Democratic primaries, defeating two of our progressive allies. That’s why we’re preparing now for our re-election, because we need voices in Congress who are willing to take on the billionaire bullies, corporate greed, and the pro-genocide lobby. | I was sent to Congress to hold Trump accountable and fight for an economy that puts working people and vulnerable communities first. During his first term in office, we impeached Trump not once, but twice. In my time in Congress, I’ve introduced and passed legislation that invests in clean water, stopped water shutoffs, and invests directly in our communities, including in senior and community centers. In my district alone, we’ve invested $52 million: ✔ $23.6 Million for Community Spaces (parks, schools, health centers, green spaces, and more) ✔ $12.3 Million for Water Projects (lead pipe replacement, water lines/systems, pumps) ✔ $6.6 Million for Housing (affordable, home repairs, shelters) ✔ $5.5 Million for Economic Development (training, workforce, broadband, and more) ✔ $2 Million for Roads ✔ $1.5 Million for Public Services (fire department and equipment) I am running for re-election because our work together in Congress is far from done. We’re demanding justice from Detroit to Gaza. We’re demanding ICE out of our communities and an end to forced family separation. We’re demanding an economy that puts everyday people first, not billionaires and greedy corporations. And, instead of more blank checks for war and military aggression, we’re demanding investments in our communities here at home. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for being by my side as, together, we demand a government that puts everyday people first. Always serving you, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Jasmine Clark
subject: ICE brings chaos everywhere they go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Clark for Georgia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260125em-ice-fr-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260125em-ice-fr-rs]
In Minnesota, we’ve seen ICE officials shoot community members with impunity.
Here in Georgia, ICE agents raided a factory and left workers and families traumatized.
Parents were taken away in front of their kids. People were dragged out of their jobs. Entire communities were thrown into panic.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260125em-ice-fr-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260125em-ice-fr-rs]
It was so extreme that even Republicans were shaken by what they saw.
Everywhere ICE goes, they bring chaos and destruction. This was never about public safety. It was never about order or the rule of law.
The cruelty was always the point.
And now, politicians in power want us to get used to it. To look away. To accept this as normal.
I won’t. And I know you won’t either.
I’m running for Congress because Georgia deserves leaders who will stand up for working families, for immigrants, and for basic human dignity—no matter who’s in the White House or which agency is out of control.
But standing up like this comes with a cost. The forces behind this cruelty are well-funded, well-organized, and counting on fear to keep them in power. So if you’re able, please chip in today to help me keep fighting back → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260125em-ice-fr-rs]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260125em-ice-fr-rs]
Together, we can prove that fear doesn’t win in Georgia. Humanity does.
Dr. Jasmine Clark
Democratic Candidate for Georgia's 13th District

name: High Alert:
subject: Important Notice: Meat Warning
body:
Massive food hoarding warning
[unsubscribe](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x69jow166jo1opkmvmi0vgvvqlgpe5hf7tjko50swk7fiw4o11sgps8uyj7pcmj3u2pnmw912ahifp67dlnvppgfzdq5t&__stmp=t9fp2g&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
Please read the message below from our sponsor.
* * *
**HIGH ALERT: Shocking Meat Shortages Are Coming – Prepare Now** [](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=1zrqsfj1zbtzmt5dlw94oao3k3olqs8lph1peieh60nr59o0of38un43j1773y7qr7i7d9a3cyu4ct3bvc989pze80h3943zf11rp3zo0qtf0bh2uckz1cqvedyb7itn9buqarlpix3yl09x5t3jha7g7nd58juqqvs0o42mw2gb5jd00des4qx3z31rqb8gmpama8u3b0d974m5ntpdwyhu6jwmydzg50&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t9fp2g&__onlt=h) **The USDA predicts meat production shortages for the first time since 2014, and the U.N. warns of "an unprecedented global hunger crisis".** Which means 2 dangerous things for you: 1\. Higher prices at the grocery store
2\. Less meat available That's why meat must be a vital part of your survival food stockpile. But there is a catch. Not all protein is created equal. And this is so critical to understand, especially in a crisis. See, your protein needs to meet 4 critical requirements: It needs to:
* Last a while
* Taste great
* Store without refrigeration
* Can't break the bank

**Spoiler alert: most protein options fall short!** Take peanut butter. Sure, most people see it as a survival food protein staple. But did you know most cans are full of added sugars? Plus, they don't last more than a few months. A year tops. Grocery store meat doesn't work either. First, it's expensive. If you've been to the grocery store recently, you know what I'm talking about. Meat prices are up big time over the past year. But it also needs to be refrigerated. So if a blackout hits and cuts power to your home, you might as well use it as a paperweight. But don't worry friend. **There is a protein option that checks all four boxes:**
* This option is guaranteed to last at least 5 years.
* It doesn't need to be refrigerated.

name: Steve Toth
subject: Freezing Temps Continue
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOTH FOR CONGRESS
body:
Please Restrict Travel

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2eb5386993ca/help-me-defeat-dan-crenshaw-18000366?e=8644c7c4ea)
---
| | | | |
---
| | Friends,
Thankfully, the grid is currently standing strong - there are currently no power plants down; and no transmission and distribution lines that were downed by trees.
That being said, there have been some isolated outages caused by neighborhood trees that have fallen, and cars on slick roads that have struck utility poles.
TXDOT is requesting everyone restrict travel due to wet roads that are still at risk of freezing, and causing dangerous conditions. However, if you must travel, travel with caution, and please check road conditions and closures online at [**https://drivetexas.org**](https://stevetothfortexas.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=745dccd8f2a199e78ada8c93b&id=6de4f7d70f&e=8644c7c4ea "https://drivetexas.org/")**,** or call 1-800-452-9292.
The current forecast indicates freezing temperatures today and parts of the day on Monday. By noon Tuesday, temperatures are expected to start warming. Be advised, our area is still under a _Winter Storm Warning_ (see below).

My team and I are staying in close communication with emergency services and will keep you informed as needed.
We are praying for the safety of all, especially those most vulnerable during this time.
In Service,
Steve TothCell 281-770-7287
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |

### Winter Storm Warning
* * *

URGENT - WINTER WEATHER MESSAGE
National Weather Service Houston/Galveston TX
147 AM CST Sun Jan 25 2026
TXZ195>199-260000-
/O.CON.KHGX.WS.W.0001.000000T0000Z-260126T0000Z/
Burleson-Brazos-Washington-Grimes-Montgomery-
Including the cities of Somerville, Bryan, Caldwell, Navasota,
Conroe, The Woodlands, Brenham, and College Station
147 AM CST Sun Jan 25 2026
...WINTER STORM WARNING REMAINS IN EFFECT UNTIL 6 PM CST THIS
EVENING...
* WHAT...Significant icing expected. Total ice accumulations between
one quarter and four tenths of an inch. Total sleet accumulations
up to a half inch.
* WHERE...Brazos, Burleson, Grimes, Montgomery, and Washington
Counties.
* WHEN...Until 6 PM CST this evening.
* IMPACTS...Travel could be nearly impossible, especially on bridges
and overpasses. Power outages and tree damage are possible due to
the ice.
PRECAUTIONARY/PREPAREDNESS ACTIONS...
Travel is strongly discouraged. If you must travel, keep an extra
flashlight, food, and water in your vehicle in case of an emergency.
Prepare for possible power outages. The latest road conditions for
the state you are calling from can be obtained by calling 5 1 1

clean_body: Please Restrict Travel | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Friends, Thankfully, the grid is currently standing strong - there are currently no power plants down; and no transmission and distribution lines that were downed by trees. That being said, there have been some isolated outages caused by neighborhood trees that have fallen, and cars on slick roads that have struck utility poles. TXDOT is requesting everyone restrict travel due to wet roads that are still at risk of freezing, and causing dangerous conditions. However, if you must travel, travel with caution, and please check road conditions and closures online at "", or call 1-800-452-9292. The current forecast indicates freezing temperatures today and parts of the day on Monday. By noon Tuesday, temperatures are expected to start warming. Be advised, our area is still under a Winter Storm Warning (see below). My team and I are staying in close communication with emergency services and will keep you informed as needed. We are praying for the safety of all, especially those most vulnerable during this time. In Service, Steve TothCell 281-770-7287 | | | | | | | | | | | | | Winter Storm Warning URGENT - WINTER WEATHER MESSAGE National Weather Service Houston/Galveston TX 147 AM CST Sun Jan 25 2026 TXZ195>199-260000- /O.CON.KHGX.WS.W.0001.000000T0000Z-260126T0000Z/ Burleson-Brazos-Washington-Grimes-Montgomery- Including the cities of Somerville, Bryan, Caldwell, Navasota, Conroe, The Woodlands, Brenham, and College Station 147 AM CST Sun Jan 25 2026 ...WINTER STORM WARNING REMAINS IN EFFECT UNTIL 6 PM CST THIS EVENING... WHAT...Significant icing expected. Total ice accumulations between one quarter and four tenths of an inch. Total sleet accumulations up to a half inch. WHERE...Brazos, Burleson, Grimes, Montgomery, and Washington Counties. WHEN...Until 6 PM CST this evening. * IMPACTS...Travel could be nearly impossible, especially on bridges and overpasses. Power outages and tree damage are possible due to the ice. PRECAUTIONARY/PREPAREDNESS ACTIONS... Travel is strongly discouraged. If you must travel, keep an extra flashlight, food, and water in your vehicle in case of an emergency. Prepare for possible power outages. The latest road conditions for the state you are calling from can be obtained by calling 5 1 1 | | | Entergy Emergency contact 800-968-8243CenterPoint Emergency contact 713-207-2222 Please remember you can contact the HD15 State office at 512-463-0797. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2026 Toth for Congress. All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Toth for Congress PO Box 7657 The Woodlands, TX 77387 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or | | | PAID FOR BY TOTH FOR CONGRESS

name: Donald John Trump
subject: I want to try and get to Heaven.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
I believe He saved me for a reason, and this is why I think He did it!
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
Friend,
**I want to try and get to Heaven.**
I came millimeters from death when that bullet pierced through my skin. My triumphant return to the White House was never supposed to happen!
But I believe that God saved me for one reason: **TO MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**
I wasn’t supposed to beat Crooked Hillary in 2016 — but I did.
I wasn’t supposed to secure the border & build the greatest economy in history — but I did.
I certainly wasn’t supposed to survive an assassin’s bullet — but by the grace of the almighty God, I did.
SO NOW, I have no other choice but to answer the Call to Duty, but I can’t do it alone.
Friend, you’ve been with me through everything.
You were there when they launched: the Russia Hoax, the first Impeachment, the second Impeachment, the rigged 2020 election, the Raid on Mar-a-Lago, the Arrest and Mugshot at the Fulton County Jail, the Removal from the CO ballot, the sham cases in DC / FL / NY / DC, the first Assassination attempt, the second Assassination attempt, and so much more!
Just because I won in a HISTORIC landslide and have unleashed the Golden Age of America, **THAT DOESN’T MEAN WE CAN TAKE OUR FOOT OFF THE GAS!**
The forces that hate our country don’t want a secure border or safe cities or high paying jobs. The Radical Left Lunatics want to STOP MAGA, but we’re not going to let them NO MATTER WHAT.
**Let me make this SOLEMN PLEDGE to you: I WILL NEVER SURRENDER!**
I put my life on the line willingly because this is what I was made to do, but our movement, the beautiful MAGA movement, is powered by YOU.
Every time they count us out – count YOU out – we come back bigger, better, and stronger than ever before.
This is our moment to show the world that we will NEVER back down, NEVER give an inch, and NEVER SURRENDER in our fight to save this country.
_That’s why I’ve launched a 24 HOUR TRUMP FUNDRAISING BLITZ, and I’m asking everyone to chip in $15 to make it one for the record books!_
**_[So if you’re with me all the way to the end, join with MILLIONS of your fellow PATRIOTS by chipping in $15 to keep the wins rolling in!>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
[GIVE $15](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Sincerely,
Donald John Trump

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

It’s Trump here. And we’ve just run into a problem...

After that, I will have to move on to the queue of Patriots who are eagerly waiting to activate their MAGA Elite Membership for 2026! Thank you, Donald J. clean_body: | | = Hi friend, I’m Kris Mayes, Arizona's Attorney General and proud supporter of Marlene Galán-Woods. Before I share more about the stakes of this race, = | | = I first learned about Marlene when she was working as a broadcast journalist whose mission was to fight for the truth and expose corruption. I’ve known her as someone who puts Arizonans at the core of her work, fighting hard to refute disinformation and take down attacks on our democracy. It’s crucial she makes it to the Senate, to keep working not only for the people of AZ-01 or for Arizonans across the state, but for Americans across the country. We have the chance to elect a real leader in AZ-01, flip a toss-up district, and take back control of the House. name: Cooper HQ
subject: Grade the National GOP
body:
Need to register your opinion, Peter.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=411%2E124072%2EJylAsy)
Peter, Republicans have one-party control in Washington. They are in charge of what’s happening, from Medicaid cuts, to international chaos, to rising grocery prices. The GOP might think that they can do whatever they please and that we will just have to accept it. But elected officials serve us — the people — and we deserve a say in the path this country takes. _That’s why we want to know how YOU would grade elected Republicans’ job performance, Peter._ **[Share your grade below👇](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_Grade_the_GOP_012526/?source=em_RC_PET_GradetheGOP_012526&t=7&akid=411%2E124072%2EJylAsy)** | [A](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_Grade_the_GOP_012526/?source=em_RC_PET_GradetheGOP_012526&t=8&akid=411%2E124072%2EJylAsy)
---
[B](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_Grade_the_GOP_012526/?source=em_RC_PET_GradetheGOP_012526&t=9&akid=411%2E124072%2EJylAsy)
[C](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_Grade_the_GOP_012526/?source=em_RC_PET_GradetheGOP_012526&t=10&akid=411%2E124072%2EJylAsy)
[D](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_Grade_the_GOP_012526/?source=em_RC_PET_GradetheGOP_012526&t=11&akid=411%2E124072%2EJylAsy)
[F](https://act.roycooper.com/survey/em_RC_PET_Grade_the_GOP_012526/?source=em_RC_PET_GradetheGOP_012526&t=12&akid=411%2E124072%2EJylAsy)
The GOP needs to know that we WILL hold them accountable for their actions. That means speaking out when politicians fail us.
Thank you for registering your opinion,
Team Cooper
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=411%2E124072%2EJylAsy)**

The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. Folks - Michele Tafoya here!

My whole life led me to this moment.

I spent decades as a sideline reporter for professional football and basketball. I covered more Minnesota games than I can count. And I raised two children with my husband outside Minneapolis. I love Minnesota.

However, what's happening here hits a little too close to home.

**1.** I watched as Tim Walz sent my tax dollars to fraudulent daycares. **2.** I watched as career politicians handed out billions to illegal immigrants while our veterans slept on the streets. **3.** I watched as violent rioters burned down my city in 2020. **4.** I watched as protesters stormed a St. Paul church to intimidate Sunday worshippers.

**[I refuse to let Minnesota be destroyed at the hands of Tim Walz and the political class. That’s why I'm announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/wUflurhteHu4SU3X0gicbDZF4tVg7R0XS5DS5Nx-0DaC29SSPkCjrekpauV0m2chZQK2XAFjoC7pG3EEjiW2p8M-saEyOrrOLMgd0Ri6T16rqfhKJqnmT2got9sYjk58V-03C2HxcjWZqRy68EUbDjCQF53M9ALGD1KgjGhLAukds6Hh1UioTjoq6Hx3Q3Pdm5CxnynLotLHb1nN7sAoVxCqgsgxxWHTia5kLdjVXojhfthXLUVBe4J6V4wuC3xVwV13sdKdJ097YWx5qMQC4OUg3jczZzZp7ovJorKwXg5ADocP2XuXlq-0LF46QF5Ur2WBc9TyyE52DMedsvs5aT63un9ujsHpq5dSOoXfYR8pQYVOqRYaBTwOGtD5QvEp4qa6hVl4dm3wSLHAamk43qWvvNCxud9vgoLSYy3plc6fKA2D6JuWKkhCfDnUyn9x8m83Huv2UGrRBdlZs0ri9lQbcvRP0rLGH-b1LYrFSBGS7R6Swtaa9AYHqCZRyD7ErkW2EZ5v9iSgN_PbmPdoeZbDSM1aKN1HR3uigQR0tB2lx4m8DOdsrUVG1I8scWi3tSrBKxzBWkAgonlkTsmxqD80QQV-0gBWJKQTG3hC_vK4wZrs998aP5QgY1c388fP0YGaPDrbRgxz2IHyzwHqtbG6LlvQ33lX3If1Z0ip5UtJ0w2Kx0AiKXbq54QrVC6EQ5d5lSuLuOKIKGp0H4sCfYy8fhTwzCsnOhmb2PDjhFHN7SWltv6-KES03CYSsR6zwzCSDg7swS2NVFqnnfQ1renMQiaEtcnQpuNdzY9-nUonJpt84YUKa5GJyd8Xcdeah7RECWmP2ET4rDRiuG1Lf2xBTPyEIiaYdywQvNl4VQ4dUx2Cn-Mvs1G9Ww3P5kmzAZHPDzhFOLVEE-dQ1558JsSKlfXB4I0A3lvnpLLR0Vo3_hW4K_uip51qMuEVhxJLpx4vdqYyG9i9sFoEHcV91WKnzk9OjNuyhObPimt4wepPc5GycBsOxcewqCrE4oubW39rW0z72GmqPNSvp7b1zL2WOHi7rOX7z7dJ06VWnw/bo9mewYjIToGpvdGK8eIT_BTyNOc32Wd/17)**

We have the opportunity of a LIFETIME to take back this state in the name of sanity. I know we can win, but only if I can fund a winning campaign.

clean_body: Folks - Michele Tafoya here! My whole life led me to this moment. I spent decades as a sideline reporter for professional football and basketball. I covered more Minnesota games than I can count. And I raised two children with my husband outside Minneapolis. I love Minnesota. However, what's happening here hits a little too close to home. 1. I watched as Tim Walz sent my tax dollars to fraudulent daycares. 2. I watched as career politicians handed out billions to illegal immigrants while our veterans slept on the streets. 3. I watched as violent rioters burned down my city in 2020. 4. I watched as protesters stormed a St. Paul church to intimidate Sunday worshippers. We have the opportunity of a LIFETIME to take back this state in the name of sanity. I know we can win, but only if I can fund a winning campaign. Will you help me get off the ground by becoming a founding donor today? ****************************************************************************************************** Listen - as a sideline reporter and as a mother, I've seen up close and personal what the far-Left has done to our country. This goes against everything I believe in. When I shock the world and win this race, this divisiveness and corruption will come to a SCREECHING HALT. Unfortunately, the far-Left has raised 100+ million dollars to destroy our momentum and end my campaign for good. That 's exactly what will happen if this email fails. Your support will mean the difference between victory and defeat in Minnesota. **************************************************************************************************** Let's make history together - God bless you! Be brave. Do good. - Michele ** Republican for Senate, Minnesota | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

I was a sideline reporter for pro football and basketball. I covered some of the most exciting games in history. I watched sports for a living. And I loved every minute, every touchdown, and every Hail Mary.

And I believe a no-BS, sane person who 's ALL-IN can win this seat. But I'd be lying if I said fundraising doesn't make a difference in a race like this. The far-Left is readying a FORTUNE to drown out our message and take this seat out of play. Our path to victory solely depends on raising enough to keep up. My finance team tells me we 'll need to bring in 10,000 founding donors ASAP so we can: 1) Hire staff, 2) Recruit volunteers in every corner of the state, 3) Print yard signs, 4) Launch our first advertising blitz, and 5) Start contacting on-the-fence voters. I 'm afraid that'll make the difference between a winning campaign and a losing one. put my career on hold to speak out for what I know to be true. I 'm committing my blood, sweat, and tears to take this seat back from the political class. I 'd be honored if you'd be willing to stand alongside me. Donations in these early days make the biggest impact on our path to victory. I hope you 'll join us, but either way, God bless you! Be brave. Do good. - Michele Michele TafoyaRepublican for Senate, Minnesota official - Michele Tafoya is running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota! Endorse her here:**| | Paid for by Tafoya for Senate 3500 Vicksburg LN N, STE 267, Plymouth, MN 55447

name: VoteVets.org
subject: Alex Pretti
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Alex Pretti was a VA nurse. Someone who devoted his life to helping veterans.
#
Alex Pretti was shot and killed by federal agents in Minneapolis yesterday.
After the shooting, members of the Trump administration smeared his name. Stephen Miller called him a "would-be assassin" who "tried to murder federal law enforcement."
Lies.
Alex Pretti was a VA nurse. Someone who devoted his life to helping veterans. Late last night, his parents asked everyone to "get the truth out about our son."
And since we have a platform, that's what we're going to do. Here's what they had to say:
> "The sickening lies told about our son by the administration are reprehensible and disgusting. Alex is clearly not holding a gun when attacked by Trump’s murdering and cowardly ICE thugs. He has his phone in his right hand and his empty left hand is raised above his head while trying to protect the woman ICE just pushed down all while being pepper sprayed."
> Petti was not attempting to harm anyone. He was swarmed, beaten, and disarmed by vicious federal agents who were looking for someone to hurt. Once they had removed his gun — which he had a legal permit to carry — they executed him in cold blood by firing numerous bullets into him. Then, the Trump administration proceeded to immediately falsely smear him as a "terrorist" who wanted to carry out a mass shooting against law enforcement. They're utterly shameless."
Here's a video of Alex honoring a veteran who passed while he was working at the VA.
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/19422?t=1&akid=34900%2E3013755%2E1_kh3s)
Thank you for reading.
The team at VoteVets

body:
This is how New Dems are fighting back >>

| **Friend, New Dems are urging Kristi Noem to defend health care access and prevent further disruptions to patient care nationwide.**

New Dem Reps. Emilia Sykes (OH-13) and Terri Sewell (AL-07) led a letter urging the Department of Homeland Security to exempt healthcare workers from a new H-1B visa fee.

With the U.S. already facing critical shortages of medical professionals, this new fee will worsen workforce shortages, raise costs, and reduce access to care, particularly in rural and underserved communities.

As New Dems, access to health care is one of our top priorities.

**As Trump-appointed leaders continue to threaten access to affordable care, we will continue to fight to ensure that Americans get access to the essential care they need.**

But friend, with the MAGA Republican majority giving Trump and his allies a blank check to attack Americans’ access to care, we’re fighting to overhaul a majority and pass our agenda every day.

clean_body: This is how New Dems are fighting back >> | Friend, New Dems are urging Kristi Noem to defend health care access and prevent further disruptions to patient care nationwide. New Dem Reps. Emilia Sykes (OH-13) and Terri Sewell (AL-07) led a letter urging the Department of Homeland Security to exempt healthcare workers from a new H-1B visa fee. With the U.S. already facing critical shortages of medical professionals, this new fee will worsen workforce shortages, raise costs, and reduce access to care, particularly in rural and underserved communities. As New Dems, access to health care is one of our top priorities. As Trump-appointed leaders continue to threaten access to affordable care, we will continue to fight to ensure that Americans get access to the essential care they need. But friend, with the MAGA Republican majority giving Trump and his allies a blank check to attack Americans’ access to care, we’re fighting to overhaul a majority and pass our agenda every day. name: The Texas Flyover
subject: A different email.
body:
A personal note just for Texas readers--with only days left to act.
****

---
| | |
---
| |
#
---
Dear _Texas Flyover_ Reader, This email is different. **It 's all about Texas - and time is short.** I'm not writing to you as just another _Flyover_ reader. I'm writing to you as a Texan -- to fellow Texans -- about something we're building together. After we built _The Flyover_ , we launched state editions. But we didn't launch everywhere. We launched Texas first -- deliberately. Because Texas is different. **Texas is independent. We are proud. We 're practical.** Texans don't want to be talked down to, lectured, or spoon-fed an agenda from legacy, big city media. We want facts. We want context and we want common-sense. And we want news that understands our state -- from Galveston to Amarillo, El Paso to Marble Falls, Midland to San Marcos, and Round Rock to Fort Worth. That's why we built _The Texas Flyover_. And I want you to know something personal: I'm not just the founder of _The Flyover_ -- I'm a Texan. I live in Llano County. Texas is home. This state isn't a market to me. It's personal. Because Texas is special, I've poured real resources into Texas. Since we opened our investment round and gave Texas readers the chance to become owners, we've taken those initial investments and invested heavily in growing _The Texas Flyover_. Today, the _Texas Flyover_ is more than 400,000 readers strong -- one of the largest and most important state publication in all of Texas - and the largest editions in our state portfolio. Texas isn't just a reader base; it's a driver of profitability for _The Flyover_. Because of you -- our Texas readers -- _The Flyover_ has grown revenue strongly year over year, and gross profit has grown even faster. Texas has been central to that success. **That 's why this is a special ask.** I'm asking you, Texan to Texan: Will you consider being one of the final investors in _The Texas Flyover_? Time is almost out. We only have a few days left before this investment round closes, and I'd consider it a personal favor if you'd join _The_ _Texas Flyover_ family as an investor. Will you help us make Texas coverage deeper, stronger, and more independent? Will you stand with fellow Texas Flyover readers and help build the largest statewide source of unbiased, common-sense Texas news in the country? **_The Texas Flyover_ is written by Texans, for Texans.**
No corporate spin.
No legacy media bias.
No celebrity journalists chasing clicks. I started _The_ _Texas Flyover_ because I believed Texans weren't being served by the media -- and because I believed Texans would support something better if given the chance. **That chance is right now.** As a reader of _The Texas Flyover_ , you already know this: there are only days left to invest. We're working hard to close this round, and once it closes, that's it. If you've found value in opening _The Texas Flyover_ each morning...
If you believe Texas deserves news built here, not dictated from elsewhere...
If you want to help take our 415,000+ Texas readers to 1 million -- or even 2 million -- in 2026... I'm asking you to step forward and become an owner. 👉[ Invest in _The Flyover_ HERE.](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJys0b-OozAQBvCnMV2Q_4AJhYuTEF0uV5x011mOPYRZ2SaCIcm-_YpNot0H2Ppnf5pv5t_BHhxGzOffLoGh-zDZAAG9Iwg2w22JQASzdQGHAWbIBMlhtJJLveNiJ2vrh68fVRHMiYdWFGBEo1vViEroYjS8aYUKg6-DO3Gh5F7Bnle6BS25qhpVoNkiuZC15Fypugy1FN7z2ikQsm4DqzgEpGkuaQSCu1uG-D5dYS79lIpoRqLLwtQvJnsme8xXWKh8mzDTCN9ebqz6lZJdpnX2wFTXvcZnUm-QIOCamOqOtwxhd4CA7knepYvDc2aq6x-ZL5gyQSamur__e8wu_lmX8WkEc3rAsbNbQV3MJlxuGCMuumEVP287_exBP3GDq5EfAQAA__8l456C) Thank you for reading. Thank you for believing. And thank you for helping us build something special in Texas - that we can be proud of. With gratitude,
Guy Short
Founder,_The Flyover_
Llano County, Texas **P.S. We now have nine state editions -- but as you know, everything is bigger in Texas. Texas is already our largest state. Will you help me make Texas the largest investor state in the entire country for _The Flyover_ by being one of our final Texas investors?

[Invest today](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJys0b-OozAQBvCnMV2Q_4AJhYuTEF0uV5x011mOPYRZ2SaCIcm-_YpNot0H2Ppnf5pv5t_BHhxGzOffLoGh-zDZAAG9Iwg2w22JQASzdQGHAWbIBMlhtJJLveNiJ2vrh68fVRHMiYdWFGBEo1vViEroYjS8aYUKg6-DO3Gh5F7Bnle6BS25qhpVoNkiuZC15Fypugy1FN7z2ikQsm4DqzgEpGkuaQSCu1uG-D5dYS79lIpoRqLLwtQvJnsme8xXWKh8mzDTCN9ebqz6lZJdpnX2wFTXvcZnUm-QIOCamOqOtwxhd4CA7knepYvDc2aq6x-ZL5gyQSamur__e8wu_lmX8WkEc3rAsbNbQV3MJlxuGCMuumEVP287_exBP3GDq5EfAQAA__8l456C) **

And I want you to know something personal: I'm not just the founder of The Flyover -- I'm a Texan. I live in Llano County. Texas is home. This state isn't a market to me. It's personal. Because Texas is special, I've poured real resources into Texas. Since we opened our investment round and gave Texas readers the chance to become owners, we've taken those initial investments and invested heavily in growing The Texas Flyover. Today, the Texas Flyover is more than 400,000 readers strong -- one of the largest and most important state publication in all of Texas - and the largest editions in our state portfolio. Texas isn't just a reader base; it's a driver of profitability for The Flyover. Because of you -- our Texas readers -- The Flyover has grown revenue strongly year over year, and gross profit has grown even faster. Texas has been central to that success. That 's why this is a special ask. I'm asking you, Texan to Texan: Will you consider being one of the final investors in The Texas Flyover? Time is almost out. We only have a few days left before this investment round closes, and I'd consider it a personal favor if you'd join The Texas Flyover family as an investor. Will you help us make Texas coverage deeper, stronger, and more independent? Will you stand with fellow Texas Flyover readers and help build the largest statewide source of unbiased, common-sense Texas news in the country? The Texas Flyover is written by Texans, for Texans. No corporate spin. No legacy media bias. No celebrity journalists chasing clicks. I started The Texas Flyover because I believed Texans weren't being served by the media -- and because I believed Texans would support something better if given the chance. That chance is right now. As a reader of The Texas Flyover , you already know this: there are only days left to invest. We're working hard to close this round, and once it closes, that's it. If you've found value in opening The Texas Flyover each morning... If you believe Texas deserves news built here, not dictated from elsewhere... If you want to help take our 415,000+ Texas readers to 1 million -- or even 2 million -- in 2026... I'm asking you to step forward and become an owner. 👉 Thank you for reading. Thank you for believing. And thank you for helping us build something special in Texas - that we can be proud of. With gratitude, Guy Short Founder,The Flyover Llano County, Texas P.S. We now have nine state editions -- but as you know, everything is bigger in Texas. Texas is already our largest state. Will you help me make Texas the largest investor state in the entire country for The Flyover by being one of our final Texas investors? | Equity crowdfunding investments in private placements, and start-up investments in particular, are speculative and involve a high degree of risk and those investors who cannot afford to lose their entire investment should not invest in start-ups. And I believe a no-BS, sane person who 's ALL-IN can win this seat. But I'd be lying if I said fundraising doesn't make a difference in a race like this. The far-Left is readying a FORTUNE to drown out our message and take this seat out of play. Our path to victory solely depends on raising enough to keep up. My finance team tells me we 'll need to bring in 10,000 founding donors ASAP so we can: 1) Hire staff, 2) Recruit volunteers in every corner of the state, 3) Print yard signs, 4) Launch our first advertising blitz, and 5) Start contacting on-the-fence voters. I 'm afraid that'll make the difference between a winning campaign and a losing one. put my career on hold to speak out for what I know to be true. I 'm committing my blood, sweat, and tears to take this seat back from the political class. I 'd be honored if you'd be willing to stand alongside me. Donations in these early days make the biggest impact on our path to victory. I hope you 'll join us, but either way, God bless you! Be brave. Do good. - Michele Michele TafoyaRepublican for Senate, Minnesota official - Michele Tafoya is running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota! name: Julie Johnson
subject: I am not afraid to stand up and fight when our rights are on the line.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Peter —

I’m reaching out because our nation is in crisis.

Across the country. ICE is rounding up Americans on the streets,
unlawfully detaining them, and even executing unarmed protesters.

I am not afraid to stand up and fight when our rights are on the line.

I’m the Vice-Ranking member on the House Homeland Security Committee, and
I’m taking Kristi Noem and ICE to task — for denying due process,
terrorizing our communities, and abusing their power. I’ve even signed
articles of impeachment to hold Kristi Noem accountable.

Now, I’m facing a well-funded primary opponent who chose to stand with
Republicans when Texas communities needed a Democrat with a backbone. He
voted against due process for immigrants (twice) and gave Trump unchecked
power to go after nonprofits that serve our communities.

Right now, we need to put all of our support behind good Democrats who
take a stand against Trump’s extremism — not “Democrats” who help him get
away with it.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/51821?c0=pj-email-20260125.DepiYH&refcode=em20260125-5842&t=1001&akid=5842%2E420207%2EYzJZi5 ]I have just over a month to win this crucial primary election, so if
you can, a small donation of $5 or $10 split between my campaign
and Pramila Jayapal’s would help keep me in this fight. Can you chip in to
my campaign today?

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/51821?c0=pj-email-20260125.DepiYH&refcode=em20260125-5842&t=1020&akid=5842%2E420207%2EYzJZi5 ]Donate

If I lose my election, we all lose – because Trump’s inhumane immigration
policies gain another vote.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/51821?c0=pj-email-20260125.DepiYH&refcode=em20260125-5842&t=1021&akid=5842%2E420207%2EYzJZi5 ]So if you’re able, will you split a $5 or $10 donation today? Thank
you,

Julie Johnson
TX-33

name: Ro Khanna
subject: TAKE ACTION: Replace ICE and prosecute agents who broke the law
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
ICE agents just executed another American in Minneapolis, firing multiple shots while he was on the ground.
ICE has become a rogue, militarized police force, striking fear into the hearts of our communities at Trump’s orders. They aren’t just coming after undocumented immigrants. They are coming after all of us—immigrants and American citizens alike.
Congress has the power to put an end to this. Democrats must do everything they can to restore and defend the rule of law. That means tearing down ICE, holding agents accountable, and establishing an agency with oversight.
ADD YOUR NAME: Replace ICE and prosecute the ICE officers who broke the law. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/replace-ice-petition?contactdata=OgEPZeygXWLf7jjHqI1qi0IjfTzEXc6cgI02WW/fqYo4OJrIolSYPw/x7n8ivj17S5nsZFpFqUYDaInqXtBI+gjyCLHKeKW5+dnRtGmr/WoA4fAddVroL3aLEhnjcxHhTrLSXUfKtqF7zZbfaaS54Zg5ePy2/NKavv3CAkd9xoI0OS2r8MRFQyDzF9ompqHg]

TAKE ACTION [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/replace-ice-petition?contactdata=OgEPZeygXWLf7jjHqI1qi0IjfTzEXc6cgI02WW/fqYo4OJrIolSYPw/x7n8ivj17S5nsZFpFqUYDaInqXtBI+gjyCLHKeKW5+dnRtGmr/WoA4fAddVroL3aLEhnjcxHhTrLSXUfKtqF7zZbfaaS54Zg5ePy2/NKavv3CAkd9xoI0OS2r8MRFQyDzF9ompqHg]

In solidarity,
Ro

#### _**[Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and expand our team with a video editor. If you've been enjoying the work, now's the time to back it. Paid subscribers make it possible--just $8/month makes a huge difference:](https://substack.com/redirect/7d2f6f53-3e8a-443e-8612-57dd90d511ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/7d2f6f53-3e8a-443e-8612-57dd90d511ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Hey folks,
I walked through the cold, snowy Chicago morning to record this emergency session with my friend and neighbor Adam Mockler (of YouTube fame), because after the murder of Alex Peretti by ICE agents, I needed to speak plainly--and needed you to hear from someone who's just as fired up. We break down the footage, the federal response, and the moral stakes in real time. Don't miss this one.
* **[00:01:04]** Adam describes the emotional rollercoaster of the last few weeks--from hope in the protests to devastation after the shooting of Alex Peretti.
* **[00:04:08]** We unpack the full sequence of events from the viral video, showing how Alex was pepper sprayed, tackled, and executed for trying to help someone.
* **[00:10:56]** A major shift in the Senate: Chuck Schumer rallies Democrats to oppose the DHS appropriations bill, with Mark Warner reversing his position.
* **[00:15:29]** I go off on the failure of ICE culture, the silence of the NRA, and what it says that Second Amendment defenders have gone quiet.
* **[00:26:05]** We close with a warning about the stakes--this administration is desperate, dangerous, and betting we'll get numb. We can't.

With urgency,
--Mike

clean_body: Watch now (31 mins) | Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and expand our team with a video editor. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? | | | | and | Jan 25 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | Hey folks, I walked through the cold, snowy Chicago morning to record this emergency session with my friend and neighbor Adam Mockler (of YouTube fame), because after the murder of Alex Peretti by ICE agents, I needed to speak plainly--and needed you to hear from someone who's just as fired up. We break down the footage, the federal response, and the moral stakes in real time. Don't miss this one. [00:01:04] Adam describes the emotional rollercoaster of the last few weeks--from hope in the protests to devastation after the shooting of Alex Peretti. [00:04:08] We unpack the full sequence of events from the viral video, showing how Alex was pepper sprayed, tackled, and executed for trying to help someone. [00:10:56] A major shift in the Senate: Chuck Schumer rallies Democrats to oppose the DHS appropriations bill, with Mark Warner reversing his position. [00:15:29] I go off on the failure of ICE culture, the silence of the NRA, and what it says that Second Amendment defenders have gone quiet. [00:26:05] We close with a warning about the stakes--this administration is desperate, dangerous, and betting we'll get numb. We can't. ** With urgency, --Mike | A guest post by| Contributor to MeidasTouch Mike Nellis is a Democratic strategist and entrepreneur who has raised over $1 billion for Democratic campaigns and causes. He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy. You 're currently a free subscriber to Endless Urgency with Mike Nellis. For the full experience or to support my work so I can keep it free for as many people as possible, upgrade your subscription. | | | | | | | (C) 2026 Mike Nellis 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

body:
MQS & Luke Macias moderate Jan 27: Join the only proven Trump ally through Biden years

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us10.campaign-archive.com/?e=4d3fe76c62&u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=42c4113efd)

| | | | | | Peter,

Mark your calendar for a must-attend event on Tuesday, January 27 – a major TX-21 Congressional Candidate Forum hosted jointly by the [**Fredericksburg Tea Party**](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=a5db04df98&e=4d3fe76c62)**** and****[**We The People Liberty in Action**](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=33370ff4de&e=4d3fe76c62)**.**
---
[|
---](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=0e3827308d&e=4d3fe76c62)
| |

**Tuesday, January 27, 2026****Inn on the Hills****1001 Junction Hwy, Kerrville, TX 78028**
* **5:30 PM** : Doors open – come early for good seats and to visit
* **6:00 PM – 8:00 PM** : Candidate Forum – moderated by two of Texas’ toughest conservative voices, Michael Quinn Sullivan and Luke Macias

With MQS and Luke Macias asking the questions, expect no softballs – just hard-hitting issues on the border, spending, freedoms, election integrity, and advancing President Trump’s America First agenda.
**I’m the only candidate in this race who has worked directly with President Trump since 2016 and fought for President Trump through the entire Biden Presidency.** As his appointed FEC Chairman, I defended him and our movement against relentless lawfare, media attacks, and deep-state overreach. I’m ready to bring that same proven loyalty and battle-tested experience to Congress for TX-21.
I’ll also **stay afterward** as long as needed to answer any additional questions – because earning your support means being fully accessible.
Grassroots events like this are how we choose the strongest fighter to keep TX-21 solidly conservative.
Bring your family, friends, and neighbors – let’s pack the room and send a clear message!
I look forward to seeing you there.
For Texas,
**Trey Trainor** Husband, Father of 6, Proven Conservative Fighter for TX-21
P.S. Doors open at 5:30 PM – arrive early for the best seats!
---

# _Opinion:_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1e47f7bb-3b67-4146-b6ec-70f0fc53f110?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
### **Help us replace the mainstream media by becoming a PolitiBrawl Member:**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..RURdqfWDA7fwhqROFlq_nrqEQ4KpuIOWp89kFi5-T9k?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=185648110)
* * *
The high for today in Minneapolis and St. Paul was in the negatives. Not the wind chill, but the actual temperature. Despite the dangerous cold, activists and far-leftists still got outside to continue their disruptions against the Department of Homeland Security.
Hundreds to thousands of people bundled up to gather at the Minneapolis-Saint Paul International Airport, the Whipple Federal Building, or downtown. Minneapolis Mayor Jacob Frey posted pictures of himself at a march and said, "It's -10 degrees and thousands still showed up strong in Minneapolis. That's who we are."
[| | | | | Mayor Jacob Frey
---
@MayorFrey
It's -10 degrees and thousands still showed up strong in Minneapolis. That's who we are.
| 10:17 PM * Jan 23, 2026 * 253K Views1.93K Replies * 408 Reposts * 2.72K Likes
---](https://substack.com/redirect/a64c1b6d-ae3f-4d1a-8ee4-755d72a4f3a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Similar to some anti-Israel protests, crowds gathered at MSP to disrupt airline customers because deportation and other DHS flights leave from the airport on a daily basis. People who refused to move out of the road were taken into custody.
Most worrying, a crowd armed with shields temporarily blocked the road at the Whipple Federal building following days of non-violent protests. Temporary fences on the protester side have done a lot to prevent violent attacks on federal agents. But that changed on Friday when a crowd blocked the road leading to DHS headquarters.
_**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**_
* * *
**[Together with Goldco](https://substack.com/redirect/0b115e8e-80e2-4298-9965-a25ffb75b670?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Silver is no longer playing second fiddle to gold...](https://substack.com/redirect/0b115e8e-80e2-4298-9965-a25ffb75b670?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0b115e8e-80e2-4298-9965-a25ffb75b670?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**After 2025 's historic 150% surge, silver is taking the spotlight** -- and doesn't look to be slowing down anytime soon.
* There's a massive global supply deficit.
* Insatiable demand fueled by A.I. and green energy,
* This has pushed the silver market to a breaking point.

With analysts forecasting an imminent move toward triple digits, the cost of waiting has never been higher. Help secure your position now, or watch from the sidelines as the most significant metal cycle in a generation potentially leaves you behind.
**The window is closing fast, so there 's no time to wait.**
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/0b115e8e-80e2-4298-9965-a25ffb75b670?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
_**(Piece continues)**_
"Hennepin County Sheriff's Office deputies and members of multiple assisting agencies have given dispersal orders for an unlawful protest at the Whipple Building. Deputies have been on the ground for the last few hours and made several attempts to ask protesters to unblock an access road. The group was clear that they will not unblock the road. Deputies have explained what will happen if they do not comply with the lawful orders. We've given them time to move. There have been ice chunks thrown at multiple vehicles, breaking windows," **[Hennepin County Sheriff's reported.](https://substack.com/redirect/7afe6d3d-ca09-4eb9-8b1b-e99b47a35dc4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
DHS leadership was giving a press conference at the time of the attack, but they vowed such attacks will not stop them from carrying out operations.
Friday's actions were a show of force from leftist agitators. They were telling the Trump administration they will not cease their disruptive and violent tactics because they truly believe in what they are doing.
Their actions today in subzero temperatures is not a good sign for the rest of the year once the weather gets warmer. In my extensive experience, these types of people go much further in their actions when they can be outside for long periods of time when there is no risk of frostbite. It is part of the reason why the BLM riots in the Twin Cities got out of hand quickly, because the outrage took place in late May.
Come spring, it won't just be Minneapolis the Trump administration will have to keep an eye on, it will be many major cities across the country since the winter did not cool down their anger against ICE and Border Patrol.
* * *
# Liberals appear to not know ICE is in red states
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9abb383d-1540-4b49-ba06-f1bc7c3552b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
### **Help us replace the mainstream media by becoming a PolitiBrawl Member:**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..RURdqfWDA7fwhqROFlq_nrqEQ4KpuIOWp89kFi5-T9k?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=185648110)
* * *
The ongoing resistance to President Donald Trump's immigration operations in Minneapolis only yielded more and more federal agents to be sent to the Twin Cities and the surrounding area.
The Department of Homeland Security has said this is the largest deployment of immigration agents for the special operation, Operation Metro Surge.
The ICE and Border Patrol agents have been making arrests amid plunging temperatures, violent reaction from locals, and inflammatory rhetoric from Governor Tim Walz (D) and Mayor Jacob Frey. The additional federal forces have also been used to provide force protection for agents in the field and at the Whipple Federal Building near the Minneapolis-Saint Paul International Airport.
Because of the large deployment from DHS, Frey and other Democrats claim this is evidence of the Trump administration targeting a Democrat state because why are there no big DHS deployments in red states?
Pointing to how Minneapolis and Saint Paul each have around 600 officers in their police departments, Frey became indigent over the "thousands" of federal agents.
"If the goal was immigration enforcement, if the goal were simply to look for people that are undocumented, Minneapolis and Saint Paul would not be the place where you would go" Frey said. "There are countless more people that are undocumented in Florida and Texas and Utah."
Frey's argument falls apart quickly because states like Florida and Texas actively work with the federal government when it comes to immigration enforcement. Not only do they allow ICE agents to pick up illegal aliens who are in local jails, but they take advantage of the options provided to them by DHS.
In Florida, Governor Ron DeSantis (R) pushed for and signed a law that requires state and local law enforcement to be in ICE's 287(g) program, which empowers law enforcement to enforce certain immigration laws. Due to the historic cooperation, over 10,000 illegal aliens arrested by Florida law enforcement have been turned over to DHS since the launch of Operation Tidal Wave last year.
The other aspect is ICE and Border Patrol working in red states do not have to worry as much when it comes to local agitators interfering with their operations. Unlike in Minneapolis, where the city's police were chased away from a rowdy protest a week ago, agitators will actually face consequences if they obstruct or attack agents.
An example of this once again comes from Florida. Jennifer Cruz of Jacksonville was arrested for allegedly punching a Florida state trooper in the face during a joint operation. Cruz was charged with multiple felonies for that and other alleged attacks during the incident she inserted herself into.
[| | | | | Attorney General James Uthmeier
---
@AGJamesUthmeier
I joined @BottomLineFBN to discuss why interfering with immigration enforcement won't be tolerated in Florida, and our lawsuit against US Masters Swimming to keep men out of women's sports.
| 1:05 AM * Jan 17, 2026 * 12.5K Views43 Replies * 131 Reposts * 627 Likes
---](https://substack.com/redirect/8155fbfe-c5cd-406d-8a47-4785f6f03d17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Because the threat of violence against them is lower (not zero) in red states compared to blue states, extra agents are not needed for force protection out in the field or at federal buildings.
If Frey and Walz want the influx of federal agents to come to an end, it would behoove them to cooperate with the Trump administration instead of fighting them every step of the way.
* * *

clean_body: Come spring, it won't just be Minneapolis the Trump administration will have to keep an eye on, it will be many major cities across the country... | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Come spring, it won't just be Minneapolis the Trump administration will have to keep an eye on, it will be many major cities across the country... | | | Jan 25| | | ∙| | Guest post ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | Opinion: | | ---|---|--- Help us replace the mainstream media by becoming a PolitiBrawl Member: The high for today in Minneapolis and St. Paul was in the negatives. Not the wind chill, but the actual temperature. Despite the dangerous cold, activists and far-leftists still got outside to continue their disruptions against the Department of Homeland Security. Hundreds to thousands of people bundled up to gather at the Minneapolis-Saint Paul International Airport, the Whipple Federal Building, or downtown. Minneapolis Mayor Jacob Frey posted pictures of himself at a march and said, "It's -10 degrees and thousands still showed up strong in Minneapolis. That's who we are." Similar to some anti-Israel protests, crowds gathered at MSP to disrupt airline customers because deportation and other DHS flights leave from the airport on a daily basis. People who refused to move out of the road were taken into custody. Most worrying, a crowd armed with shields temporarily blocked the road at the Whipple Federal building following days of non-violent protests. Temporary fences on the protester side have done a lot to prevent violent attacks on federal agents. But that changed on Friday when a crowd blocked the road leading to DHS headquarters. A message from our sponsor (piece continues below) | | ---|---|--- After 2025 's historic 150% surge, silver is taking the spotlight -- and doesn't look to be slowing down anytime soon. There's a massive global supply deficit. Insatiable demand fueled by A.I. and green energy, This has pushed the silver market to a breaking point. With analysts forecasting an imminent move toward triple digits, the cost of waiting has never been higher. Help secure your position now, or watch from the sidelines as the most significant metal cycle in a generation potentially leaves you behind. The window is closing fast, so there 's no time to wait. (Piece continues) "Hennepin County Sheriff's Office deputies and members of multiple assisting agencies have given dispersal orders for an unlawful protest at the Whipple Building. Deputies have been on the ground for the last few hours and made several attempts to ask protesters to unblock an access road. The group was clear that they will not unblock the road. Deputies have explained what will happen if they do not comply with the lawful orders. We've given them time to move. There have been ice chunks thrown at multiple vehicles, breaking windows," DHS leadership was giving a press conference at the time of the attack, but they vowed such attacks will not stop them from carrying out operations. Friday's actions were a show of force from leftist agitators. They were telling the Trump administration they will not cease their disruptive and violent tactics because they truly believe in what they are doing. Their actions today in subzero temperatures is not a good sign for the rest of the year once the weather gets warmer. In my extensive experience, these types of people go much further in their actions when they can be outside for long periods of time when there is no risk of frostbite. It is part of the reason why the BLM riots in the Twin Cities got out of hand quickly, because the outrage took place in late May. Come spring, it won't just be Minneapolis the Trump administration will have to keep an eye on, it will be many major cities across the country since the winter did not cool down their anger against ICE and Border Patrol. Liberals appear to not know ICE is in red states | | ---|---|--- Help us replace the mainstream media by becoming a PolitiBrawl Member: The ongoing resistance to President Donald Trump's immigration operations in Minneapolis only yielded more and more federal agents to be sent to the Twin Cities and the surrounding area. The Department of Homeland Security has said this is the largest deployment of immigration agents for the special operation, Operation Metro Surge. The ICE and Border Patrol agents have been making arrests amid plunging temperatures, violent reaction from locals, and inflammatory rhetoric from Governor Tim Walz (D) and Mayor Jacob Frey. The additional federal forces have also been used to provide force protection for agents in the field and at the Whipple Federal Building near the Minneapolis-Saint Paul International Airport. Because of the large deployment from DHS, Frey and other Democrats claim this is evidence of the Trump administration targeting a Democrat state because why are there no big DHS deployments in red states? Pointing to how Minneapolis and Saint Paul each have around 600 officers in their police departments, Frey became indigent over the "thousands" of federal agents. "If the goal was immigration enforcement, if the goal were simply to look for people that are undocumented, Minneapolis and Saint Paul would not be the place where you would go" Frey said. "There are countless more people that are undocumented in Florida and Texas and Utah." Frey's argument falls apart quickly because states like Florida and Texas actively work with the federal government when it comes to immigration enforcement. Not only do they allow ICE agents to pick up illegal aliens who are in local jails, but they take advantage of the options provided to them by DHS. In Florida, Governor Ron DeSantis (R) pushed for and signed a law that requires state and local law enforcement to be in ICE's 287(g) program, which empowers law enforcement to enforce certain immigration laws. Due to the historic cooperation, over 10,000 illegal aliens arrested by Florida law enforcement have been turned over to DHS since the launch of Operation Tidal Wave last year. The other aspect is ICE and Border Patrol working in red states do not have to worry as much when it comes to local agitators interfering with their operations. Unlike in Minneapolis, where the city's police were chased away from a rowdy protest a week ago, agitators will actually face consequences if they obstruct or attack agents. An example of this once again comes from Florida. Jennifer Cruz of Jacksonville was arrested for allegedly punching a Florida state trooper in the face during a joint operation. Cruz was charged with multiple felonies for that and other alleged attacks during the incident she inserted herself into. Because the threat of violence against them is lower (not zero) in red states compared to blue states, extra agents are not needed for force protection out in the field or at federal buildings. If Frey and Walz want the influx of federal agents to come to an end, it would behoove them to cooperate with the Trump administration instead of fighting them every step of the way. * | A guest post by| Reporter at MostlyPeaceful.media. | | | | | | Peter,

To keep you in the loop with the latest campaign news, behind-the-scenes updates, live events, policy fights, and ways you can get involved, we've launched our official Facebook page: [**Trey Trainor for Congress**](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=c22ea18e58&e=4d3fe76c62).
Facebook is where a lot of our supporters are connecting, sharing, and mobilizing – and I want YOU there with us!
**Click here to follow right now:** [https://www.facebook.com/TreyTrainorForCongress ](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=3203d1546e&e=4d3fe76c62)
Once you follow:
* Turn on notifications so you never miss an important post
* Like and share our content to help spread the word
* Join the conversation in the comments – your voice matters!

We're building a grassroots movement to win this seat and deliver real results for Texas families. Your support on Facebook will help amplify our message far and wide.
Thank you for standing with me. Together, we'll make TX-21 stronger and keep fighting the DC swamp.
**For Texas and America First,**
**Trey Trainor** Husband, Father of six,Proven Conservative Fighter for TX-21
---

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: Before Charlie was taken… he wrote this...
body:
...it was about peace.| | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=fda7b761781e4c00a9ae0a626d70fb3c&_e=kYcDSzkNXEJqnmwBrG6AvrhN8VS5GGrfuu4cOfNH9Xu-dj-alUeoMa5EKe7eeKmqHmrvh3TDIebF8ur3LCnLwaiuo2jLVuZLtrq08OLqwqNqb4gqslGK64TtfDCXDZcFXj0OfUoKyXONMbCNbjBKfSzb8AuNJBRT8O44a_Cl2TqgH1Z5oretd5F1IFSDbOFv6P8UqfWnaY6awClH0ZjpmcOImn0BCPQgKuwjviq2l2U_NwV6zZ8FzN3c5z1-OOdY_zYrWIPDWnkH8-iqztlfpzxd5zr8dvi__sPDSVQXAGQoiuOKPQB89DYa6DmaPI3pQ7bpMw8qRrYm_Yk0YFZ8ZD_oEkvoIA_qBnxEE5RdQsPJerHMqM030r6syrmp8K3XmoNeZi9m1Jk_Yj0nGuCmGlh9bsXjYsbs8LC436toSulVjSOGVadl25SoLaDY7Y_i-H3RQIGu5mjkPdl4JRwfny1ttoZsmFjC3_V0RJeTXbVttJji560sS2aaOYiI0OpmUohQYSDKq2yWYtoGLohRimaTqSFW0NdUXxFi9_4x1b_Bn9CnhjB8JHLzQ4u3gleFQcr2F3xxrXYQoKlfnlXWdvPajkZZEkwXMX6mRzBmEufAOlfNiUPYCjNyrkCgZkbqy70UncnvWGe13Fg07-evwVTaEOKl4qL-elFuuhHQ3jqkUoHJaNB3jbTaRlBQYz6s)
---
| | Fellow Patriot,
---
| | Charlie Kirk built a movement for truth -- but his final message pointed to something eternal.

It wasn't about politics... or elections... or even about the culture war.

His final book was deeply personal, and unlike anything Charlie had written before...

**It was about the Sabbath. **

About sacred rest. Reconnecting with God.
---

name: Kevin Kijewski for Michigan Attorney General
subject: 🇺🇸 Kevin's January Update: Stopping Sanctuary Cities, Berrien Straw Poll Victory, Ottawa Endorsement Convention Landslide
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kijewski for Michigan, 33717 Woodward Ave
body:
| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/kevinformi/kevins-january-update-stopping-sanctuary-cities-berrien-straw-poll-victory-ottawa-endorsement-convention-landslide-4741342?e=4b10910eed)
---
[|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=d0a242edd4&e=4b10910eed)

| | | | | |
# January’s Victory Update from Kevin
---
| | Dear Friend and Patriot,
I hope this email finds you and your family well. I'm truly grateful for the incredible support we're seeing across Michigan as we build toward the March endorsement convention. It's an honor to earn the trust of grassroots Republicans like you who are fighting for our shared America First values.This past week has brought more strong momentum for our campaign:
✅ [The Detroit News covered Thursday's Attorney General debate](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=71cd5e4005&e=4b10910eed), highlighting the clear contrast on sanctuary cities. **I was the only Republican AG candidate to say we must audit and sue sanctuary cities to stop them** —because while local control should be respected, it cannot mean allowing cities to defy federal immigration law that places Michigan families at risk. No excuses, no weakness, and no apologies:
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=55f508f9ca&e=4b10910eed)
| [|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=a77a410411&e=4b10910eed)
| | | | | | | | | | | | ✅ [In Berrien County, we delivered another commanding victory, **winning the straw poll by over 30 points**](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=d1952ec14a&e=4b10910eed). This decisive result — building on our undefeated streak since the Mackinac Leadership Conference — shows the growing enthusiasm for a proven fighter who will restore election trust, protect parental rights, and back law enforcement without compromise. Thank you to every activist and delegate who turned out—your energy is fueling our movement.
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=a3cea797a4&e=4b10910eed)
| [|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=98d38f238e&e=4b10910eed)
| | ✅ And [**the Ottawa GOP’s Endorsement Convention delivered an overwhelming landslide victory, 106 to 6, with nearly 95% support**](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=e1ab85f70d&e=4b10910eed) from the credentialed precinct delegates in attendance. This decisive endorsement reflects the clear choice of duly elected delegates who know our conservative principles and represent their neighbors across the county.
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=7762a8c8fd&e=4b10910eed)
| [|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=fffc4a417c&e=4b10910eed)
| | **Let’s Keep Winning for Michigan Families!**
These wins build on our Mackinac straw poll victory and reflect the energy we're seeing statewide. As Michigan’s Attorney General, I'll deliver proven results: restoring trust in elections, standing up for parental rights, backing law enforcement, and delivering courtroom results against government overreach—just like I did dismissing charges against President Trump's alternate electors and keeping high schools open during COVID lockdowns.
Thank you for your continued support and commitment to making Michigan red again. I'm honored to earn your support at the March convention—together, we'll secure this nomination and win big in November.
Very truly yours,Kevin Kijewski
Republican Candidate for Michigan Attorney General
---

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Minneapolis
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Believe your own eyes.
#

**Believe your own eyes.**
I watched the video of what happened in Minneapolis yesterday probably a dozen times, and I want to encourage people to believe what they see, no matter what this Administration says.
Alex Pretti was helping a woman who was shoved to the ground by federal law enforcement. Then, he was pepper sprayed and shot.
Last night, his parents asked us to get the truth out about their son — and that's what we must do.
He worked at the VA caring for veterans, he was not a threat, and now he is the second American citizen killed in Minneapolis in a week while the Department of Homeland Security blocks an independent investigation.
And what I want to know is when will my Republican colleagues have the courage to speak out against this chaos?
What this Administration is doing isn't making communities any safer. It's doing the opposite and it has to stop now. It is possible to enforce our laws without federal agents killing people in the streets.
I want you to know that I am going to do everything I can to stop Trump's deployment of federal law enforcement against American cities. As a Senator, I have the opportunity to vote NO on the Department of Homeland Security budget this week, and that is what I will do.
And I hope you’ll join me by making your voice heard, supporting causes you believe are important in this moment, and never losing the faith that we are better than this as a country.
Thank you for reading,
Mark Kelly

**Wait! Before you go:**
[**If you can afford it, we are humbly asking you to make a donation to Mark Kelly’s Senate campaign.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1420?c0=mek-em-jan26.PKgJ7W&refcode=em250523-1-550&t=1&akid=6343%2E6688874%2E30u7KV) As Mark holds the line, it’s on us to defend him and make sure he has the resources he needs to fight back. Any amount helps, and it adds up fast when tons of us are chipping in together.
