clean_body: Believe your own eyes. Believe your own eyes. I watched the video of what happened in Minneapolis yesterday probably a dozen times, and I want to encourage people to believe what they see, no matter what this Administration says. Alex Pretti was helping a woman who was shoved to the ground by federal law enforcement. Then, he was pepper sprayed and shot. Last night, his parents asked us to get the truth out about their son — and that's what we must do. He worked at the VA caring for veterans, he was not a threat, and now he is the second American citizen killed in Minneapolis in a week while the Department of Homeland Security blocks an independent investigation. And what I want to know is when will my Republican colleagues have the courage to speak out against this chaos? What this Administration is doing isn't making communities any safer. It's doing the opposite and it has to stop now. It is possible to enforce our laws without federal agents killing people in the streets. I want you to know that I am going to do everything I can to stop Trump's deployment of federal law enforcement against American cities. As a Senator, I have the opportunity to vote NO on the Department of Homeland Security budget this week, and that is what I will do. And I hope you’ll join me by making your voice heard, supporting causes you believe are important in this moment, and never losing the faith that we are better than this as a country. Thank you for reading, Mark Kelly Wait! Before you go: As Mark holds the line, it’s on us to defend him and make sure he has the resources he needs to fight back. Any amount helps, and it adds up fast when tons of us are chipping in together. Thank you! Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

_**by Lawrence Winnerman**_
**I really needed a day off yesterday.**
Instead, I found myself glued to my screens--the TV, my phone, my computer--watching video after video of the murder of Alex Pretti, weeping.
I was weeping for the life of that sweet man, for my own recent losses, for the out-of-control government oppressing us, _the people_ , and for this shambolic death of American democracy we are watching in real-time, like an implacable zombie horde.
I'm going to lay this out carefully and honestly--righteous, furious, and unsparing, but grounded in **mass nonviolent power**. What I am proposing is not chaos-for-chaos's-sake.
That matters because the moment this crosses into advocating random violence or collapse, the moral high ground disappears and the regime wins.
My starting premise is simple: **There are lines a government must not cross.**
When the federal government kills _another_ civilian U.S. citizen inside the United States--not in a war zone, not in a foreign country, not during a firefight--but during an "immigration enforcement" operation carried out in our own cities, that line has been crossed.
The killing of Alex Pretti in Minneapolis was not a "tragic incident" or an "unfortunate outcome". It was not a "mistake."
This is a pattern now, with Renee Nicole Good and Julio Cesar Sosa-Celis and countless others; this is _state-sanctioned violence_.
**It is state violence against the people it claims the right to govern.**
And when the state kills one of us, the response cannot be symbolic, polite, or slow-walked through press releases and sternly worded letters._The response must be collective, escalating, disciplined, and unmistakable._
Here is the concept that must guide everything that comes next: _**Legitimacy is conditional.**_****
**Governments that kill their own people forfeit consent --and consent is the only thing that makes power legitimate.**
What follows is not anger without direction; it is rage with structure. First, I'm going to list our demands. Then I'll outline seven escalating actions, ordered by seriousness and cost to those in power.
* * *
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.5cVhSQwgX29GtSOBCvckOnEn-qn8BYGewvO-NfVLTtQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=185765508)
* * *
### **Our Non-Negotiable Demands**
Before tactics, before marches, before strikes, before boycotts, we must be crystal clear about what we are demanding. If any of these demands are not met, then We the People must begin and extend the series of coordinated and escalating actions in response.
This list is not just "for Republicans". _Any elected Democrat who enables this regime is equally culpable and has declared their seat and their re-election to be forfeit._
1. **An independent investigation with prosecutorial authority**
Not internal reviews. Not DOJ "oversight." A truly independent investigation with subpoena power and the authority to bring criminal charges against any federal agent or official involved.
2. **Immediate suspension of the enforcement operation responsible for this killing**
No more raids. No more "surges." No more tactical deployments until the investigation is complete and publicly reported. During demobilization, all ICE and CBP agents are forbidden from carrying weapons and must wear their bodycams at all times.
3. **Public disclosure of rules of engagement, command structure, and authorization**
Who ordered this? Who approved it? Who signed off? A democracy does not tolerate secret, military-style domestic operations.
4. **Civil liability and restitution**
The family of Alex Pretti, Renee Nicole Good, and Julio Cesar Sosa-Celis deserve restitution, not as charity, but as acknowledgment of state wrongdoing. State and city governments that had to spend precious taxpayer dollars to deal with this ICE-inflicted crisis must be compensated. Every person whose life has been ruined by these ICE actions has a claim.
5. **Congressional hearings with sworn testimony -- televised**
Every official involved must testify under oath. Silence is not neutrality. Silence is complicity.

These demands are the line. Everything that follows exists to force them to be met.
* * *
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=185765508&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg1NzY1NTA4LCJpYXQiOjE3NjkzNzY4NDgsImV4cCI6MTc3MTk2ODg0OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.OBdSa_FqzAc6gkdOqaCPwksWSZsOTsVBn_mzTbpTA98)
* * *
### **The Seven Things We Must Do Next
(In Escalating Order)**
1. **Flood Minnesota With Resources -- Immediately
**Before marches. Before boycotts. Before strikes. **We stabilize the ground first.

** Movements fail when people are asked to resist without support. Minneapolis is carrying the weight of this moment right now--emotionally, legally, financially, logistically. If we mean what we say about solidarity, the first response is not commentary. It's **material aid**.

That means money for legal defense, bail funds, trauma care, mutual aid, organizing infrastructure, and community protection. It means making sure the people closest to this violence are not left to absorb it alone while the rest of the country debates tactics.

The fastest, cleanest way to do this right now is to **flood resources into Minnesota through a single, vetted clearinghouse** : **[standwithminnesota.com](https://substack.com/redirect/44ac29f1-0081-4b5a-8fb4-bd5121e0155e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
2. **National, Sustained Mass Mobilization**
We need more than a weekend protest or a single march that burns itself out by Monday.

We need coordinated, rolling demonstrations in every major city--federal buildings, courthouses, DHS and ICE offices--with trained marshals, legal observers, and a clear nonviolent code.

The message must be simple and relentless:
**This government is killing us. Accountability is not optional.**

Visibility matters. Persistence matters more.

3. **Forced Political Presence**
Every Democrat in national leadership should be physically present in Minneapolis. Not tweets. Not statements. Bodies on the ground, standing with families and the community.

I don't care how cold it is--I don't care if it's scary. You ran for office to lead us? **LEAD US FROM THE FRONT LINES**.

If leadership claims to represent the people, then leadership must **share the risk, the grief, and the consequences**. Absence is a choice--and it should be treated as one, with cowards in leadership named and shamed.

4. **Civil Disobedience With Teeth**
Peaceful. Disciplined. Unignorable. Sit-ins at federal buildings. Nonviolent blockades. Refusal to comply with business-as-usual.

Civil disobedience works when it imposes **moral and logistical costs** without alienating the public. This requires preparation, training, and clarity of purpose--not improvisation and chaos.

The goal is disruption that exposes illegitimacy, not disruption for its own sake.

5. **Targeted Economic and Cultural Boycotts**
This is where pressure becomes expensive.

Cities that host global prestige events such as the FIFA World Cup while federal agents kill civilians, cannot have it both ways. International image is leverage--and leverage should be used.

At the same time, _corporations that profit from federal enforcement contracts, surveillance, detention, or logistics should face sustained, public pressure campaigns_ : consumer boycotts, shareholder actions, and reputational exposure.

**Power understands money. Use that language.
**
6. **Coordinated Labor Action**
A general strike is not just a slogan--it's an outcome of organization.

What if we start with sectoral strikes? Coordinated walkouts? Sick-outs? Work stoppages tied explicitly to demands for accountability? Those are possible--and terrifying to people in power.

When healthcare workers, educators, transit workers, and service workers stop, the illusion of "normal" collapses. That collapse forces negotiation faster than any speech ever could.

**If labor sector strikes don 't work, we progress to a GENERAL STRIKE.
**
7. **Strategic Withdrawal of Financial Consent**
This is the most serious step -- and the most disciplined. It is not nihilism, but it will deeply impact the national economy, and therefore the lives of millions of people.

At this stage, we seek not reckless economic collapse, **but targeted divestment.** Mass movement of funds away from institutions that finance or insure (as in insurance) enforcement infrastructure. Public campaigns for local and state banking alternatives. Refusal to bankroll repression.

If this does not achieve our goals, we must consider withdrawing money from every major American financial institution en masse.

Yes, this will create an economic crisis. _But it is better to use the levers of power we still have than to live our lives on our knees to an authoritarian slavemaster._

**This is about denying legitimacy and resources simultaneously --reminding the system that it only functions because we participate.**
* * *
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=185765508&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg1NzY1NTA4LCJpYXQiOjE3NjkzNzY4NDgsImV4cCI6MTc3MTk2ODg0OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.OBdSa_FqzAc6gkdOqaCPwksWSZsOTsVBn_mzTbpTA98)
* * *

### **The Principles That Must Govern All of This**
If we abandon these, we lose.
* **Nonviolence is not weakness.** It is a strategic discipline.
* **Clarity beats outrage alone.** Everyone should know what we want and why.
* **Coalitions matter.** Labor, immigrants, civil rights groups, faith communities-- together or not at all.
* **Narrative is power.** Alex Pretti must never become a footnote.
* **Escalation must be deliberate.** Each step signals seriousness, not desperation.
* * *
[Leave a comment](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=185765508&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg1NzY1NTA4LCJpYXQiOjE3NjkzNzY4NDgsImV4cCI6MTc3MTk2ODg0OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.OBdSa_FqzAc6gkdOqaCPwksWSZsOTsVBn_mzTbpTA98&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment)
* * *

### **This Is a Test of the Emergency Response System**
History will not ask whether we were angry; it will ask whether we were **equal to the moment**.
A government that kills its own people and faces no consequence will do it again.
A public that absorbs that violence without response teaches the state it can continue.
This is not about immigration alone.
This is about whether consent still means anything in America.
**Legitimacy is conditional.**_And right now, the Trump Administration is failing the test._
#### **The question is whether we will.**
* * *

name: Jack Schlossberg
subject: What’s next
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Hi friend, it's Jack Schlossberg.

I know you hear this every election year, but 2026 will define our country in a big way.

What's different this time around is that the damage politicians and pundits had been warning about is already here.

Trump is tearing off the guardrails of our Democracy. We've seen healthcare and food assistance gutted. Prices are rising on everything because of Trump's tariffs, and his cronies keep sticking to them anyway.

ICE is literally killing American citizens in broad daylight. The National Guard has been deployed to Democrat-led cities.

Trump's regime change operation in Venezuela – which he executed without Congressional approval – has set a dangerous precedent and added to this era of uncertainty we're all suffering through.

clean_body: Massive food hoarding warning HIGH ALERT: Shocking Meat Shortages Are Coming – Prepare Now The USDA predicts meat production shortages for the first time since 2014, and the U.N. warns of "an unprecedented global hunger crisis". Which means 2 dangerous things for you: 1\. Higher prices at the grocery store 2\. Less meat available That's why meat must be a vital part of your survival food stockpile. But there is a catch. Not all protein is created equal. And this is so critical to understand, especially in a crisis. See, your protein needs to meet 4 critical requirements: It needs to: Last a while Taste great Store without refrigeration Can't break the bank Spoiler alert: most protein options fall short! Take peanut butter. Sure, most people see it as a survival food protein staple. But did you know most cans are full of added sugars? Plus, they don't last more than a few months. A year tops. Grocery store meat doesn't work either. First, it's expensive. If you've been to the grocery store recently, you know what I'm talking about. Meat prices are up big time over the past year. But it also needs to be refrigerated. So if a blackout hits and cuts power to your home, you might as well use it as a paperweight. But don't worry friend. There is a protein option that checks all four boxes: This option is guaranteed to last at least 5 years. It doesn't need to be refrigerated. And it come with an easy payment plan so it won't break the bank. And most importantly, it tastes delicious! Introducing for the first time ever... YES! ORDER TODAY AND GET 9 FREE GIFTS WORTH $137.86 WITH THIS EXCLUSIVE BONUS PACKAGE!! FREE Gift #1: NEW & Improved 72-Hour Survival Food Kit ($29.00 Value) FREE Gift #2: NEW & Improved 72-Hour Survival Food Kit ($29.00 Value) FREE Gift #3: Ultimate Meat Medley Cookbook ($9.95 Value) FREE Gift #4: FREE Report: Top 10 Items Sold Out After a Crisis ($4.99 Value) FREE Gift #5: FREE Report: The Survival Garden Guide ($4.99 Value) FREE Gift #6: FREE Report: How to Cut Your Grocery Bills in Half ($4.99 Value) FREE Gift #7: FREE Report: The Water Survival Guide ($4.99 Value) FREE Gift #8: $25.00 OFF Your Next Purchase ($25.00 Value) FREE Gift #9: Shipping & Handling ($24.95 Value) Total Savings & Bonus Package Value: $137.86! And YES! There's also an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest! Now, there is one thing you should know. Every time we've offered meat in the past, we've SOLD OUT. So when people find out about this brand-NEW Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit, we could see a huge rush. I don't want to alarm you, but there are no IOUs or rain checks on this meat kit. It's first-come, first-served. So if you're going to reserve your kit, . For starters, you get 5 meat options. Chicken, beef, pork, turkey and ground beef. So you aren't stuck with 1 or 2 types of protein. And the variety means you can use it in a ton of recipes. Chicken salad, burgers, tacos, you name it. You're in control, not the stock boy at the grocery store. Plus, you can actually pronounce the ingredients that we use. That's because there are only 2. Meat, of course, and salt for preservation. That's it! No funky chemicals. No artificial gunk. The only things in your food are food. Now, you may be wondering how we guarantee such a long shelf life for canned foods. It comes from our special, old-fashioned retort canning process. We use small-batch retorts to cook your meat right inside the can. That means 2 important things. First, your meat is slow cooked, so it retains all its natural juices and flavor. And it's ready to go right out of the can. And second, it kills off any germs in the can that might harm the shelf life. Sometimes, the old-fashioned way is the right way. And guess what? This is all done right here in the US of A. Our survival meats are home raised here in the states. So you know exactly where your food comes from. And as a family-owned, American business, we take a lot of pride in that. Look friend, there's no better time to claim your Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit than now. Meat is one of the first things to go in a crisis. Wildfires, hurricanes, cyberattacks or something else. And the last thing I want for you is to miss out. Or worse, leave you and your family stuck with a subpar protein option. Here at 4Patriots, our mission is to champion freedom and self-reliance for all Americans. And with everything going on in the world, it's clear that survival food is no longer a luxury. It's a necessity. Ask anyone who's lived through a crisis. There's no warning. You won't see a big billboard that says "emergency coming in 5 days! Stock up before then." Disasters come out of nowhere. And if you aren't prepared when it hits, it's too late. I mean, just imagine standing in line at your local supermarket. Shelves picked bare. And the people who didn't prepare scrambling and hoarding what little food they can find. All while you pray there's a sliver of meat left for you and your family. This doesn't have to be you, friend. You can choose a different path. When storms come knocking at your door, you can stay safely inside with your loved ones. You'll feel great knowing you and your family have delicious shelf-stable meat ready to go. And trust me, the peace of mind that comes with that, feels incredible. To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we are able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. What is this even?
_**AI Overview**_
_" What even is this" is **an informal, emphatic way to ask "What is this?"** **(or "What is that?") to express surprise, confusion, or strong curiosity**, adding emphasis with "even" to show something is particularly odd or unexpected, rather than a grammatical error. It's a common modern colloquialism, especially in online speech, conveying bewilderment about something baffling or out of place, much stronger than just asking "What is it?"._
* _**Meaning:** It highlights the unusual nature of something._
* _**Usage:** Informal, often used in text, social media, or casual conversation._
* _**Example:** Seeing a bizarre new gadget: "What even is this thing?!"._

_**Got it. Thanks, Gemini! Can you please find 3-4 memes to illustrate? I 'm a younger millennial quickly regressing into Gen Z and now functionally illiterate. I speak fluent MEME-ESE though. Thanks in advance.**_

If that is what you are asking about the blog, such as it is, I have the same question. And no answer. Maybe you can tell me what this blog is, exactly. And while you're at it, tell me what American politics is right now.
A reality TV spectacle par excellence -- no doubt.
But whose line is it anyway? And whose reality?
The Kardashians are not keeping up, or so it seems: Kim K. failed the California bar exam. Three times. Should have texted me back. Now, I'm busy; sorry boo. You could have been AG!
Pam Bondi's job is _safe_ ... _for now ...but [only the paranoid survive, Pam, only. the. paranoid. survive.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/73926ea4-a4f0-4e2b-a634-4d5b585e23aa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Enema the dog who ate the Epstein files._ Or subpoena his puppy ass. Or at least learn how to redact.
Marco Rubio has won the Apprentice at least three times.
Biggest loser: Mike Pompeo. A source close to Pompeo tells me it was easy once he stopped eating food and started [eating his words.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/dd67699b-cb27-443d-9935-fb222b578c80?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Survivor: Trump. Has to be, right?
America's next top model is certifiably Gavin Newsom.
But then, a real curveball. Katie Miller starts the podcast edition of the Real Housewives of Mar-a-lago, Househusbands in tow, [some of whom even husband the U.S. House.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a80b8dbe-e495-46b8-bde8-f7296baea4b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
It is named, memorably and quite brilliantly, THE KATIE MILLER PODCAST. Which reminds me of a restaurant near Capitol Hill I used to love called ETHIOPIAN RESTAURANT. It tells you nothing and yet absolutely everything you need to know about what's inside: _great_ food -- for anything but thought. I am ashamed to say I watch it every week. Yet not ashamed enough, alas, to ever stop watching.
Second to last, but not least, is our very own American Idol, Erika Kirk, who inspires us all with a quintessentially biblical lesson: we all mourn differently, OK?? Gosh. And some of us simply cannot grieve properly without pyrotechnics, glitter, vino, and ~~Vance~~ dance. Paraphrasing of course.
And in a novel twist on an old classic, The Second Lady of the United States notches perhaps the most cinematic victory on this season of NBC'S new hit show: SO YOU THINK YOU CAN VANCE ~~bitch~~ !!??
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/64b6b3a6-7d1f-4702-b3df-45430c5cea17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Lea B, nickiswift.com
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/159cf9d2-7028-447e-a233-c87c282e4105?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Lea B, [nickiswift.com](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/afe34dd8-b14d-400c-b102-7972f37fe6e2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Yes, men get sexually harassed at work, too. Especially when we're winning.
And of the myriad ways to reject an unwanted sexual advance, it is difficult to fathom one more brutal than immediately announcing a 4th child with your wife of 12 years, who even just before, just after, or in the midst of labor and high on anesthesia, in between contractions, would not fail the California bar exam.
Come for the queen you best not miss ~~bish~~ babe ❤️
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/43ff8ed6-5089-4fb3-af5a-0786e59217cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Rebecca Droke/AFP/Getty Images via CNN Newsource
All that is to say, there is hope. And laughter. And joy -- so much joy, don't forget the joy. Hope may not be a strategy, but joy will work for Democrats about as well as it did in 2024. And if not, thank God we have fear and loathing.
Media is not politics.
Politics is not government.
Government is what really matters. And thanks to our constitution, 250 years into this beautiful experiment, America endures.
It will not die anytime soon.
(Probably.)
But if it does, my fellow Americans, it will be fun. So much fun. We will perish, I am now quite certain, in anticipation. Laughing, crying, meme-ing, screaming for more. And waiting. Just waiting. With bated breath, amusing ourselves to death.
* * *
> _**" What [Orwell](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b0412a1e-7929-42c7-908b-716f6494b0ac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) feared were those who would ban books. What [Huxley](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/fa9d577c-951c-4e73-b38e-c57a5927cbb9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) feared was that there would be no reason to ban a book, for there would be no one who wanted to read one. Orwell feared those who would deprive us of information. Huxley feared those who would give us so much that we would be reduced to passivity and egoism. Orwell feared that the truth would be concealed from us. Huxley feared the truth would be drowned in a sea of irrelevance. Orwell feared we would become a captive culture. Huxley feared we would become a trivial culture, preoccupied with some equivalent of the feelies, the orgy porgy, and the centrifugal bumblepuppy. As Huxley remarked in Brave New World Revisited, the civil libertarians and rationalists who are ever on the alert to oppose tyranny "failed to take into account man's almost infinite appetite for distractions." In 1984, Orwell added, people are controlled by inflicting pain. In Brave New World, they are controlled by inflicting pleasure."1**2_
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/cf46a864-6ed1-4dc2-aa67-770e28e41b3f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b5e6df59-fa4b-4c3b-b4bd-b637b92d7c3d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/4ed87598-5446-4cdd-9fb1-17e2c9c09894?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
1
Grateful to [Prof. Alex Rajczi](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/dc813f38-9c75-420c-98ce-ff6ea82187bd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for all he taught me, including Postman, and my college classmates in 'Enlightenment Values,' Spring 2010, from whom I learned so much. This essay is for them.
2

clean_body: The general angst of 2026 America is the challenge for Season 3 of pai's politics: how to understand reality when you're enjoying reality television | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more The general angst of 2026 America is the challenge for Season 3 of pai's politics: how to understand reality when you're enjoying reality television | | | Jan 25 | | | | | | | | | | | | What is this even? AI Overview " What even is this" is an informal, emphatic way to ask "What is this?" (or "What is that?") to express surprise, confusion, or strong curiosity, adding emphasis with "even" to show something is particularly odd or unexpected, rather than a grammatical error. It's a common modern colloquialism, especially in online speech, conveying bewilderment about something baffling or out of place, much stronger than just asking "What is it?". Meaning: It highlights the unusual nature of something. Usage: Informal, often used in text, social media, or casual conversation. Example: Seeing a bizarre new gadget: "What even is this thing?!". Got it. Thanks, Gemini! Can you please find 3-4 memes to illustrate? I 'm a younger millennial quickly regressing into Gen Z and now functionally illiterate. I speak fluent MEME-ESE though. Thanks in advance. | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- If that is what you are asking about the blog, such as it is, I have the same question. And no answer. Maybe you can tell me what this blog is, exactly. And while you're at it, tell me what American politics is right now. A reality TV spectacle par excellence -- no doubt. But whose line is it anyway? And whose reality? The Kardashians are not keeping up, or so it seems: Kim K. failed the California bar exam. Three times. Should have texted me back. Now, I'm busy; sorry boo. You could have been AG! Pam Bondi's job is safe ... for now ...but Enema the dog who ate the Epstein files. Or subpoena his puppy ass. Or at least learn how to redact. Marco Rubio has won the Apprentice at least three times. Biggest loser: Mike Pompeo. A source close to Pompeo tells me it was easy once he stopped eating food and started Survivor: Trump. Has to be, right? America's next top model is certifiably Gavin Newsom. But then, a real curveball. Katie Miller starts the podcast edition of the Real Housewives of Mar-a-lago, Househusbands in tow, It is named, memorably and quite brilliantly, THE KATIE MILLER PODCAST. Which reminds me of a restaurant near Capitol Hill I used to love called ETHIOPIAN RESTAURANT. It tells you nothing and yet absolutely everything you need to know about what's inside: great food -- for anything but thought. I am ashamed to say I watch it every week. Yet not ashamed enough, alas, to ever stop watching. Second to last, but not least, is our very own American Idol, Erika Kirk, who inspires us all with a quintessentially biblical lesson: we all mourn differently, OK?? Gosh. And some of us simply cannot grieve properly without pyrotechnics, glitter, vino, and ~~Vance~~ dance. Paraphrasing of course. And in a novel twist on an old classic, The Second Lady of the United States notches perhaps the most cinematic victory on this season of NBC'S new hit show: SO YOU THINK YOU CAN VANCE ~~bitch~~ !!?? | | ---|---|--- Lea B, nickiswift.com | | ---|---|--- Lea B, Yes, men get sexually harassed at work, too. Especially when we're winning. And of the myriad ways to reject an unwanted sexual advance, it is difficult to fathom one more brutal than immediately announcing a 4th child with your wife of 12 years, who even just before, just after, or in the midst of labor and high on anesthesia, in between contractions, would not fail the California bar exam. Come for the queen you best not miss ~~bish~~ babe ❤️ | | ---|---|--- Rebecca Droke/AFP/Getty Images via CNN Newsource All that is to say, there is hope. And laughter. And joy -- so much joy, don't forget the joy. Hope may not be a strategy, but joy will work for Democrats about as well as it did in 2024. And if not, thank God we have fear and loathing. Media is not politics. Politics is not government. Government is what really matters. And thanks to our constitution, 250 years into this beautiful experiment, America endures. It will not die anytime soon. (Probably.) But if it does, my fellow Americans, it will be fun. So much fun. We will perish, I am now quite certain, in anticipation. Laughing, crying, meme-ing, screaming for more. And waiting. Just waiting. With bated breath, amusing ourselves to death. " What feared were those who would ban books. What feared was that there would be no reason to ban a book, for there would be no one who wanted to read one. Orwell feared those who would deprive us of information. Huxley feared those who would give us so much that we would be reduced to passivity and egoism. Orwell feared that the truth would be concealed from us. Huxley feared the truth would be drowned in a sea of irrelevance. Orwell feared we would become a captive culture. Huxley feared we would become a trivial culture, preoccupied with some equivalent of the feelies, the orgy porgy, and the centrifugal bumblepuppy. As Huxley remarked in Brave New World Revisited, the civil libertarians and rationalists who are ever on the alert to oppose tyranny "failed to take into account man's almost infinite appetite for distractions." In 1984, Orwell added, people are controlled by inflicting pain. In Brave New World, they are controlled by inflicting pleasure."12 | | ---|---|--- 1 Grateful to for all he taught me, including Postman, and my college classmates in 'Enlightenment Values,' Spring 2010, from whom I learned so much. This essay is for them. 2 | | | | | | | (C) 2026 Aditya Pai 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: research@voteractionproject.org
subject: Your opinion of a voter's Bill of Rights:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
You are invited to join our one-click issue response poll.
For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
Several states, including California, have passed a "Voters Bill of Rights" to protect everyone's ability to be heard in an election.
Activists around the country have been calling for a national version in response to the voter suppression bills that have swept through state legislatures over the last few years and seem to keep coming.
Team: We're looking to hear from our supporters about this proposed idea. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Do you think we need a national "Voters Bill of Rights"?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=012526_1yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=012526_1no&amount=15]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=012526_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=012526_1&amount=20]

subject: Do you have a dollar?

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_raja_fr_senate-footer_q22025?amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_raja_fr_senate-footer_q22025?amount=5]

$1. That’s what I’m asking for today.

Yes, really.

Here’s why: We’re in the home stretch of our race for Senate. There are less than two weeks remaining until voters go to the polls.

That means that every single dollar we raise makes a HUGE impact in mobilizing the voters we need to win.

It also means that our opponents are looking for ANY signs of weakness from this grassroots team. Every single donation — no matter the size — is a sign that we’re ready for anything that gets thrown at us.

So yes: I’m lowering my ask to just $1.

This team – making grassroots donations of $1, $20, or $50 has gotten us this far. But with voting beginning in just a couple of weeks, we can’t risk falling short on our fundraising goals.

We just launched an Early Vote Fundraising Goal to power our voter outreach — and we need a major boost in grassroots donations TODAY to have any hope of reaching it.

So that’s why I’m asking every single Democrat reading this to make a donation today. Even if it’s just $1, it makes a HUGE impact. Please: make a donation of any size right now. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_raja_fr_em_q12026?amounts=1,10,20,35,50,100,250]

DONATE MORE >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_raja_fr_em_q12026?amounts=1,10,20,35,50,100,250]

Raja KrishnamoorthiDemocrat Raja Krishnamoorthi is running for Senate in Illinois to fight back against Donald Trump and the far-right MAGA movement, protect critical programs like Social Security and Medicare, and rebuild the middle class.

Dear Fellow American,

Chicago Public Schools desperately needs qualified teachers. But school officials are choosing to discriminate against Christian student teachers rather than fill those vacancies.

The students at Moody Bible Institute are experiencing this discrimination firsthand.

Moody's students are barred from participating in Chicago Public School's student-teaching program. Not because they lack qualifications. Not because they lack passion for serving students. But because Moody exclusively hires staff who affirm and live out its biblical beliefs.

**In other words, Chicago Public Schools is punishing Moody students for attending a college that practices its faith.**

This is an attack on religious freedom--one of the foundational freedoms that has shaped our nation since its inception. Religious schools like Moody Bible Institute have the constitutional right to exclusively hire employees who share their faith and uphold their religious mission. Without this right, religious institutions would lose their very identity and purpose.

Moody's mission is clear: proclaim the gospel and equip people to be biblically grounded, practically trained, and to engage the world through gospel-centered living. For that mission to be credible, its faculty and staff must be unified in both belief and practice.

But when Moody requested a simple religious exemption acknowledging its constitutionally protected rights, the district refused.

**Instead, officials doubled down --effectively telling Moody students that their faith disqualifies them from serving Chicago's public school children.**

Alliance Defending Freedom is representing Moody Bible Institute in a federal lawsuit to challenge this discriminatory exclusion.

**Will you sign our Statement of Support for Moody Bible Institute and stand with them in this critical moment?
**
This isn't an isolated situation. We are watching this pattern repeat nationwide.

In Washington State, **Yakima Union Gospel Mission** serves thousands of homeless individuals every day--offering food, shelter, and the hope of Christ to locals who desperately need it. Yet the state is threatening the Mission because it only hires those who share its Christian beliefs. Now the Mission is in court seeking to protect its right to hire those who share and live out its faith.

Similarly, in Oregon, Youth 71Five Ministries is asking an appeals court to protect its right to receive public benefits without having to give up its right to employ those who share its faith. Youth 71Five Ministries serves at-risk youth, empowering them with the hope of the Gospel. It depends on a staff that shares its biblical beliefs. But officials stripped the ministry of its public funding for only hiring like-minded individuals who ensure that mission goes forward, violating its constitutional freedoms.

When ministries like Moody, Yakima Union Gospel Mission, and Youth 71Five Ministries stand up in court, they are not only protecting their own freedom. They are defending religious freedom and free expression for every American--Christian or not.

**But these battles come with real emotional and personal costs.** Leaders and staff can face hostility, intense public scrutiny, and even open threats. Stand alongside thousands of believers who are praying for Moody during these stressful times.

That's why your voice matters so deeply right now.

**Please take a moment to sign the Statement of Support today.**

clean_body: Chicago Public Schools desperately needs qualified teachers. The fight to keep men out of women's sports isn't over. | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | | ** Dear Fellow American, Chicago Public Schools desperately needs qualified teachers. But school officials are choosing to discriminate against Christian student teachers rather than fill those vacancies. The students at Moody Bible Institute are experiencing this discrimination firsthand. Moody's students are barred from participating in Chicago Public School's student-teaching program. Not because they lack qualifications. Not because they lack passion for serving students. But because Moody exclusively hires staff who affirm and live out its biblical beliefs. In other words, Chicago Public Schools is punishing Moody students for attending a college that practices its faith. This is an attack on religious freedom--one of the foundational freedoms that has shaped our nation since its inception. Religious schools like Moody Bible Institute have the constitutional right to exclusively hire employees who share their faith and uphold their religious mission. Without this right, religious institutions would lose their very identity and purpose. Moody's mission is clear: proclaim the gospel and equip people to be biblically grounded, practically trained, and to engage the world through gospel-centered living. For that mission to be credible, its faculty and staff must be unified in both belief and practice. But when Moody requested a simple religious exemption acknowledging its constitutionally protected rights, the district refused. Instead, officials doubled down --effectively telling Moody students that their faith disqualifies them from serving Chicago's public school children. Alliance Defending Freedom is representing Moody Bible Institute in a federal lawsuit to challenge this discriminatory exclusion. Will you sign our Statement of Support for Moody Bible Institute and stand with them in this critical moment? This isn't an isolated situation. We are watching this pattern repeat nationwide. In Washington State, Yakima Union Gospel Mission serves thousands of homeless individuals every day--offering food, shelter, and the hope of Christ to locals who desperately need it. Yet the state is threatening the Mission because it only hires those who share its Christian beliefs. Now the Mission is in court seeking to protect its right to hire those who share and live out its faith. Similarly, in Oregon, Youth 71Five Ministries is asking an appeals court to protect its right to receive public benefits without having to give up its right to employ those who share its faith. Youth 71Five Ministries serves at-risk youth, empowering them with the hope of the Gospel. It depends on a staff that shares its biblical beliefs. But officials stripped the ministry of its public funding for only hiring like-minded individuals who ensure that mission goes forward, violating its constitutional freedoms. When ministries like Moody, Yakima Union Gospel Mission, and Youth 71Five Ministries stand up in court, they are not only protecting their own freedom. They are defending religious freedom and free expression for every American--Christian or not. But these battles come with real emotional and personal costs. Leaders and staff can face hostility, intense public scrutiny, and even open threats. Stand alongside thousands of believers who are praying for Moody during these stressful times. That's why your voice matters so deeply right now. Please take a moment to sign the Statement of Support today. Thank you for standing with those who are standing for truth. For freedom, Jeremiah Galus** Senior Counsel Alliance Defending Freedom Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260

---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d8d7e0d6-095d-47c2-a3ae-dd3fa0fe15e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Last summer I [wrote](https://substack.com/redirect/62a7252e-0fce-4a31-a4dc-1cb440dc16a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about a long-simmering movement to have the Canadian province of Alberta secede from the rest of the country. I wrote at the time that the idea wasn't as crazy as it sounds...Alberta accounts for most of Canada's energy resources and production and also has significant mineral and rare earth reserves. The province is teeming with potential and freeing it from the shackles of overregulation and Ottawa's control could, I noted, "Make Alberta Great Again."
* * *
## [Make Alberta Great Again](https://substack.com/redirect/d1e4253b-360f-4bc9-9cf1-6a17ecd4f801?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| August 31, 2025
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d1e4253b-360f-4bc9-9cf1-6a17ecd4f801?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Last week, I was in Alberta, Canada to give a keynote speech at the Energy Business Forum organized by the Canadian Energy Executive Association (CEEA). It gave me a chance to speak with fellow speakers Rick Perry, the former Governor of Texas and former U.S. Secretary of Energy, and Danielle Smith, the Premier of the Province of Alberta. I also had an ...](https://substack.com/redirect/d1e4253b-360f-4bc9-9cf1-6a17ecd4f801?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/d1e4253b-360f-4bc9-9cf1-6a17ecd4f801?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**The secession movement is gaining steam.** There's an [effort](https://substack.com/redirect/94100b62-119b-4382-839f-8af07febc8be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to collect petition signatures to put the issue to a referendum, and events around the province have drawn [a lot of interest](https://substack.com/redirect/09a79491-3aa8-41e7-af24-289173139a12?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg); long lines stretching blocks have been [reported](https://substack.com/redirect/401be188-e1c8-4437-b11c-8e0eb5a5873c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at many locations. The effort needs to submit 177,000 petitions by May 2, and organizers are confident that they will hit the mark.
The province has long been at odds with Canada's eastern political elites, mostly over the latter's attempts to stifle the province's exploitation of its natural resources. Albertans have often threatened to restrict supply to the eastern provinces in protest, and a common bumper sticker in the 1980's proclaimed, "Let the Eastern Bastards Freeze in the Dark."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/985498aa-cc26-4c84-8a73-3dafc48cfe0a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
More recently, tensions were exacerbated by a climate alarmism emanating from elites, and at times it appeared as if Ottawa was going out of its way to antagonize its Western countrymen. Environmental regulation, carbon taxes, pipeline cancellations, and emissions caps have all threatened Alberta's economy, and the federal government even [banned](https://substack.com/redirect/ab4a6e11-0fab-4f16-8050-140429392fc1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) tankers from loading oil off the country's west coast, widely seen as a deliberate poke in the Albertan eye.
The election of Mark Carney turned the secession simmer into a boil; [tensions](https://substack.com/redirect/1fc1c821-1d38-412d-a3a5-1eca31ea056d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) have been rapidly rising since the consummate "Davos Man" took office. Beyond the usual Liberal policies, there was also the belligerent stance he has taken with the United States. Western Canada has strong trade ties to the U.S., which is the region's largest importer of energy. As Carney jousted with U.S. President Donald Trump over trade, it was suggested that Canada should restrict or tax energy exports to America. Alberta Premier Danielle Smith [rejected](https://substack.com/redirect/dca7b171-d8f4-4936-b3e4-78d1a0029b3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the notion outright.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..43ecE-kVGrY6fDNsY7snrJTxecoP6XTDX5MevVE6xAk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=185669779)
Carney has tried to mend the relationship between Ottawa and Alberta, and a recent [Memoranda of Understanding](https://substack.com/redirect/eb0c83cb-ff95-4712-a854-57078d2fa8cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) signed by Carney and Smith promises to ease energy restrictions. While hopeful for Alberta, my worry is that a leopard can't change its spots, and sooner or later the Harvard and Oxford-educated former central banker will revert to form. For many in the climate movement, and likely including Carney (he was, after all, the UN Special Envoy for Climate Action), exploiting natural resources isn't just a bad policy, it's actually evil and an existential threat to humanity.
Carney's so-called pivot towards China and "diversification" strategy won't help matters either. Alberta has strong economic and cultural ties to the United States, and many Albertans are more closely aligned (politically and socially) with their neighbors to the south than their fellow Canadians to the east. While there is of course an economic benefit from expanding exports to Asia (the agriculture sector in particular might see some big gains), most Albertans are opposed to doing so at the expense of maximizing opportunities in the US market.
* * *
## [Don't Diversify...Deepen!](https://substack.com/redirect/2e2e5eb7-8025-4813-801a-59442ad82a9c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| Jan 11
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2e2e5eb7-8025-4813-801a-59442ad82a9c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[The key to navigating today's uncertainty, I've argued, is to form a mosaic from the cross-current of the forces buffeting our world. Leaders need to focus on connecting dots across seemingly disparate domains. Siloed thinking around a single discipline (economics, for instance) is a sure-fire way to misinterpret today's chaos and experts who fail to broaden their thinking will struggle to lead effectively as they gain greater responsibility.](https://substack.com/redirect/2e2e5eb7-8025-4813-801a-59442ad82a9c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/2e2e5eb7-8025-4813-801a-59442ad82a9c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Carney's pivot away from America and towards China doesn't make sense in today's rapidly bifurcating global economy. And in the context of trade spats with the United States, aligning with China over the defense of Greenland, and preparing for a possible American invasion of Canada, the "diversification" agenda can only intensify Albertan angst. [It's also led US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent to acknowledge Alberta's desire for sovereignty.](https://substack.com/redirect/6edc2621-2f9f-43bd-a880-fc375ed3bf0c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Given Ottawa seems openly hostile towards Alberta and its strong relationship with the United States, it's not surprising that the secession movement is gaining momentum.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ca3bf00a-c375-49d9-8687-33baa7d69577?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
As I have [written](https://substack.com/redirect/fa35228d-851b-401f-8a5e-96037d2951f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) before, the world is breaking into two separate and distinct political and economic ecosystems, one led by Americans and the other led by the Chinese. The former will champion free men, free markets, and free minds; the latter totalitarianism, state planning, and censorship. Sooner or later, [everyone is going to have to pick a side](https://substack.com/redirect/8df277a6-24e8-4d28-81dd-c8f3929f48b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
I have made dozens of trip to Alberta (I'm a HUGE fan of the [Calgary Stampede](https://substack.com/redirect/58e078de-9930-46e4-95ca-f7e80040311f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) over the last fifteen years and have come to know Albertans as freedom-loving, enterprising, rugged individualists who get prickly when their rights are being infringed. There's no doubt in my mind which side of the divide they will come down on.
[Leave a comment](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=185669779&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg1NjY5Nzc5LCJpYXQiOjE3NjkzODAyNzIsImV4cCI6MTc3MTk3MjI3MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.jUZOBmzSgfq4VRPXoonPW1Nz7HrLNqzmDzoZnxl2MWw&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment)
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=185669779&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg1NjY5Nzc5LCJpYXQiOjE3NjkzODAyNzIsImV4cCI6MTc3MTk3MjI3MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.jUZOBmzSgfq4VRPXoonPW1Nz7HrLNqzmDzoZnxl2MWw)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..43ecE-kVGrY6fDNsY7snrJTxecoP6XTDX5MevVE6xAk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=185669779)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d0e0ca10-3a63-4985-94cb-c0351e2ba041?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. **He 's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza**. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/e2918b34-747f-4f30-a7c1-26a6a1119029?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/7342ad46-b1d3-4e8a-8e30-3862ee0e936e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/d970cc61-08ad-4969-b032-3da8881ae672?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.
You're currently a free subscriber to [Navigating Uncertainty](https://substack.com/redirect/7d27e20f-44c2-40e2-b9b0-8de2dc3788dd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). clean_body: Ottawa is stoking the embers of an independence flame. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Ottawa is stoking the embers of an independence flame. | | | Jan 25 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Last summer I about a long-simmering movement to have the Canadian province of Alberta secede from the rest of the country. I wrote at the time that the idea wasn't as crazy as it sounds...Alberta accounts for most of Canada's energy resources and production and also has significant mineral and rare earth reserves. The province is teeming with potential and freeing it from the shackles of overregulation and Ottawa's control could, I noted, "Make Alberta Great Again." | | | | ---|---|--- | August 31, 2025 | The secession movement is gaining steam. There's an to collect petition signatures to put the issue to a referendum, and events around the province have drawn ; long lines stretching blocks have been at many locations. The effort needs to submit 177,000 petitions by May 2, and organizers are confident that they will hit the mark. The province has long been at odds with Canada's eastern political elites, mostly over the latter's attempts to stifle the province's exploitation of its natural resources. Albertans have often threatened to restrict supply to the eastern provinces in protest, and a common bumper sticker in the 1980's proclaimed, "Let the Eastern Bastards Freeze in the Dark." | | ---|---|--- More recently, tensions were exacerbated by a climate alarmism emanating from elites, and at times it appeared as if Ottawa was going out of its way to antagonize its Western countrymen. Environmental regulation, carbon taxes, pipeline cancellations, and emissions caps have all threatened Alberta's economy, and the federal government even tankers from loading oil off the country's west coast, widely seen as a deliberate poke in the Albertan eye. The election of Mark Carney turned the secession simmer into a boil; have been rapidly rising since the consummate "Davos Man" took office. Beyond the usual Liberal policies, there was also the belligerent stance he has taken with the United States. Western Canada has strong trade ties to the U.S., which is the region's largest importer of energy. As Carney jousted with U.S. President Donald Trump over trade, it was suggested that Canada should restrict or tax energy exports to America. Alberta Premier Danielle Smith the notion outright. Carney has tried to mend the relationship between Ottawa and Alberta, and a recent signed by Carney and Smith promises to ease energy restrictions. While hopeful for Alberta, my worry is that a leopard can't change its spots, and sooner or later the Harvard and Oxford-educated former central banker will revert to form. For many in the climate movement, and likely including Carney (he was, after all, the UN Special Envoy for Climate Action), exploiting natural resources isn't just a bad policy, it's actually evil and an existential threat to humanity. Carney's so-called pivot towards China and "diversification" strategy won't help matters either. Alberta has strong economic and cultural ties to the United States, and many Albertans are more closely aligned (politically and socially) with their neighbors to the south than their fellow Canadians to the east. While there is of course an economic benefit from expanding exports to Asia (the agriculture sector in particular might see some big gains), most Albertans are opposed to doing so at the expense of maximizing opportunities in the US market. | | | | ---|---|--- | Jan 11 | Carney's pivot away from America and towards China doesn't make sense in today's rapidly bifurcating global economy. And in the context of trade spats with the United States, aligning with China over the defense of Greenland, and preparing for a possible American invasion of Canada, the "diversification" agenda can only intensify Albertan angst. Given Ottawa seems openly hostile towards Alberta and its strong relationship with the United States, it's not surprising that the secession movement is gaining momentum. As I have before, the world is breaking into two separate and distinct political and economic ecosystems, one led by Americans and the other led by the Chinese. The former will champion free men, free markets, and free minds; the latter totalitarianism, state planning, and censorship. Sooner or later, . I have made dozens of trip to Alberta (I'm a HUGE fan of the ) over the last fifteen years and have come to know Albertans as freedom-loving, enterprising, rugged individualists who get prickly when their rights are being infringed. There's no doubt in my mind which side of the divide they will come down on. | | ---|---|--- VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. He 's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza. LinkedIn has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and Worth profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, , and . Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2026 Kelan Publishing, LLC PO BOX 932, Lincoln, NH 03251 ? ?

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Alex Pretti
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
Please take a moment to read the following words from Alex Pretti’s family:
> "We are heartbroken but also very angry.
> Alex was a kindhearted soul who cared deeply for his family and friends and also the American veterans whom he cared for as an ICU nurse at the Minneapolis VA hospital. Alex wanted to make a difference in this world. Unfortunately he will not be with us to see his impact. I do not throw around the hero term lightly. However his last thought and act was to protect a woman.
> The sickening lies told about our son by the administration are reprehensible and disgusting. Alex is clearly not holding a gun when attacked by Trump’s murdering and cowardly ICE thugs. He has his phone in his right hand and his empty left hand is raised above his head while trying to protect the woman ICE just pushed down all while being pepper sprayed.
> Please get the truth out about our son. He was a good man. Thank you."
It’s hard to come to terms with this, hard to see how we overcome it.
But I am so inspired by Alex, what he was doing in the final moments of his life. Documenting this cruelty and lawlessness so that America would know what's being done in our name, to our country and against our fellow Americans. Trying to help a woman being terrorized by these thugs, giving his life to protect hers.
And I’m inspired by his family, who are speaking up and getting the truth out.
It makes me want to do more, fight harder, not let up until we win power to stop this.
It's hard to see this murder, hard to see the news that three people have died in ICE custody in El Paso in the last 45 days, hard to see this descent into fascism and cruelty, hard to see how we get through.
But I know that if we do the work (protest, organize, volunteer, register, turn out, vote) -- nothing easy about it, all of it will be hard -- there's a chance we make it.
I am more committed to the work than I ever have been, more grateful for everyone out there doing what they can with what they have wherever they are, more grateful for people like Renee and Alex and the many more whose names we'll never know.
Rest in peace, Alex.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

subject: Imagine if… 🤔

Peter,
Imagine if we lived in a Texas where residents didn’t have to worry about the power grid any time weather gets rough – a state that takes investments in emergency preparedness and infrastructure more seriously, instead of spewing “culture war” nonsense.
The fact of the matter is this: the MAGA lapdogs in the highest elected offices of our state are holding residents back from this future. But working together, we as Texans can build that future without them.
DONATE NOW to help us elect progressive leaders who will take emergency preparedness more seriously and show up for working Texans! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode=ImagineIf&amount=10.00&refcode2=6eb1fd3a-3efa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b]

How do we break through and try to bring in new, bold, community-centered leaders who will move Texas forward, Peter? It’s through robust and authentic person-to-person voter engagement across the state.
We need to scale up to win, though. Do you agree?
PITCH IN to give us the boost we need to shift the political tide and have a greater electoral impact in 2026! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode=ImagineIf&amount=10.00&refcode2=6eb1fd3a-3efa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b]

name: Team Hickenlooper
subject: If we lose this seat, Democrats have virtually zero path to the Senate majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
If everyone reading this email right now chipped in just $5 (or heck, even $1), we’d soar past our weekly fundraising goal and be one step closer to rebuilding our Senate majority.
**[Peter, can we count on you to chip in $5 to John Hickenlooper’s re-election campaign and Heartland Patriots today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99978?refcode=em20260125-9978&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=1&akid=9978%2E614464%2ECHZ76C)**
**[DONATE $5 →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99978?refcode=em20260125-9978&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=2&akid=9978%2E614464%2ECHZ76C)**
We know that was direct, Peter, but this campaign is critical for Democrats’ winning strategy in the midterms. If you need to hear more before making a contribution to John’s campaign, here are FIVE reasons we’re asking for your $5 today:
1. **John is pushing back against Trump’s chaos in every way he can.** He’s fighting tooth and nail to safeguard Colorado’s public lands, push back against Trump’s reckless tariff-taxes, and defend Coloradans’ access to affordable health care.
2. **The path to the Senate runs straight to Colorado.** If we lose John’s seat, Democrats have virtually zero path to taking the Senate back in 2026 or 2028.
3. **National Republicans see Colorado as a prime pickup opportunity.** That’s why they’re running a slate of MAGA extremists in our state – and if they sense weakness in our campaign, they’ll flood Colorado with outside money to defeat John and flip Colorado red.
4. **John doesn’t accept a single cent of corporate PAC money.** As Colorado’s Senator, he’s accountable to YOU, not corporations who are trying to buy Congress.
5. **And if everyone reading this email right now chipped in just $5 (or heck, even $1), we’d soar past our weekly fundraising goal and be one step closer to rebuilding our Senate majority.**

**[So what do you say, Peter? Can we count on you to donate $5 to John Hickenlooper’s campaign and Heartland Patriots today? Anything you can give will have an immediate impact in this make-or-break race →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99978?refcode=em20260125-9978&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=3&akid=9978%2E614464%2ECHZ76C)**

* * *
Friend, Donald Trump isn’t waiting for the 2026 election to begin. **He’s rewriting the rules now. ** A _Washington Post_ investigation just revealed a sweeping effort by Trump and his allies to lock in structural advantages before a single vote is cast. That means forcing early redistricting in key states, pressuring state officials to purge voters from the rolls, attacking mail voting, and loading federal election positions with partisan loyalists. In other words: He’s trying to rig the game from the inside out. **And unless we stop him, it could work.** The Trump playbook is crystal clear: suppress the vote, tilt the map, and rewrite the rules of democracy to favor MAGA Republicans. If we wait until fall to fight back, it’ll be too late. That’s why we’re building a defense _now_ : investing in Democratic Secretaries of State, launching legal challenges, and exposing the Trump administration’s authoritarian overreach. subject: Important Notice: Meat Warning
body:
Massive food hoarding warning
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e23722226/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvbVVHckVDQXIyeQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjU/LbmNsZXpCU3k3Wg/qP2hpZHM9bmNNbHJTR2VFSWxLcGdscw/gaXalvg/scs142704a3)

**HIGH ALERT: Shocking Meat Shortages Are Coming – Prepare Now** [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e23722226/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazIwLmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjU/LbmNsZXpCU3k3Wg/qP3RydmlkPTE0NjY0JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVNTS0xODMwLTIwMjYwMTI1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1VTU0tMTgzMC0yMDI2MDEyNQ/gaXalvg/s2p83622606) **The USDA predicts meat production shortages for the first time since 2014, and the U.N. warns of "an unprecedented global hunger crisis".** Which means 2 dangerous things for you: 1\. Higher prices at the grocery store
2\. Less meat available That's why meat must be a vital part of your survival food stockpile. But there is a catch. Not all protein is created equal. And this is so critical to understand, especially in a crisis. See, your protein needs to meet 4 critical requirements: It needs to:
* Last a while
* Taste great
* Store without refrigeration
* Can't break the bank

**Spoiler alert: most protein options fall short!** Take peanut butter. Sure, most people see it as a survival food protein staple. But did you know most cans are full of added sugars? Plus, they don't last more than a few months. A year tops. Grocery store meat doesn't work either. First, it's expensive. If you've been to the grocery store recently, you know what I'm talking about. Meat prices are up big time over the past year. But it also needs to be refrigerated. So if a blackout hits and cuts power to your home, you might as well use it as a paperweight. But don't worry friend. **There is a protein option that checks all four boxes:**
* This option is guaranteed to last at least 5 years.
* It doesn't need to be refrigerated.
* And it come with an easy payment plan so it won't break the bank.
* And most importantly, it tastes delicious!

**Introducing for the first time ever...** [**The BRAND NEW Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit!**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e23722226/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazIwLmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjU/LbmNsZXpCU3k3Wg/qP3RydmlkPTE0NjY0JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVNTS0xODMwLTIwMjYwMTI1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1VTU0tMTgzMC0yMDI2MDEyNQ/gaXalvg/s2p83622606) [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e23722226/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazIwLmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjU/LbmNsZXpCU3k3Wg/qP3RydmlkPTE0NjY0JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVNTS0xODMwLTIwMjYwMTI1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1VTU0tMTgzMC0yMDI2MDEyNQ/gaXalvg/s2p83622606) **YES! ORDER TODAY AND GET 9 FREE GIFTS WORTH $137.86 WITH THIS EXCLUSIVE BONUS PACKAGE!!**
* **FREE Gift #1:** NEW & Improved 72-Hour Survival Food Kit ($29.00 Value)
* **FREE Gift #2:** NEW & Improved 72-Hour Survival Food Kit ($29.00 Value)
* **FREE Gift #3:** Ultimate Meat Medley Cookbook ($9.95 Value)
* **FREE Gift #4:** FREE Report: Top 10 Items Sold Out After a Crisis ($4.99 Value)
* **FREE Gift #5:** FREE Report: The Survival Garden Guide ($4.99 Value)
* **FREE Gift #6:** FREE Report: How to Cut Your Grocery Bills in Half ($4.99 Value)
* **FREE Gift #7:** FREE Report: The Water Survival Guide ($4.99 Value)
* **FREE Gift #8:** $25.00 OFF Your Next Purchase ($25.00 Value)
* **FREE Gift #9:** Shipping & Handling ($24.95 Value)
* **Total Savings & Bonus Package Value: $137.86!**
* **_And YES! There's also an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!_**

[**ACT FAST: $177 TODAY,
SHIPS TOMORROW!**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e23722226/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazIwLmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjU/LbmNsZXpCU3k3Wg/qP3RydmlkPTE0NjY0JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVNTS0xODMwLTIwMjYwMTI1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1VTU0tMTgzMC0yMDI2MDEyNQ/gaXalvg/s2p83622606) Now, there is one thing you should know. Every time we've offered meat in the past, we've SOLD OUT. So when people find out about this brand-NEW Ultimate Meat Survival Food Kit, we could see a huge rush. I don't want to alarm you, but there are no IOUs or rain checks on this meat kit. It's first-come, first-served. So if you're going to reserve your kit, **[you need to act fast](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e23722226/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazIwLmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjU/LbmNsZXpCU3k3Wg/qP3RydmlkPTE0NjY0JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVNTS0xODMwLTIwMjYwMTI1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1VTU0tMTgzMC0yMDI2MDEyNQ/gaXalvg/s2p83622606)**. For starters, you get 5 meat options. Chicken, beef, pork, turkey and ground beef. So you aren't stuck with 1 or 2 types of protein. And the variety means you can use it in a ton of recipes. Chicken salad, burgers, tacos, you name it. **You're in control, not the stock boy at the grocery store.** Plus, you can actually pronounce the ingredients that we use. That's because there are only 2. Meat, of course, and salt for preservation. That's it! No funky chemicals. No artificial gunk. The only things in your food are food. [**ACT FAST: $177 TODAY,
SHIPS TOMORROW!**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e23722226/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazIwLmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAxMjU/LbmNsZXpCU3k3Wg/qP3RydmlkPTE0NjY0JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPVVNTS0xODMwLTIwMjYwMTI1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1VTU0tMTgzMC0yMDI2MDEyNQ/gaXalvg/s2p83622606) Now, you may be wondering how we guarantee such a long shelf life for canned foods. It comes from our special, old-fashioned retort canning process. **We use small-batch retorts to cook your meat right inside the can.** That means 2 important things. First, your meat is slow cooked, so it retains all its natural juices and flavor. And it's ready to go right out of the can. And second, it kills off any germs in the can that might harm the shelf life. Sometimes, the old-fashioned way is the right way. And guess what? This is all done right here in the US of A. clean_body: Massive food hoarding warning HIGH ALERT: Shocking Meat Shortages Are Coming – Prepare Now The USDA predicts meat production shortages for the first time since 2014, and the U.N. warns of "an unprecedented global hunger crisis". Which means 2 dangerous things for you: 1\. Higher prices at the grocery store 2\. Less meat available That's why meat must be a vital part of your survival food stockpile. But there is a catch. Not all protein is created equal. And this is so critical to understand, especially in a crisis. See, your protein needs to meet 4 critical requirements: It needs to: Last a while Taste great Store without refrigeration Can't break the bank Spoiler alert: most protein options fall short! Take peanut butter. Sure, most people see it as a survival food protein staple. But did you know most cans are full of added sugars? Plus, they don't last more than a few months. A year tops. Grocery store meat doesn't work either. First, it's expensive. If you've been to the grocery store recently, you know what I'm talking about. Meat prices are up big time over the past year. But it also needs to be refrigerated. So if a blackout hits and cuts power to your home, you might as well use it as a paperweight. But don't worry friend. There is a protein option that checks all four boxes: This option is guaranteed to last at least 5 years. It doesn't need to be refrigerated. name: Rose Penelope Yee
subject: Not in Our Name: Dismantle ICE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by [Rose for Congress](https://roseforcongress
body:
I’m calling on the Democratic Party to lead, not just issue statements.

| | | | | [|
---](https://roseforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=35bf91c695e8f4a5dc8a9dd42&id=8330b89d61&e=8c53948e4c)
| | | | | |
## ICE killed. No one is arrested. This must end.
---
| |
Friends,What happened in Minneapolis was not just a tragedy. It was state-sanctioned violence.Alex Pretti was killed by ICE. And once again, the perpetrators are not being arrested, not being charged, and not being held accountable. That is what impunity looks like. **And still, many establishment Democrats are refusing to call for ICE to be dismantled. Will you stand with the majority of the country and tell Democrats you only support candidates who Commit to Dismantling ICE?**
---
| [SIGN THE PETITION](https://roseforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=35bf91c695e8f4a5dc8a9dd42&id=133d854cb1&e=8c53948e4c)
---
| |
I have seen this before. I grew up under Martial Law in the Philippines. I experienced first hand the brutality of a fascist dictatorship. When armed forces are given unchecked power, when citizens are treated as enemies, and when those in uniform are shielded from consequences, violence is policy.I never thought it would happen here in the United States.But here we are. ICE has become a paramilitary force. Armed. Militarized. Unaccountable.This is not public safety. This is state-sanctioned terror with a federal badge. And it will not stop on its own. We, the people, need to stop it.**That is why I am publicly calling on the Democratic Party and the California Democratic Party to stop hiding behind statements and start leading. California should lead the nation in stopping this state thuggery, because that is what it is.** Not just reform ICE. Not just “investigate.” Dismantle ICE.
---
| [SIGN THE PETITION](https://roseforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=35bf91c695e8f4a5dc8a9dd42&id=04abb2a2f0&e=8c53948e4c)
---
| |
As someone who has lived under authoritarian rule, I can tell you this with absolute clarity: when killings - like Renee Nicole’s and Alex’s - go unpunished, democracy is in serious danger.This is about more than immigration policy. This is about whether we allow armed federal agencies to operate above the law. This is about whether we choose people over paramilitary power. This is about whether we let fear rule or whether we fight back.I am calling on the Democratic Party establishment to step up because too many elected officials are afraid to.**If you are ready to back a campaign that will not stay quiet, will not play it safe, and will not accept state violence as normal — I need you with me.** Help me keep pushing. Help me keep organizing. Help me keep telling the truth.
---
| [Fuel this fight — contribute now via ActBlue](https://roseforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=35bf91c695e8f4a5dc8a9dd42&id=48ed892120&e=8c53948e4c)
---
| |
In solidarity,
Rose Penelope Yee
Candidate for Congress, CA-02P.S. History is very clear about this: systems that rely on fear, force, and impunity do not self-correct. They are dismantled because people demand it. If you believe California Democrats must lead that demand, stand with me now.

---
| [DONATE](https://roseforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=35bf91c695e8f4a5dc8a9dd42&id=56b7a90175&e=8c53948e4c)
---
